title: Lead Manager
description:
Goal: Triage calls and qualify motivation.



Job Title: Real Estate Lead Manager / Cold Caller (Neutral Accent)

Location: Remote

Salary: $6.00 – $10.00 / hour + Commission per lead closed.



Description:

This is NOT a high-pressure sales role. We are a Resolution Service. You will be calling families facing difficult situations (tax foreclosure, inherited property drama). Your job is to listen, empathize, and identify how we can help them. You are the bridge between a "messy" situation and our senior analysts.



Key Responsibilities:



Outbound calling/SMS to motivated sellers and heirs.



Using our "Resolution Script" to identify the "Big 4" (Condition, Timeline, Motivation, Price).



Overcoming objections and building trust with people in distress.



Scheduling "Closing Appointments" for the Business Owner.



Requirements:



Perfect Neutral English: Must be clearly understood by US seniors.



2+ years of Real Estate Cold Calling experience (Wholesaling experience is a plus).



High Emotional Intelligence (EQ).



Experience using a CRM (GoHighLevel, Podio, or REISift).

title: Phone Sales & Events Specialist (Eventbrite + Sales + Customer Experience)
description:
## About Us



We are a fast-growing events company based in Washington, D.C., hosting high-energy singles mixers, speed dating events, and social experiences across Northern Virginia and the DMV area.



We run dozens of events every week and manage 100+ live Eventbrite listings. Our focus is simple: drive attendance, create great experiences, and generate strong revenue through sales and upselling.



We are looking for driven, confident Phone Sales & Events Specialists who can convert leads into paid attendees, support event operations, and deliver excellent customer experiences.



## Role Overview



This is a sales-first role.



You will be responsible for:



* Calling leads and converting them into ticket buyers

* Upselling customers into higher-tier packages (VIP, Elite, Concierge)

* Assisting with event setup, coordination, and attendee management

* Managing Eventbrite listings and customer communication



If you are comfortable on the phone, persuasive, and know how to close, this role is for you.



## Work Schedule



* Flexible hours (must overlap with U.S. EST time)

* Availability during evenings and weekends is a big plus (peak sales and event times)



## Compensation



* $2 – $5 USD per hour (based on experience) Plus Commission. 

* Plus performance bonuses for:



  * Ticket sales

  * Upsells

  * Revenue generated



High performers will earn more and grow quickly.



## Key Responsibilities



### Phone Sales & Lead Conversion



* Call inbound and outbound leads

* Convert inquiries into paid event attendees

* Follow up with past attendees and warm leads

* Handle objections and close sales confidently



### Upselling & Revenue Growth



* Promote VIP, Elite, and Concierge ticket tiers

* Increase average order value per customer

* Recommend the best event experiences based on customer needs



### Eventbrite & Event Management



* Create and update Eventbrite listings

* Monitor ticket sales and optimize listings

* Duplicate and manage multiple weekly events



### Customer Support



* Respond to
s and inquiries quickly

* Provide clear, professional communication

* Handle refund requests and customer concerns



### Event Coordination Support



* Assist with organizing events

* Coordinate with venues and reservations

* Help ensure smooth event execution



## Requirements



* Strong spoken and written English

* Proven experience in phone sales or closing deals

* Experience with Eventbrite, event management, or marketing

* Comfortable upselling and handling objections

* Strong customer service skills

* Organized and detail-oriented

* Reliable internet and ability to work independently



## Do NOT Apply If



* You are not comfortable making phone calls

* You cannot sell or upsell confidently

* You miss deadlines or respond slowly

* You are not serious about performance and results



## Bonus Skills (Highly Preferred)



* Event hosting or event coordination experience

* CRM or lead management experience

* Sales scripts and funnel experience

* Experience working with U.S.-based customers



## What We’re Looking For



We want someone who:



* Knows how to sell and close deals

* Is proactive and follows up without being told

* Thinks in terms of revenue and results

* Communicates clearly and professionally

* Wants to grow with a fast-scaling company



This role can grow into:



* Sales Manager

* Event Manager

* Operations Lead



## How to Apply



To apply:



1.Send your resume and response here through ONJ



2. Include:



* Your phone sales experience

* Your event or Eventbrite experience

* A short example of how you closed a sale

* Your availability (EST time)



3. Attach your resume



## Hiring Timeline



We are hiring immediately and will make decisions within 48 hours after interviews.





If you are confident on the phone, hungry to sell, and want to grow with a fast-moving events company, we want you on our team.

title: Guest Concierge Coordinator
description:
About SB Events Co.



SB Events Co. is a Dallas-based luxury wedding planning firm specializing in South Asian and multicultural celebrations. We are a commission-free studio known for our cultural fluency, intentional planning process, and dedication to multi-day, destination experiences. Our selective client roster means every couple receives our full focus — and every tea
mber plays a meaningful role in bringing their vision to life.



Role Overview

The Guest Concierge Coordinator is a remote, detail-driven role responsible for managing all guest-facing logistics and team travel coordination across SBE's event portfolio. This person serves as the behind-the-scenes engine that keeps our guests informed, our room blocks organized, and our team prepared to arrive on-site without a hitch. You will work closely with our lead planners and coordinate directly with hotels, vendors, and clients to ensure a seamless hospitality experience from the first save-the-date to the last checkout.



Core Responsibilities

Wedding Website Management

• Maintain and update client wedding websites with accurate event details, schedules, venue information, and dress codes

• Conduct thorough audits of each website before key guest communication milestones to catch errors in dates, links, addresses, or RSVP forms

• Build and manage a guest FAQ page in coordination with the couple to reduce repetitive inquiries

• Ensure website reflects any last-minute changes (venue, timing, transportation updates) in real time



Room Block Management

• Review, track, and maintain all room block contracts — flagging key deadlines, attrition clauses, and release dates to the lead planner

• Build and manage master room block lists, tracking reservations by guest name, room type, arrival/departure date, and confirmation number

• Process and respond to room block reservation requests from guests in a timely, professional manner

• Monitor pickup rates and proactively flag attrition risk to the lead planner before penalty deadlines

• Coordinate VIP guest accommodations separately, ensuring special room needs (adjoining rooms, accessibility, suite upgrades) are noted and confirmed

• Manage vendor room needs within or alongside the guest block, keeping them clearly separated in tracking

• Liaise with hotel room block coordinators to confirm room availability, billing details, and group check-in procedures



Guest Communication

• Develop guest communication plans and timelines in coordination with the lead planner — covering pre-event, day-of, and post-event touchpoints

• Draft and schedule guest-facing
s covering hotel booking instructions, transportation details, event schedules, and FAQs

• Execute guest communication sends via designated platforms 
, wedding website, or guest apps)

• Track RSVP responses, meal selections, and dietary restrictions — following up with non-respondents on schedule

• Maintain a guest master list with up-to-date contact information, RSVP status, and special notes

• Field and respond to incoming guest inquiries, escalating complex issues to the lead planner as needed



Guest Transportation Logistics

• Coordinate shuttle schedules and guest transportation timelines in partnership with the lead planner and transportation vendors

• Distribute transportation details and pickup instructions to guests ahead of each event day

• Track airport transfer needs and compile manifests for transportation vendors

• Maintain a live transportation tracker for the lead planner's reference during event execution



Welcome Bag & Amenity Coordination Support

• Track welcome bag quantities, guest counts per hotel, and delivery logistics in coordination with the lead planner

• Maintain a welcome bag distribution list by guest name, room number, and hotel

• Confirm delivery timelines with hotel concierge teams and follow up on any undelivered items



Team Travel Coordination

• Book and manage travel accommodations for the SBE team for all destination events — including flights, hotels, and ground transportation

• Monitor team flight statuses ahead of destination events and flag delays or disruptions to the lead planner

• Compile and distribute individual travel itineraries to each tea
mber, including flight details, hotel confirmations, and transportation instructions

• Coordinate team hotel room assignments, ensuring team rooms are separate from the guest block where applicable

• Issue reminders for international travel requirements (passport validity, visa requirements, travel insurance) ahead of destination events

• Track and log team travel-related expenses against event budgets in Asana

• Confirm team arrival status before each event to ensure everyone is situated and accounted for



General Administrative Support

• Maintain organized, up-to-date files for each client in Asana, including trackers, contracts, and communication logs

• Prepare and distribute event-specific hospitality notes and briefings to the lead planner before each event

• Support post-event wrap-up by reconciling room block pickups, transportation totals, and guest attendance counts



Qualifications

Required

• 2+ years of experience in hospitality coordination, event planning, travel management, or a related field

• Exceptional written English — professional, warm, and clear in all guest-facing communications

• Strong proficiency in Google Workspace (Gmail, Sheets, Docs, Drive)

• Experience with Asana or a similar project management platform

• Extremely organized with a high attention to detail and a proactive approach to tracking deadlines

• Comfortable managing multiple events simultaneously in a fast-paced, remote environment

• Reliable internet connection and ability to overlap with Central Standard Time (CST) hours during key planning periods



Preferred

• Background in luxury hospitality, hotel group sales, or destination event logistics

• Familiarity with wedding planning workflows or experience supporting a planning firm

• Experience booking international travel (flights, hotels, transfers) for a team or group

• Proficiency with HoneyBook or similar CRM platforms

• Experience with wedding website platforms (Zola, The Knot, Joy, or similar)



Who You Are

• You are the person who catches the typo in the venue address before the
 goes out to 150 guests

• You are comfortable working independently but know exactly when to escalate

• You take genuine pride in creating a smooth, elevated experience for guests — even behind the scenes

• You are calm under pressure, solutions-oriented, and never let a deadline slip

• You communicate proactively — you don't wait to be asked for an update

• You understand that in luxury events, the details are everything

title: Remote Sales & Customer Conversion Agent (Salary-Based + Target-Driven)
description:
Role Overview

We are hiring a Remote Sales & Customer Conversion Agent whose primary responsibility is to convert incoming leads into paying customers and consistently meet monthly sales targets.

This is a strictly sales-focused role — not customer support.

- Your job is to sell flight tickets and close deals

- You are expected to turn conversations into successful bookings



Lead System (Important)

* Skavala will provide daily incoming leads from
 & Instagram ads

* You will be responsible for converting these leads into paying customers

???? In addition, you are also expected to source your own customers independently to ensure you meet your monthly targets

?? This is a standard expectation — not optional?

?? No additional commission is provided for personal leads?

???? It is part of your responsibility to meet your required performance



Key Responsibilities

* Respond quickly to incoming leads (WhatsApp, chat, etc.)

* Engage customers and understand their travel needs

* Recommend suitable flight options

* Follow up consistently until the customer is ready to pay

* Handle objections and close sales confidently

* Convert chats into successful bookings

* Source additional customers independently when needed

* Maintain strong daily and monthly performance



?? Important Rule (Strict)

This role is 100% SALES-DRIVEN.

* You are not hired to chat

* You are hired to convert and close deals

If you cannot consistently turn conversations into payments, this role will not be a good fit.



Salary & Performance Structure

* Base Salary: $300/month

* Salary is tied to performance and target achievement

* You must meet your monthly booking target to maintain this role

* Consistent underperformance may lead to termination



Monthly Target Requirement

* You are required to achieve a minimum number of flight bookings per month

* Targets are mandatory and non-negotiable

* Monthly targets may be increased over time based on performance and business growth



What We Provide

* Daily incoming leads from paid ads

* Structured sales environment

* Opportunity to work with a global travel brand

* Long-term growth for high-performing agents



Requirements

* Proven experience in sales, closing, or customer conversion

* Strong persuasion and negotiation skills

* Ability to confidently handle objections and close deals

* Fast response time and high availability

* Self-motivated and target-driven mindset

* Ability to work independently and take responsibility for results

* Experience in travel or ticket booking is an added advantage



Ideal Candidate

* You are a closer, not a support agent

* You are driven by targets and results

* You can handle pressure and still deliver

* You are proactive and can generate customers when needed

* You take full responsibility for your sales performance



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

1. Your experience in sales or closing deals

2. Examples of how you converted leads into paying customers

3. Your strategy for turning chats into sales

(Include the word "Sharp Mind" in your responds to the job offer)

4. Your daily availability



Final Note

This is a high-performance sales role.

???? You will be given leads?

???? You are expected to convert?

???? You must meet targets

If you are confident in your ability to sell, close deals, and deliver results consistently, we want you on our team.

If you are only looking for a support/chat job, please do not apply.

title: Virtual Sales & Admin Representative
description:
About the Role



We’re a residential window cleaning company in Oahu looking for a reliable, organized, phone?savvy virtual assistant to handle sales, customer service, and admin. Must work 9:00 am – 5:00 pm, Monday–Friday (Hawaii–Aleutian Standard Time)



Your mission is simple: Keep the schedule full, customers happy, and the back office organized.



---



Key Responsibilities



1. Sales (Primary)



- Respond quickly to new lead inquiries by phone, text, and
.  

- Provide basic job estimates using our pricing tools and guidelines.  

- Work the sales pipelines daily: move leads through each stage and prevent drop?offs.  

- Run 7?day follow?up cadences with open estimates and unbooked leads.  

- Pull jobs forward to fill gaps in the schedule by contacting flexible customers.  

- Update CRM notes daily so every lead and client has clear, current information.





2. Customer Service (CSR)



- Monitor and protect customer satisfaction on every job.  

- Handle complaints professionally; document issues and schedule go backs (touch ups)  

- Support technicians with on?job issues (access, notes, rescheduling).  

- Send and manage booking confirmations and reminders.  

- Answer service questions about pricing, services, and availability.  

- Process reschedules/cancellations, and backfill those openings from the pipeline.  

- Monitor review responses and follow up with happy customers to get Google reviews.  

- Identify and plan simple upsell opportunities (add?on services, maintenance plans).



3. Admin



- Track bonuses and commissions based on completed jobs and upsells.  

- Send internal updates and reminders to the field team (special instructions, notes).  

- Plan and document yard sign routes for technicians.  

- Process refunds once approved and record them properly.  

- Set up and track client payment plans when needed.  

- Monitor overdue invoices and run polite follow?up calls/texts; log all attempts.



---



Requirements



- 1+ year experience in phone?based customer service, inside sales, or appointment setting (home services a plus).  

- Strong spoken and written English; confident on the phone and in text/email.  

- Comfortable making and receiving a high volume of calls and messages.  

- Highly organized, detail?oriented, and able to follow scripts and checklists.  

- Experience with CRM (HouseCall Pro) and basic office tools 
, calendars, spreadsheets).  

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace.  

- Able to work 9:00 am – 5:00 pm, Monday–Friday, Hawaii–Aleutian Standard Time consistently.



---



Compensation



- Hourly base pay starting at $7/hour with growth opportunities 

- Performance bonuses tied to:  

  - revenue sold and collected

  - service plans sold



You’ll get training on our systems, scripts, and processes. Your work will directly impact how quickly we grow and how well we serve our customers.

title: YouTube Video Editor — Finance / Personal Finance Channel (Long-Form, 10–14 min)
description:
I am CJ Wallace, founder of The Velocity Channel — a personal finance YouTube channel focused on Velocity Banking, debt elimination, and financial freedom strategies. We currently have 64,000+ subscribers and are growing fast. I need a dedicated video editor who will become the backbone of this channel's content production.

This is a long-term position for someone who wants to grow with a brand, not just complete one-off projects. If you are detail-oriented, fast, and take pride in your work, I want to hear from you.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Edit 10–12 long-form YouTube videos per month (average 12 minutes each)

Cut and structure raw talking-head footage into clean, engaging final videos

Add lower thirds, text overlays, and on-screen graphics consistent with our brand (navy blue #0D1B2A and gold #C9A84C)

Sync b-roll, whiteboard footage, and supporting visuals to the spoken content

Add royalty-free background music at appropriate levels

Create or place YouTube thumbnail graphics (template will be provided)

Export videos in the correct YouTube format and upload-ready specs

Incorporate feedback efficiently — we aim for no more than one revision round per video

Maintain consistent pacing and style across all videos so the channel feels cohesive





WHO YOU ARE:



Experienced editing talking-head / educational YouTube content (finance, coaching, or teaching channels preferred)

Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve

Strong eye for pacing — you know when to cut, when to hold, and how to keep a viewer engaged

Detail-oriented — you catch your own mistakes before I do

Reliable communicator — you respond within 24 hours and meet deadlines consistently

Able to take creative direction and follow a brand style guide

Long-term minded — I am not looking for someone to do one video and disappear





REQUIREMENTS:



Minimum 1 year of video editing experience for YouTube channels

Portfolio or sample edits required to apply (links only — no attachments)

Strong written and spoken English

Reliable internet connection and computer capable of handling 1080p video

Available during overlap hours with US Central Time (CST) for communication

Familiarity with personal finance, debt, or financial education content is a strong plus but not required





WHAT I PROVIDE:



Raw footage delivered via Google Drive after each filming session

Brand style guide with colors, fonts, logo files, and examples of the look I want

Script documents for reference so you know the intended flow of each video

Clear feedback — I will tell you exactly what I want changed and why

Consistent monthly volume — this is not sporadic work, it is a reliable schedule

Room to grow — as the channel grows, your role can grow with it





HOW TO APPLY:

To be considered, your application must include all three of the following:



A link to at least two YouTube videos you have edited (must be long-form, 8 minutes or longer)

Your monthly rate expectation

A one-paragraph answer to this question: "What do you do in the first 30 seconds of an edit to make sure a viewer does not click away?"



Applications without all three items will not be reviewed.



SKILLS TAGS TO SELECT ON THE FORM:

Video Editing, Adobe Premiere Pro, YouTube, Video Production, DaVinci Resolve, Graphic Design (basic), English Speaking

title: Client Success Representative (Sales Support) Swing Supplies | Dallas, TX | Remote | Full-Time
description:
About Swing Supplies

Swing Supplies is a fast-growing custom golf merchandise company based in Dallas, TX. We design and deliver premium custom headcovers, towels, and branded gear for golf tournaments, charity events, school programs, and corporate outings across the US. We're in our systemization year, building the team and processes that will carry us into 2027 and beyond.



About the Role

We're looking for a Client Success Representative who is warm, sharp, and genuinely loves people. You'll be the first point of contact for inbound leads - responding quickly, building relationships, and guiding clients from first inquiry all the way to a closed order.

This role works closely with our Sales Manager and Operations team. If you're someone who communicates naturally, follows up without being pushed, and takes pride in making clients feel genuinely taken care of, this is for you.



What You'll Be Doing



Responding to inbound leads via
, CRM, and messaging platforms

Sending quotes, following up consistently, and nurturing relationships at every stage

Qualifying leads based on order quantity and event fit

Drafting personalized client messages that feel warm and human — not scripted

Coordinating with operations to keep clients updated on their order status

Updating and maintaining the CRM (HoneyBook) and lead tracker accurately every day

Supporting the Sales Manager on pricing conversations, proposals, and special requests

Representing the Swing Supplies brand with care and professionalism in every interaction





What We're Looking For



Strong written and verbal English communication — you write like a real person, not a template

Able to build trust quickly and maintain long-term relationships, not just close one-off transactions

Detail-oriented with client requests, designs, quantities, and deadlines

Comfortable managing multiple conversations simultaneously without dropping the ball

Responsive and reliable - you have a natural sense of urgency

Self-sufficient and proactive - you move conversations forward without constant direction

Able to handle objections around pricing, minimums, and timelines with confidence and composure

Warm and professional - you keep communication human even when things get busy

Coachable and open to feedback while staying consistent in quality

Thinks in terms of long-term client relationships, not just transactions

1–3 years of experience in sales support, customer service, or client-facing roles preferred





Bonus Points



Familiar with HoneyBook, invoicing tools, or quoting platforms

Background in events, tournaments, school programs, or branded merchandise

Experience in golf, sports, or custom products industry





What You Get



Remote, flexible work setup

Direct mentorship from a hands-on Sales Manager

A tight-knit, collaborative team that genuinely invests in your growth

Front-row seat to a growing company — real opportunity to grow with us into 2027





How to Apply

Please fill out our application form here: 

The form includes a short video introduction.  We want to hear your voice, see your personality, and get a feel for how you communicate. Don't overthink it,  just be yourself!

title: Transaction Coordinator ! REVA! Needed Asap
description:
Job Title: Transaction Coordinator (Real Estate Investing & Wholesaling)



Location: Remote

Type: Full-Time 



~ About the Role ~



We are a fast-growing real estate investment company seeking an experienced Transaction Coordinator with a strong background in wholesaling, investment properties, and title coordination. This role is critical in ensuring smooth, timely closings by managing contracts, communicating with title companies, and clearing title issues efficiently.



If you understand investment deals, assignments, double closes, and how to keep transactions moving from contract to close, we want to talk to you.



~ Key Responsibilities ~ 

* Coordinate real estate transactions from executed contract through closing

* Manage wholesaling transactions, including assignment contracts and double closes

* Communicate directly with title companies, escrow officers, buyers, and sellers

* Order title, review title commitments, and work with title companies to clear title issues

* Track critical dates, deadlines, and closing timelines

* Ensure all documents are properly executed and submitted

* Maintain organized transaction files and update CRM or tracking systems

* Proactively identify and resolve issues that could delay closing



~ Required Experience & Qualifications ~

* Proven experience as a Transaction Coordinator in real estate investing or wholesaling

* Strong understanding of investment property transactions

* Hands-on experience working with title companies and clearing title

* Familiarity with liens, judgments, probate, code violations, and other title issues

* Experience with assignment agreements and wholesaling workflows

* Excellent communication and follow-up skills

* Highly organized and detail-oriented

* Ability to manage multiple transactions at once and meet deadlines



~ Preferred (Nice to Have) ~

* Experience with CRM systems (Podio, InvestorFuse, REsimpli, etc.)

* Knowledge of real estate contracts across multiple states

* Experience working with cash buyers and private investors



~ What We Offer ~

* Competitive pay (based on experience)

* Consistent deal flow

* Flexible work environment

* Opportunity to grow with a scaling real estate investment company+



~ How to Apply ~

* Please submit your resume and briefly describe your experience with:

* Wholesaling transactions

* Working with title companies

* Clearing title issues

description:

We’re hiring a video editor to create high-performing direct-response ad creatives.

You will get a bonus if an ad you make performs well.

This is ongoing work if performance is strong.

---

Type of Content



Short-form direct-response video ads for Meta 
 & Instagram)

• UGC-style testimonial edits

• Before/after transformation storytelling

• Problem ? solution ? result structure

• Voiceover + caption-driven ads

• Founder-style authority edits

• Product demo / mechanism explanation clips

Etc…



Goal: maximize hook rate, hold rate, and conversions, invoke emotional response in the viewer

---

Editing Style

• Strong 1–3 second hooks

• Social-native pacing (not cinematic brand ads)

• Highlighting transformation + confidence outcomes



*Editors with DTC eCommerce/TikTok/Meta ad experience preferred.

---

Video Length



30-120 seconds

We typically request multiple 6-10 hook variations per concept.

---

Turnaround Time



Target:

• 24–48 hours per edit batch

• Fast iteration cycles required

• Ability to revise quickly based on performance feedback



Consistency and speed are very important.

title: Dispute manager
description:
About the Role

We are looking for an experienced Dispute Manager to handle Shopify Payments chargebacks and disputes on our behalf. You will own the full dispute process — from reviewing cases to submitting evidence — and help us recover revenue while keeping our chargeback ratio low.

Collect and submit evidence packages within platform deadlines

Track case outcomes and report on win rate, volume, and recovered amounts

Flag patterns or recurring issues that may indicate fraud or process gaps

Must include dispute win rate from previous role(s) in your application

$6 per hour

title: Part-Time YouTube Video Editor — Las Vegas Talk Show (Multicam)
description:
Job Description:

MTM Vegas is a twice-weekly YouTube talk show covering Las Vegas travel, casino loyalty

programs, and gaming industry news. Two hosts, multicam format (2–3 camera angles), 25–

35 minutes per episode. We’re looking for a reliable, detail-oriented video editor to join our

team on an ongoing part-time basis.

What you’ll do each week:

Edit 2 full episodes from raw multicam footage to polished final export

Create lower thirds, topic banners, and segment graphics using our brand templates

Mix and balance audio between two hosts, add music beds and sound design

Create 2–4 YouTube Shorts (vertical, 30–60 seconds) repurposed from each week’s

episodes

Upload final exports to our shared Google Drive with consistent file naming

Requirements:

Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro (multicam editing workflow is essential)

Experience with After Effects for lower thirds and basic motion graphics

Familiar with CapCut or similar tools for creating YouTube Shorts with dynamic captions

Portfolio showing multicam or multi-angle dialogue editing (talk shows, podcasts,

interviews)

Strong English communication skills — you’ll receive feedback via Slack and Loom

Reliable internet connection (minimum 50 Mbps) and backup power solution

Available to deliver 2 edited episodes + Shorts per week on a consistent schedule

Understands YouTube content: hooks, pacing, retention, and Shorts best practices

Nice to have:

Familiarity with Las Vegas, casino culture, or travel content

Thumbnail creation skills (Photoshop or Canva)

Experience with DaVinci Resolve

Color correction/grading ability

About the role: This starts as part-time (approximately 25–35 hours/week) with the

opportunity to grow into editing additional shows including Patreon-exclusive content and

special episodes. We pay on time, every time, via Wise or Payoneer — your choice. We’re

looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term, not a short-term gig.

To apply: Please include:

1. Link to your portfolio or YouTube channels you’ve edited

2. A specific example of multicam or talk show editing you’ve done

3. Your preferred hourly rate and monthly rate for this scope of work

4. Your current internet speed (run a Speedtest and screenshot it)

5. What editing software and hardware you use

We will send our top candidates a paid test edit ($75 for approximately 4 hours of work)

before making a final decision.

title: Funding Specialist
description:
Business & Personal Credit Approvals



Location: Remote

Position Type: Contract / Ongoing Work



We are looking for an experienced Funding Specialist (Virtual Assistant) who is highly skilled in securing business and personal funding approvals. This is NOT an entry-level role—we are only looking for individuals who already have proven results and understand the funding space at an advanced level.



Responsibilities:



Secure business funding approvals (LOCs, credit cards, loans)

Execute credit card stacking strategies

Analyze client profiles and structure files for maximum approvals

Work with lenders and banks to push applications through

Ensure clients meet all funding requirements before submission

Provide guidance on utilization, inquiry sensitivity, and profile optimization



Requirements (MUST HAVE):



Proven experience as a Funding Specialist

Deep understanding of the data point system (DPs) and lender behavior

Experience with credit card stacking & high-limit approvals

Strong knowledge of personal and business credit profiles

Ability to identify approval gaps and fix them quickly

Familiar with EIN-based funding, business credit building, and underwriting basics

Results-driven with real approval experience (not just theory)



Bonus Skills:



Experience with lenders like Chase, Amex, Bank of America, Navy Federal, etc.

Knowledge of business credit bureaus (Experian Business, Equifax Business, D&B)

Experience working with credit repair or funding companies



Compensation:



Pay will be based on experience and performance

Opportunity for bonuses based on approvals and results



To Apply:



Please include:



Your experience in funding (specific results)

Examples of approvals you’ve secured (amounts, lenders, etc.)

The strategies you use for stacking and approvals



We are looking for someone who can step in and produce results immediately. If you do not have direct experience with funding approvals, please do not apply.

title: Social Media Content Creator / Influencer
description:
Job Title: Part-Time Social Media Content Creator / Influencer

How to Apply: To be considered for this role, please submit the following:

title: Virtual Executive Assistant & Business Development Associate
description:

This is a multifaceted role that combines high-level administrative support with active participation in business development and sales outreach across the African continent.

Executive Support: Manage scheduling, professional correspondence, and daily administrative tasks via WhatsApp and
.



Business Development & Sales: Conduct outreach and manage lead generation for specialized certification services across various African markets.



Content & Communication: Utilize ChatGPT and other AI tools to draft professional documents, polish communications, and create reports.



Database Management: Maintain organized records of clients, partners, and project milestones.



Strategic Follow-ups: Ensure no lead or task falls through the cracks by maintaining a rigorous follow-up system.

Attributes of the Ideal Candidate

Discretion: Ability to handle sensitive organizational and business information with total confidentiality.



Resourcefulness: A "find a way" attitude when faced with logistical or research challenges.



Global Mindset: Comfortable communicating with diverse stakeholders across different cultures and time zones.



Detail-Oriented: You notice the small things that others miss.

title: Job Title: Creative Content Creator – Gift Wrapping Specialist (Reels & TikTok)
description:
AUGC Content Creator – Gift Wrapping & Satisfying Reels (Ongoing)



Are you obsessed with perfect creases, beautiful ribbons, and satisfying gift-wrapping videos? We are looking for a talented content creator to produce clean, aesthetic, and satisfying wrapping videos for social media. This is an ongoing role for someone who enjoys creating visually pleasing, detail-focused content.



We are inspired by high-end wrapping content such 
 
 
 will create content with a similar feel and aesthetic while bringing your own creative touch.



Style requirements: faceless (hands only), no voiceover required, clean and uncluttered background, bright natural or soft lighting, professional camera angles such as top-down and close-ups, strong focus on wrapping techniques, folds, ribbons and presentation.



Your role: create 2 fully shot and edited videos per week, film consistent high-quality content in a similar setup each time, edit videos with smooth and satisfying transitions, recreate and interpret popular wrapping styles and techniques.



Requirements: strong eye for detail and aesthetics, experience with short-form video such as TikTok or Reels, basic editing skills using tools like CapCut, VN, Canva or similar, access to a good smartphone camera and a stable tripod or overhead setup.



Compensation: monthly retainer of $120 AUD per month plus $20 AUD supply budget for wrapping materials.



How to apply: send 2 to 3 examples of similar content you have created. Shortlisted applicants will be invited to complete a small paid test video.



We are looking for someone who can nail the "tricky" details of gift wrapping. If your demo is top-quality, we can start immediately.

title: Senior Medical Virtual Assistant
description:
Auxo Health

Senior Medical Virtual Assistant

---

Role Summary

The Senior Medical Virtual Assistant (VA) provides high-level remote support to physicians across clinical, administrative, and coordination workflows. This role requires strong medical knowledge, operational ownership, and the ability to function independently in fast-paced, high-responsibility environments. The VA acts as an extension of the physician, ensuring efficiency, organization, and continuity of care.

---

Core Responsibilities

I. Clinical & Administrative Support

- Assist with clinical documentation and EMR/EHR workflows

- Prepare and organize information for patient care and follow-ups

- Support coordination across inpatient, outpatient, and procedural settings



II. Care Coordination

- Track referrals, imaging, procedures, and follow-ups

- Ensure no gaps in patient care or communication

- Coordinate with patients, clinics, hospitals, and care teams



III. Inbox & Calendar Management

- Manage physician's inbox to reduce overload

- Coordinate scheduling and prevent conflicts

- Protect physician time and workflow efficiency



IV. Patient Communication

- Communicate clearly and professionally with patients

- Provide instructions, reminders, and follow-ups

- Maintain empathy while staying within non-clinical boundaries



V. Operational Support

- Identify inefficiencies and improve workflows

- Adapt to changing schedules and physician needs

- Support additional initiatives when required (e.g., leadership, education, projects)

---

Required Qualifications

- Nursing graduate (required)

- Familiarity with U.S. healthcare systems and workflows

- Experience in healthcare coordination or clinical environments

- EMR/EHR experience preferred

- Strong written and verbal English communication skills

---

Core Competencies

I. Work Ethic & Ownership

- Highly reliable and accountable

- Able to manage time-sensitive tasks consistently

- Operates independently with minimal supervision



II. Clinical Awareness

- Understands patient care workflows and medical terminology

- Able to anticipate risks and gaps in coordination



III. Communication & Emotional Intelligence

- Clear, professional, and empathetic communication

- Maintains composure under pressure



IV. Organization & Prioritization

- Strong systems thinking

- Able to manage competing priorities effectively

- Detail-oriented with high follow-through

---

Ideal Candidate Traits

- Proactive and anticipatory

- Calm, steady, and emotionally resilient

- Respectful of traditional medical environments and hierarchy

- Patient-centered but not emotionally overextended

- Comfortable working with high-performing, busy physicians

---

Work Setup

- Full-time, dedicated to one physician

- Remote (PH or SA preferred)

- Flexible schedule aligned with physician workflow (may include early mornings or ICU support)

---

Positioning

This is a high-trust, high-responsibility role, designed for candidates who want to build long-term careers supporting physicians in specialized medical environments—not general VA work.

title: Car Negotiation Specialist
description:
Job Title: Car Buying Specialist (Virtual Assistant)



We are looking for a detail-oriented and confident Virtual Assistant based in the Philippines to help us with car buying and negotiation tasks.



This role is not sales — you will act as a buyer, working on behalf of our clients to research vehicles, contact dealerships, and negotiate the best possible price.



Responsibilities:



Handle client intake forms and organize customer requirements clearly



Conduct market research to find vehicles that match client needs



Compile and organize vehicle options, pricing, and notes into structured files



Call car dealerships in the U.S. and communicate with sales representatives



Negotiate pricing over the phone as a prospective buyer



Track quotes, follow up with dealerships, and update records



Coordinate closely with our team throughout the buying process





Requirements:

title: Ad Creative VA – Canva + Direct-Response Variations (Long-Term, 20 hrs/week)
description:
ABOUT ME

I run a small marketing company that manages ads for local brands (dog poop scooping, softwash, home services, etc.) and my own offers. I already have winning ads running. I don't need "branding" - I need someone who can take what's working and create more testable variations fast.



If you're strong in Canva, understand basic direct-response (headline, image, CTA), and like testing ideas, this is for you.



ABOUT THE ROLE

You will be our Ad Creative VA. Your main job:

– Take winning
/Instagram image ads and create 10-20 smart variations at a time (new hooks/headlines, different layouts & colors, different images/crops, different angles: problem, benefit, proof, offer)

– Create new static ad concepts from my prompts and examples when we don't have winners yet

– Work mostly in Canva and share editable links

– Keep files organized in Google Drive so everything is easy to find



You are not doing brand identity work or long-form video editing. This is ad creative work for performance.



RESPONSIBILITIES

– Read short briefs and brand guides I provide

– For each batch: study 1-3 winning ads, create 10-20 new variations ready to A/B test, export final images + share Canva links

– Name and save files correctly in the folder system

– Occasionally adapt static concepts into simple carousels (3-5 frames)



REQUIREMENTS

Must Have:

– Strong experience designing social media ad creatives (Meta/FB/IG) - not just logos or quote graphics, I want to see actual ads

– Comfortable working in Canva (Figma/PSD is a plus but not required)

– Good English reading/writing - you need to understand hooks, benefits, and CTAs

– High attention to detail (spelling, spacing, alignment, reading the brief fully)

– Stable internet and availability for 20 hours/week on a consistent schedule



Nice to Have:

– Experience with local/service businesses (cleaning, home services, etc.)

– Basic understanding of CTR, CPC, and A/B testing



HOURS & PAY

– Hours: ~20 hours/week (4 hours/day, Mon-Fri)

– Starting Rate: $5-7 USD/hour depending on experience

– 60-day trial - if you hit output and quality targets, rate and/or hours can increase

– Long-term role if we're a good fit



HOW WE'LL WORK

I send you:

– Winning ads (screenshots or files)

– Short brand background

– Simple brief: what I want to test next



You send back:

– 10-20 variations per batch

– JPG/PNG exports + Canva links

– Quick note on what you changed and why



If your work performs, you'll get steady monthly batches.



PAID TEST (REQUIRED)

Shortlisted applicants will complete a paid test:

– Pay: $50 USD

– Task: 10 static ad creatives

– 6 variations from an existing winner (ScooPet - dog poop scooping)

– 4 new concepts for another brand (softwash cleaning)

– You'll have clear examples, a brand summary, and 3 days to complete it



This is a working interview. If you do well, we'll move into a 60-day trial at 20 hours/week.



HOW TO APPLY

Subject line: Ad Creative VA - [Your Name]

In the body, include:



Your hourly rate in USD and hours available per week

Your top 5 ad creatives (FB/IG) that YOU designed - links or images

For 2 of those ads, tell me in 1-2 sentences: what the goal was and why you think the creative worked (or didn't)



Attach or link your Canva portfolio with ad examples only (no logos or branding decks).

Applications that don't follow instructions will be ignored. I need someone who can read and execute a brief exactly - that's the job.



If you're a Canva power user looking for stable, long-term work making ads that actually get tested, I'd love to see your work.

Record TWO voice notes — one in English, one in Portuguese.

title: Virtual Assistant / Freight Dispatch Coordinator
description:
Company: US-based holding company

Location: Remote (Philippines or Latin America)

Hours: Full-time, 40 hours/week

Schedule: US Eastern Time zone business hours (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM ET, Monday - Friday)

Compensation: $1,200 - $1,500 USD/month depending on experience



About Us

We are a US-based holding company that owns and operates small businesses. We are hiring a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to serve as our primary Dispatch Coordinator for a freight transportation operation while also providing general administrative support across the company.

This is a long-term, full-time position with room to grow as the business expands. You will work directly with the owner and play a central role in daily operations.



Freight Dispatch Responsibilities (~20-25 hours/week)



Monitor load boards (DAT, Truckstop, Amazon Relay, and similar platforms) to identify available freight loads

Negotiate freight rates with brokers via phone and

Assign loads to owner-operator drivers based on availability, location, and lane preferences

Communicate with drivers throughout the day on pickup, delivery status, scheduling, and route updates

Submit delivery documentation (Bills of Lading, Proof of Delivery) to brokers after delivery

Track broker payments and follow up on outstanding invoices

Maintain load tracking records and update QuickBooks Online

Coordinate driver onboarding paperwork for new independent contractor drivers

Monitor FMCSA compliance requirements and flag any issues to management





General Administrative Support (~15-20 hours/week)



 management and inbox triage across multiple business accounts

Screen and organize incoming business documents (financial reports, proposals, contracts)

Maintain tracking spreadsheets and CRM updates

Schedule and coordinate calls and meetings across US time zones

Prepare basic financial summaries and data entry from source documents

Research tasks as assigned (vendor pricing, market data, regulatory information)

Document filing and organization (Google Drive)

Light bookkeeping support (invoicing, AP/AR monitoring, bank reconciliation in QuickBooks)

Draft routine business correspondence and follow-up
s





Required Qualifications



Prior experience dispatching for a US-based trucking company or freight carrier (minimum 1 year)

Familiarity with US freight load boards (DAT, Truckstop, Amazon Relay, or similar)

Understanding of freight industry terminology (BOL, POD, MC number, FMCSA, DOT, owner-operator, broker, lane, deadhead, etc.)

Proficiency in QuickBooks Online

Strong written and spoken English

Reliable high-speed internet connection and quiet work environment

Comfortable making phone calls to US-based brokers and drivers

Proficient in Google Workspace (Gmail, Sheets, Docs, Drive, Calendar)

Self-starter who can work independently with minimal daily supervision

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills





Preferred Qualifications (Not Required)



Experience with Amazon Relay platform

Experience dispatching owner-operator drivers (not just company drivers)

Familiarity with FMCSA safety regulations and compliance requirements

Spanish language proficiency (helpful but not required)

Prior experience supporting a US-based small business owner in a general VA capacity

title: Skool Community Video Coordinator
description:
We're looking for a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to manage our exercise video production workflow for our online fitness community platform. This role involves video editing, YouTube management, and course content integration for our JRTS Method Skool community.



Primary Responsibilities



Phase A: Video Editing and YouTube Upload

Download exercise demonstration videos from our shared Google Drive folder. Edit each video to begin when the coach starts speaking and end when speaking concludes, removing any dead air or setup time. Upload the edited video to our YouTube channel as an unlisted video. Use the exercise name stated at the beginning of each video as the YouTube title. No additional graphics, music, or embellishments are needed at this stage.



Phase B: Skool Course Integration (to be implemented later)

Once Phase A is established, you'll take the uploaded YouTube videos and embed them into the appropriate course lesson pages within our Skool community platform, linking them directly in the exercise description sections so members can access the videos from within their course material.



Required Skills



Video editing software proficiency (Adobe Premiere, DaVinci Resolve, CapCut, or equivalent). YouTube channel management experience. Attention to detail and ability to follow consistent formatting standards. Familiarity with Skool platform is a plus but not required.



What Success Looks Like



Fast turnaround on video editing. Consistent YouTube uploads with accurate exercise titles. Clear communication if you encounter any technical issues. Ready to scale this process as our video library grows.

How's that looking? Want me to adjust the tone or add anything specific?

description:

title: Affiliate Marketing and Social Media Manager
description:
About Trillix

Trillix is a fast-growing crypto gaming brand focused on international markets. We are building a high-performance acquisition engine across affiliates, social media, SEO, partnerships, and online communities. We are looking for our first key hire in the Philippines to help drive real user growth.



Role Summary

We need a highly resourceful, aggressive, and organized Growth & Affiliate Manager who knows how to find opportunities, build relationships, and bring in real traffic.



Your mission is simple:



Find people, platforms, and partners that can send depositing users to Trillix.



This is not a passive admin role. We want someone who can proactively reach out, negotiate deals, test campaigns, and grow traffic every week.



Key Responsibilities

1. Affiliate Recruitment & Management

Find and contact casino, sportsbook, crypto, and gambling affiliates worldwide



Recruit new affiliates through
,
, X, Discord, LinkedIn, forums, and direct outreach



Build and maintain affiliate relationships



Negotiate CPA / Rev Share deals



Track affiliate performance and optimize results



Create weekly reports on traffic, signups, deposits, and ROI



2. Partnership Outreach

Contact review sites, comparison sites, influencers, streamers, and industry contacts



Get Trillix listed on relevant casino review websites



Build partnerships with
 channel owners, YouTubers, and community admins



Find media placements and sponsorship opportunities



3. Social Media Growth

Manage Trillix pages on X, Instagram,
, Discord, TikTok, and other platforms



Create and schedule posts, promotions, campaigns, and engagement content



Run giveaways, bonus campaigns, and audience growth strategies



Reply to messages/comments and build community trust



4. SEO & Traffic Growth

Identify keywords and backlink opportunities



Contact websites for guest posts, listings, mentions, and backlinks



Coordinate blog content ideas and traffic campaigns



Help improve organic search presence in target markets



5. User Acquisition Focus

Constantly search for new traffic sources



Test communities, influencers, paid placements, and viral channels



Focus on quality users who deposit and stay active



Bring ideas, not excuses



Requirements

Must Have

Strong English communication skills



Excellent online research and outreach skills



Comfortable using
, Discord, X, Instagram,
, and Google tools



Experience in affiliate marketing, lead generation, partnerships, or digital growth



Self-starter mindset: can work independently without being micromanaged



Strong organization and follow-up skills



Big Plus

iGaming / casino / sportsbook experience



Crypto experience



SEO experience



Social media growth experience



Existing affiliate or influencer contacts



Experience with LATAM / Asia traffic markets



Personality We Want

Hungry



Fast



Street smart



Professional



Persistent



Results-driven



Creative problem solver



KPIs / Success Metrics

Number of new affiliates recruited



Number of active traffic partners



New depositing users acquired



CPA / ROI performance



Social media growth and engagement



SEO backlinks / listings secured



Weekly traffic growth



Compensation

Base salary (competitive for Philippines market)



Performance bonuses



Long-term growth opportunity with an international brand



Work Setup

Remote



Full-time 



Flexible hours, results-based culture



How to Apply

Send:



Resume / background



Relevant experience



Any results you’ve achieved (traffic, affiliates, growth, social media, SEO, etc.)



Why you are a good fit for Trillix



Final Note

We are not looking for someone to “manage tasks.”



We are looking for someone who can help build a real growth engine and bring users consistently.

title: US Real Estate Appraiser (Remote)
description:
Overview

We’re looking for a detail-oriented Remote US Real Estate Appraiser to support property valuation and reporting for a fast-paced real estate operation. This role focuses on analyzing residential and/or commercial properties, conducting market research, and preparing accurate appraisal reports that meet US regulatory standards. You will be responsible for evaluating property values using comparable sales, market trends, and industry tools, while ensuring compliance with appraisal guidelines and client requirements.

The ideal candidate is highly analytical, organized, and comfortable working with data, reports, and valuation software. You should be able to manage multiple appraisal assignments, communicate findings clearly, and maintain accuracy under deadlines. Strong attention to detail and knowledge of US real estate markets are essential for success in this role.

Key Responsibilities:

Conduct property valuations using comparable sales (comps), market data, and appraisal methodologies

Prepare detailed appraisal reports in compliance with USPAP standards

Analyze market trends, neighborhood data, and property conditions

Utilize appraisal and real estate software to support accurate valuations

Communicate findings with clients, lenders, and internal teams

Maintain organized documentation and records for each appraisal

Ensure turnaround times and quality standards are consistently met

Required Skills & Qualifications:

Experience in US real estate appraisal or property valuation

Strong analytical and research skills

Familiarity with US housing markets and valuation methods

Excellent written and verbal communication skills

High attention to detail and accuracy

Ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines in a remote setting

Preferred Tools & Software:

Appraisal platforms such as TOTAL by a la mode or Appraise-It Pro

MLS (Multiple Listing Service) systems for comps and market data

Property data tools like CoreLogic, Zillow, or Redfin

GIS or mapping tools for property analysis

Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets for data tracking and reporting

title: CapCut Android editor
description:
**Job Title:** CapCut (Android) Tutor & Long-Term Video Editor



**Job Description:**

I am looking for an experienced editor to provide a series of 1-on-1 coaching sessions conducted via video call. I am developing a character-based brand and need a patient teacher to help me master the Android version of CapCut.



I would like to book an initial block of four coaching sessions, with the long-term goal of having a reliable expert I can consult for help on future projects as the brand grows.



During our sessions, we will focus on:

* **Timeline Management:** Handling high-quality static images and duration.

* **Audio Branding:** Sourcing and precisely timing background music.

* **Voiceover Work:** Using "Text to Speech" tools and adjusting speed and tone.

* **Visual Polish:** Applying subtle movement and transitions to static scenes.

* **Efficiency:** Setting up workflow templates for consistent content production.



Please let me know your experience with the Android app and your availability for a multi-session coaching arrangement. I am looking for a teacher who is patient with beginners.

Write clear, keyword-based titles (based on Etsy listings)

 (support channel)

Marketplace listings

Engagement

~15 minutes per day:

reply to comments and DMs, if the come 

interact with relevant profiles

title: Mail Customer Support Specialist — Shopify Health Brand (Long-Term, Remote)
description:
## About Rekuria



Rekuria is a fast-growing premium health & wellness brand in the DACH market (Germany, Austria, Switzerland). Our flagship product — **Neckify**, an electronic neck massage device — helps thousands of people relieve neck pain naturally, without medication.



Our mission: **free people from chronic neck pain through natural, medication-free self-care.**



We're building a long-term health brand with a strong community, high customer LTV, and a voice customers genuinely trust. That's where **you** come in.



---



## The Role: You Become "Rebecca"



You won't just answer tickets. You'll **become the voice of Rebecca** — Rekuria's dedicated customer care persona. Rebecca is:



- **Medically informed** — speaks with authority about pain and natural relief

- **Warm & empathetic** — customers feel safe and in good hands

- **Educational** — empowers people to take action for themselves

- **Fact-based & compliant** — never over-promises, never makes illegal health claims

- **Alternative-minded** — champion of natural, medication-free relief



We'll give you a full Brand Voice Guide, example responses, SOPs, and direct coaching so you can step into Rebecca's voice quickly and confidently.



---



## Your Mission — Measured by 4 KPIs



1. **Near-zero return rate** — solve problems before they become returns

2. **Near-zero chargeback rate** — spot escalations early, de-escalate fast

3. **High 5-star review volume** — customers review us because they want to

4. **Low ticket volume relative to orders** — build automations, FAQs, and flows that prevent tickets



If you only "answer tickets," you're not the right fit. If you want to **build a customer experience system**, you are.



---



## What You'll Do



- Handle conversations across *
 (Gorgias), Instagram DMs, TikTok DMs, Meta/Facebook, WhatsApp**

- Write in Rebecca's voice: medical, professional, warm, empowering

- Proactively prevent returns and chargebacks

- Build and maintain **SOPs, macros, FAQs, and Klaviyo post-purchase flows**

- Solicit UGC and 5-star reviews at the right 
nts

- Stay compliant with **German health advertising law (HWG), Medical Device Regulation (MDR/MPG), and Meta/Google health policies**

- Document in Notion, record Loom walkthroughs, use Claude and AI tools to work smarter

- Weekly KPI report with improvement proposals



---



## Must-Haves



- **3+ years** E-Commerce customer support experience for Shopify brands

- **Direct experience in Health / Wellness / Medical Device niche** — you understand compliance and what can/cannot be said in health marketing

- **Strong written German** — either native/near-native OR C1+ combined with confident use of DeepL/Claude/AI tools, with proven ability to produce polished German customer communication

- Hands-on experience with **Gorgias, Shopify, and Klaviyo**

- Familiar with **HWG, MPG/MDR, and health ad policies on Meta + Google** (or proven track record of quickly mastering compliance frameworks)

- Comfortable with **Loom, Notion, Zoom, Claude, and modern AI tools**

- Strong writer — can shift tone from clinical to warm in one sentence

- Self-starter — you don't wait to be told what to do

- Stable internet, quiet workspace, reliable hours



## Nice-to-Haves



- Experience preventing chargebacks (Stripe / PayPal disputes)

- Copywriting or UGC-solicitation background

- Team lead experience (you'll onboard a second CS hire within 6–12 months as we grow)



---



## Work Setup



- **Hours:** ~20 hours/week to start (flexible schedule covering DACH business hours)

- **Growth path:** Scales to full-time within 3–6 months based on performance

- **Location:** 100% remote

- **Compensation:** $8–$15/hr to start (negotiable based on experience), growing to $15–$20/hr at full-time

- **Long-term:** We want a multi-year partnership, not a short-term hire. As Rekuria grows, you grow with us — more hours, higher pay, leadership opportunities



---



## How to Apply



Applications that don't follow these steps will be ignored. We're hiring one excellent person, not screening 200 generic applicants.



**Step 1:** Start your application with the word **NECKIFY** on the first line. This is how we know you read the entire post.



**Step 2:** Answer these 3 questions (short, direct, no fluff):



1. Which German/DACH e-commerce brand(s) have you worked for? How long, and what niche?

2. Give one specific example of how you prevented a return or chargeback. Walk us through the situation and what you said.

3. Which tools from our stack have you actively used (not just heard of): Gorgias, Shopify, Klaviyo, Notion, Loom, Claude?



**Step 3:** Record a **30–60 second Loom video** introducing yourself (in English or German, your choice). We want to see your communication style, not your studio lighting.



**Step 4 — German Scenario Test:**



*Dieser Teil ist auf Deutsch — bitte auf Deutsch beantworten.*



**Szenario:** Eine Kundin schreibt nach 3 Tagen: *"Das Gerät hilft nicht, ich habe immer noch Schmerzen. Ich will mein Geld zurück."*



**Aufgabe:** Schreibe in 3–5 Sätzen, wie Rebecca diese Nachricht beantworten würde. Du darfst DeepL, Claude oder andere Tools nutzen — wir wollen sehen, wie dein finales Ergebnis klingt.



---



## What Happens Next



1. We review applications and shortlist the top 3–5 candidates

2. 30-minute paid video interview (Zoom) with the founder

3. Paid trial task: Handle 5 real customer tickets in Rebecca's voice — paid regardless of outcome

4. Offer to the best fit — long-term partnership, clear growth path



---



**We're building something that genuinely helps people live pain-free lives. If that mission resonates with you, and you have the skills above, we want to hear from you.**



— Rekuria

title: AI Product Image Creator (Part-Time)
description:
We are a fast-growing women's fashion brand with 1,000+ products on Shopify. We are looking for a creative and technically skilled individual to improve and expand our product image library using AI image generation tools.



You'll take existing product images from our Shopify store and use AI tools to create enhanced, additional and lifestyle-style images that better showcase our products.



This is not a photography role. It is an AI-assisted creative role that sits at the intersection of fashion styling, visual merchandising and emerging AI image technology.



What You'll Do:

- Review existing product images across our Shopify catalogue

- Use AI image generation tools (such as Midjourney, Adobe Firefly, Stable Diffusion or similar) to create new and improved product images

- Generate lifestyle shots showing products styled and worn in context — replacing plain studio shots where possible

- Ensure all generated images accurately represent the product — correct colour, fabric appearance, silhouette and styling details

- Create multiple angles and styled views where only one image currently exists

- Replace any AI-generated placeholder images that don't accurately represent the product (we currently have some of these and they need urgent attention)

- Upload completed images to the correct product in Shopify and ensure they are ordered correctly



What Good Output Looks Like:

A product that currently has 2-3 plain flat-lay images should end up with 6–8 images including front view, back view, close-up detail shot, and at least one lifestyle/styled shot showing the garment worn in a realistic setting.

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Per Project Basis)
description:
I film short-form social media content for local businesses and need a reliable editor I can send batches of footage to as projects come in.



This is per-project work, not a salaried or full-time role. Work is paid per batch delivered. No guaranteed hours, no minimum commitment. When I have a client project, I'll send you the footage and we'll agree on the batch price upfront.



What You'll Do:

Edit batches of 20 short-form vertical videos from raw iPhone talking-head footage. Each video needs:

- Clean cuts removing filler and dead space

- Animated captions

- Text hooks overlaid in the first 2 seconds

- Relevant B-roll from free stock libraries (Pexels, Pixabay, Mixkit) layered over talking points

- Background music at low volume

- Export in 9:16 vertical, 1080p minimum

description:

We are looking for someone who can create a beautiful, cohesive Instagram page using our theme colours, while also managing both Instagram and TikTok consistently. The role includes creating high-quality posts and reels, writing captions, and maintaining a clean, premium aesthetic that reflects a luxury spa feel.



You will be responsible for posting 3–5 times per week on Instagram and TikTok, as well as posting daily Instagram stories. This includes content creation, basic video editing, and keeping the page active and engaging.



We need someone with a strong eye for design, experience using tools like Canva or CapCut, and confidence in managing social media accounts. Experience within beauty, skincare, or spa-related content is preferred, along with an understanding of how to create content relevant to women of colour.



This is an ongoing role, and we are looking for someone reliable who can grow with the business and take ownership of the social media presence over time.

title: Lead Generation
description:
We’re looking for a detail-obsessed Virtual Assistant to support our growth by "building high-quality lead lists" of "business owners and high-level executives" across USA and EMEA. 

 

This role is research + list-building only (no outreach required). You’ll help us identify the right people, verify data quality, and keep our lead database clean and usable.



Key Responsibilities  

- Research and identify qualified prospects based on an ICP we provide (industry, role, company size, geography, etc.)

- Build lead lists with accurate contact + company information

- Verify and enrich lead data (role accuracy, company details, LinkedIn URL, website, location, etc.)

- Maintain clean formatting and consistent fields in our lead tracker/CRM

- Flag patterns/insights (e.g., which titles or industries are easiest to source, data gaps, duplicates)

- Follow a repeatable process and document it so the system scales



Weekly Deliverables / KPIs  

- 100 qualified leads per week (USA + EMEA)  

- Accuracy target: minimal bounce/incorrect-role entries (we’ll define the exact threshold after week 1)  

- Consistent completion of required fields (no partial records unless explicitly allowed)



What a “Qualified Lead” Means (we provide the rules)  

We will provide the ICP and qualification rules. Your job is to execute precisely and ask smart questions when something is unclear.



Required Skills & Experience  

- Native or near-native English (written comprehension is critical)

- Proven experience with lead generation research / list building (B2B)

- Strong ability to navigate ambiguity and still produce clean output

- High attention to detail (titles, spelling, URLs, duplicates, formatting)

- Comfortable working independently and asynchronously

- Strong internet research skills and good judgment about source credibility



Tools (you can propose)  

You can propose the best stack for list-building and enrichment. Examples:  

- LinkedIn / Sales Navigator, Apollo, Clay, Crunchbase, Google research, company websites  

- Airtable / Google Sheets  

- Any enrichment/verification workflow you recommend



Working Style  

- Async is OK (no required overlap with Europe/Paris time)  

- Clear written updates and predictable delivery cadence



Nice-to-Haves  

- Experience targeting executives (Founder/Owner, C-level, VP) in US/EMEA markets  

- Familiarity with CRMs and data hygiene best practices  

- Basic understanding of B2B buying roles and org structures



Screening / Test Task (Paid)  

Shortlisted candidates will complete a paid test:  

- Build a sample list of **20 leads** from a defined ICP  

- We’ll evaluate: accuracy, completeness, speed, and how well you follow instructions



How to Apply  

Please send:  

- A short note on your lead gen/list-building experience (what you built, for whom, and your weekly volumes)  

- The tools you prefer and why  

- 1 example of a lead list you’ve produced (redact sensitive info)  

- Your availability and expected hourly rate or monthly retainer

title: Basketball footage data labeling
description:
We're building an AI system that detects made baskets in basketball game footage. We need 2-3 freelancers to help create training data for our computer vision model.



THE WORK (two parts):



Part 1 — Find footage (~3-4 hours)

Find and download 5-7 amateur basketball game videos from YouTube. We need rec league, pickup, and high school games — NOT NBA broadcasts. Stationary camera, full court visible, phone-recorded quality. We need variety: different gyms, outdoor courts, lighting, camera angles.



Upload the videos to our Roboflow project. Roboflow splits them into frames automatically:



  Part 2 — Label frames (~8-10 hours)

  Draw bounding boxes around two objects in each frame:

  • Ball — the basketball

  • Hoop — the rim/ring only (NOT the backboard)



We provide a detailed annotation guide with visual examples, edge cases, and a quality checklist. The tool is Roboflow (browser-based, no software to install).



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

  • Experience with image annotation / data labeling (Roboflow, CVAT, Labelbox, or similar)

  • Attention to detail — tight bounding boxes, correct class labels

  • Reliable availability for ~12-14 hours over 1 week

  • Comfortable following written instructions precisely



  HOW TO APPLY:

  • Mention any data labeling experience (tools used, types of projects)

  • Confirm you can complete ~12-14 hours within 1 week



We start with a paid 20-frame test batch to verify quality before the full project.

title: Remote Chat Sales Representative | Base + Performance Pay
description:
Most remote chat jobs are customer support. This one isn't. We're looking for a sharp, hungry, fast-thinking person to manage live text-based sales conversations on behalf of our clients. No calls. No video. Just strong writing, good judgment, and the ability to move conversations toward a sale naturally.



This is a real sales role. Not customer support. Not a VA job. You are part of a revenue-focused team and your results will directly affect what you earn.



What you'll actually be doing:

Managing one-on-one text conversations with customers and prospects. Your job is to build genuine rapport, keep engagement high, spot opportunities, and guide conversations toward purchases without sounding pushy, scripted, or robotic.



You need to read conversations well, know when to move them forward and when to slow down, handle objections without losing 
ntum, and re-engage customers who have gone cold.



Don't apply if:

- You fall apart the 
nt a conversation goes off-script

- You're looking for a passive role where you just reply and coast

- You need constant supervision to stay productive

- You take feedback personally instead of improving fast



Apply only if:



- You're highly fluent in English. Your written English must be natural, sharp, and persuasive

- You can read subtext — you understand what someone means, not just what they say

- You know when to advance a conversation and when to slow down

- You are motivated by performance and want your results to affect what you earn

- You handle objections smoothly without killing the thread

- You're reliable, coachable, and take initiative

- You spot opportunity in a conversation and act on it



What winning looks like here:

- Customers stay engaged because talking to you feels real

- Purchases happen because you set them up properly

- You notice when there is more opportunity in a conversation and go after it

- You take feedback, improve fast, and keep getting better



Pay:

- Hourly base plus performance-based pay from day one. Strong performers move into higher commission structures over time, and top performers earn well above the base. Compensation scales directly with results.



Requirements:

- Reliable computer and stable internet

- Full-time availability

- Strong written English is non-negotiable

- Background in sales, BPO sales, appointment setting, retention, or customer-facing communication is a strong advantage



To apply: 

No generic resume needed.



Please submit your application through the platform. Include your
 handle at the top of your message, as we use it for real-time communication and shift coordination.



Also, please answer these two questions:



Tell us about a time you got someone to spend more than they originally planned. What did you do and why did it work?



What is your go-to method for building trust with someone quickly over text?



Vague or generic answers tell us everything we need to know.

title: Ecom Video Editor Specialist - Scale to 6-7 Figures
description:
Video Editor for Ecommerce Dropshipping (Meta Ads Specialist)

Are YOU an experienced video editor specializing in Meta Ads for physical products and dropshipping? Can you look at a competitor’s winning ad and immediately understand how to replicate it technically, or transform a script into a winning creative using the most advanced AI tools? If you answered an enthusiastic “YES” to both questions above, KEEP READING.



We run multiple international companies in the ecommerce and education space and we’re looking for a Video Editor (Meta Ads Specialist) to join our creative team.

We need someone to take responsibility for:

- Sales-Focused Ad Production: Crafting clean, high-conversion ads (1 to 5 minutes) including Mini-VSLs, AI-UGC, and "Product in Hand" content.

- Asset Management & Sourcing: You will be provided with a folder of our selected B-rolls. However, if additional clips are needed, you must source them autonomously and innovatively. The use of traditional stock footage (Shutterstock, Envato, etc.) is strictly FORBIDDEN.

- From Script to Finished Product: We provide the scripts; your job is to interpret them visually, choosing the right clips and editing them to create a dynamic, persuasive, and technically flawless product.

- AI Tool Research & Implementation: This is your passion. You must stay constantly updated on new AI releases (editing, UGC avatars, video generation). In our weekly calls, we expect you to pitch new software that can revolutionize our workflow.

- AI Asset Generation: Hands-on use of the AI Stack (Higgsfield, Sora 2, Veo 3, Arcads, MakeUGC) to create or enhance content.

- Visual Optimization: Implementing textual hooks, kinetic typography, and scroll-stopping subtitles.



Position Requirements:

- At least 2 years of specific experience: A solid background in Meta Ads for ecommerce brands. You must have worked as an editor for brands generating at least $10k/month in revenue. While respecting privacy, you will be asked to provide examples of these collaborations in the following stages.

- Deep Passion for Innovation: This isn't just a job; you must love technology. We want an AI "killer" who stays ahead of the market.

- Excellent Problem-Solving Skills: If instructions aren't crystal clear or assets are missing, you don't stop. You find a solution and complete the task with excellence.

- Availability & Commitment: Starting with a part-time collaboration (20h/week) with a clear intention of moving to Full-Time shortly. We work 5 days a week, but availability on Saturdays and Sundays is required for emergencies. Please note: we are looking for a dedicated partner, not an "Upwork or Fiverr style" freelancer juggling 5-6 different companies. If you cannot guarantee us top priority and absolute mental focus, do not apply.

- Obsessive Precision & Anti-Mediocrity: Subtitles, cuts, and details must be perfect. Mediocrity is not allowed in our team.

- Fluent in English: The team communicates in English. Deep proficiency is mandatory to manage multilingual content (IT, FR, ES, DE, NL).



What We Offer:

- Performance Bonuses: Potential for bonuses up to $1000+ per month based on the results of the videos produced.

- Career Growth: A real opportunity to become Head of Video Editing.

- Active Involvement: You will actively participate in the growth of an international company, testing the most powerful AI tools on the market.
salary: To be discussed based on experience
