title: Outreach & Link Building Specialist (20 hrs/week | Flexible | Long-term)
description:
Outreach & Link Building Specialist (20 hrs/week | Flexible | Long-term)



We’re hiring an experienced Outreach & Link Building Specialist to help us grow authority and rankings through high-quality, white-hat backlinks and brand mentions.



This is a long-term, flexible role averaging ~20 hours per week. You can work your own hours, but you must consistently deliver outputs and communicate progress.



About Us



We operate in a specialised niche with strong relevance to industry training / education / compliance (including construction and safety-related topics, depending on campaign focus). Our goal is to build sustainable authority through meaningful placements—not spammy link schemes.





---



What You’ll Do



You will own and execute outreach campaigns targeting relevant:



Bloggers and content creators



Industry publications and media outlets



Resource pages and training/education sites



Local and national business directories



Associations, community organisations, and sponsorship opportunities





Your responsibilities will include:



Researching and qualifying link opportunities based on relevance, quality, and traffic



Building outreach lists and finding the right contacts



Writing and sending high-converting outreach
s



Negotiating placements and managing follow-ups



Creating or coordinating content when required:



Guest posts



Resource blurbs



Directory descriptions



Short niche articles





Reclaiming unlinked mentions



Replicating competitor link wins ethically



Tracking outreach and outcomes in a shared spreadsheet/CRM



Providing weekly updates on progress and pipeline







---



What We’re Looking For (Must-Have)



3+ years proven experience in link building and outreach



Proof of campaigns you’ve worked on (case studies, screenshots, reports, live links)



Strong understanding of white-hat SEO and Google link quality principles



Excellent written English with a confident, professional outreach tone



Ability to assess link quality beyond vanity metrics



Organized, consistent, and outcome-focused







---



Nice-to-Have



Experience in education, construction, trades, WHS, or compliance niches



Digital PR experience



Familiarity with tools like Ahrefs, SEMrush, BuzzStream, Pitchbox, Hunter, etc.



Ability to suggest content angles that earn links naturally







---



What Success Looks Like



We care about quality and relevance first. Success will be measured by:



Consistent acquisition of high-quality, niche-relevant backlinks



Clean, natural anchor text profiles



Strong outreach-to-placement conversion rates



Clear reporting and a well-managed pipeline



Growth in brand mentions and referral traffic over time







---



Important Notes



We are not looking for:



PBN links



Spam directory blasts



Low-quality link packages



Irrelevant overseas sites with poor editorial standards





We want sustainable, brand-safe growth.





---



How to Apply



Please include:



1. A short summary of your outreach/link building experience





2. 2–3 examples of campaigns you worked on with outcomes



Live links, screenshots, or anonymised reports are fine







3. Your preferred working style (hourly vs retainer)





4. Your estimated monthly link output range for a niche campaign





5. Tools you typically use









---



Role Details



Hours: ~20 hours/week



Schedule: Flexible, you choose your working times



Type: Long-term contract with potential to expand



Start: ASAP







---



If you’re an outreach specialist who can build real links on real sites—and can prove it—we’d love to hear from you.

title: Video Editor — YouTube & Social Media
description:
Why You Should Apply: This is a long-term role on a growing media team that values craft, gives you real creative ownership, and equips you with the tools to do your best work. If you care about the quality of what you produce and want to grow with a company that notices that, this is the role.



About Us

LeanScaper is the category leader in landscape industry thought leadership. We help landscape business owners build companies that work without them — through education, community, and AI-powered tools. Our media team produces YouTube content (Q&As, Podcasts, Intensives), Instagram Reels, ads, and special projects for a growing audience of landscape CEOs and operators. We are a remote-first team with Filipino editors at the core of our content factory. This is a long-term role, not a one-off project.



The Role

We’re looking for a Video Editor who can work across both long-form YouTube content and short-form social media. You’ll edit podcasts, Q&As, Reels, kinetic text ads, promos, and special projects. You won’t be doing all of these at once — you’ll be assigned to specific formats and projects at a time, with the flexibility to move across them as needed.

We’re not looking for someone who just knows the mechanics. We need someone with creative vision — the ability to look at raw footage and see what the finished piece could become. Vision, taste, and judgment matter more than flashy effects.



What You’ll Do

Edit long-form content: podcasts (~60 min), Intensives (~30–35 min), Q&As (~3–10 min)



Edit short-form content: Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts — both repurposed clips and original builds (promos, kinetic text, scripted social)



Build hooks — the first 3 seconds of every piece of content are your responsibility



Handle all audio design: music selection, sound effects, mixing, and cleanup



Source your own B-roll from the internal library and in-house footage



Follow packaging playbooks for titles, descriptions, SEO tags, and quality checklists



Update the Production Tracker same-day when status changes



Deliver publish-ready assets on time, within rate card hours, and to standard on first review



You will be assigned one or two formats at a time. The full list above represents the range of content you may work on over time — not your daily workload.



What We’re Looking For

Must have: Strong English comprehension — you must fully understand the spoken content you’re editing

Creative vision — you can see what a piece could become before you start cutting

Editing range across long, medium, and short-form content

Audio design skills — music, SFX, mixing, cleanup

Personal subscriptions to Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects — these are required and must be active before you start

Portfolio showing technical polish, not just raw pacing

At least one short-form vertical example in your portfolio

Gets our attention:

Experience editing for a creator or brand YouTube channel

Can explain what makes a good hook

Willingness to work with AI tools (we use ChatGPT and Claude)

Experience with video research and B-roll sourcing

Nice to have:

Familiarity with AI generation tools in Envato or FigmaWeave

Experience with Notion and 



How We Work

Weekly check-ins via Slack to verify workload

You own your queue between check-ins — self-managing, not micromanaged

Flag blockers within 24 hours — don’t sit on problems

If you’re blocked, pivot to the next item in the lineup — there’s always work to pull

Respond to leadership on Slack within an hour during working hours

Revisions turned around within 24 hours

80%+ of your assets should pass first review with minor or no revisions

Expect frequent feedback in the first 60 days as you learn our standards



Working Expectations

Full-time contractor role, 40 hours/week

Work in your local time, but maintain a consistent schedule with a minimum of 2 hours daily overlap with PST

Attend one weekly all-media tea
eting (1 hour, during PST office hours) and one weekly 1:1 with your lead (30 minutes)

Slack is the primary communication tool — used very often, daily



Values — Who Thrives Here

You care about the work. You do a second preview before submitting — catching typos, checking audio levels. Not overworking. Just being thorough with the time you have.

You take pride in what you produce. You don’t ship work you’d be embarrassed to show.

You pursue excellence. Substandard work is not something you can live with.

You take the opportunity. LeanScaper is open to equipping you with the tools you need. Take that and push as far as you can go.

title: Edutainment Video Editor

title: B2B Appointment Setter — Cold Calling US Small Businesses (Evening PH Hours)
description:
IMPORTANT: Make the subject line of your application exactly:

"CLE Appointment Setter — [Your Name]"

Applications without this subject line will not be reviewed.



---



Clear Local Edge is a US-based digital marketing agency helping small service businesses in Southwest Florida get more customers through Google. We need an appointment setter to call prospects from our pre-qualified lead list, follow our scripts, and book discovery calls on our calendar.



THE JOB:

- Call 30-40 small business owners per day from our provided lead list

- Follow our proven sales scripts (you will NOT need to "sell" — just qualify and book)

- Book interested prospects on 
 for a 30-min strategy call with our team

- Log every call outcome in a shared tracking sheet with notes and status

- Light
 follow-up and reply handling

- Eventually manage client accounts in our white-label marketing platform (training provided)



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

- Clear, neutral English — US business owners must understand you on the first try

- Confident phone presence (script provided, but you must sound natural, not robotic)

- Prior B2B cold calling or appointment setting experience (required)

- Comfortable being told "no" 20+ times a day and still picking up the phone

- Familiar with Google Workspace and basic spreadsheet work (we will train on the rest)



HOURS:

- 9:00 PM to 2:00 AM Manila time (= 9 AM to 2 PM US Eastern — Florida business hours)

- Start at 20 hours/week, ramping to 40 hours/week within 4-6 weeks based on performance

- Monday through Friday



COMPENSATION:

- $6/hour USD base, paid weekly

- Performance bonus: $15 per qualified appointment that shows up

- Raises after 30 days based on booking rate and call quality



TO APPLY — THREE THINGS REQUIRED:



1. VOICE RECORDING (most important — do this first):

Record a 60-second audio or simple cell phone video of yourself doing BOTH of these:

   a) Introduce yourself — who you are, your cold calling experience, why you want this role (30 seconds)

   b) Read this script as if you were calling a real business owner:

   "Hi, this is [your name] calling from Clear Local Edge. I'm reaching out because I took a look at your Google Business Profile and I noticed a few things that might be costing you customers. We help local service businesses in Southwest Florida show up higher on Google when people search for what you do. I'd love to set up a quick 15-minute call with our team to walk you through what we found — completely free and no obligation. Would sometime this week work for you?"

   We will know within 15 seconds if your English and phone presence are a fit. Do not skip this step.



2. DISC PROFILE:

Include your DISC personality test results in your application. If you haven't taken the DISC test on OnlineJobs.ph, please take it before applying. Just tell us your results (e.g., "My DISC is D: 45, I: 30, S: 15, C: 10").



3. BRIEF INTRO:

In 3-5 sentences, tell us about your most recent cold calling or appointment setting role — who you called, what you were booking, and roughly how many calls you made per day.



Applications missing any of these three items will not be reviewed. Serious applicants only — if you have not done outbound B2B calling before, please do not apply. We will train on our tools but cannot train the phone skill itself.

title: Product Research & Market Analyst (Helium10, Keepa, Junglescout)
description:
About Us

We're a pan-Asian sourcing consultancy connecting Western clinics and brands with manufacturers across China, Korea, Japan, and the Philippines. We specialize in professional skincare, cosmetics, and wellness products.



We're expanding into three parallel channels:



Distribution — brands are approaching us to distribute their products in Western markets

White Label — sourcing existing formulations from Asian manufacturers and branding for our clients

Custom Formulation — working with OEM/ODM manufacturers to develop proprietary products



We need someone who can identify which products are worth pursuing across all three channels.



The Role

You'll be our product intelligence engine — researching market demand, analyzing competitive landscapes, and producing actionable recommendations on which products to distribute, white label, or develop.

This is NOT a PPC or advertising role. This is research, analysis, and opportunity identification.



Core Responsibilities

Amazon & Marketplace Analysis



*Identify winning and trending products in skincare, beauty, and wellness categories using tools like Helium 10, Jungle Scout, or Keepa

*Analyze Best Seller Rank (BSR), revenue estimates, review velocity, and pricing trends

*Identify gaps and underserved niches (high demand + low competition + weak listings)

*Track seasonal trends and emerging ingredient/product trends (e.g., peptide serums, EMS devices, LED masks)



Distribution Evaluation



When brands approach us for distribution, assess their product-market fit for Western markets (US, Australia, Singapore, UAE)

Evaluate brand strength, existing Amazon presence, pricing positioning, and competitive landscape

Produce a GO / NO-GO recommendation with supporting data



White Label & Custom Formulation Opportunity Assessment



Identify product categories where white label or custom formulation offers better margins than distribution

Estimate landed cost vs. market price to model margin potential

Research existing OEM/ODM capabilities from our supplier network (China, Korea, Japan, Philippines)

Flag formulation trends worth developing (e.g., "glass skin" serums, exosome skincare, cica products)



Competitive Intelligence



Monitor competitor brands, new product launches, and pricing shifts

Track Amazon algorithm changes, category trends, and review patterns

Build and maintain a product opportunity pipeline with scoring/ranking





What You'll Deliver (Weekly)



Product Opportunity Report — 3-5 vetted product opportunities ranked by potential, with data backing each recommendation

Brand Evaluation Briefs — When brands approach us, a 1-page assessment with GO/NO-GO recommendation

Trend Alerts — Quick flags on emerging ingredients, viral products, or category shifts worth watching

Competitive Snapshots — Monthly overview of competitor movements in our key categories





Required Skills & Experience

Must Have:



2+ years experience in Amazon product research or e-commerce market analysis

Proficiency with product research tools (Helium 10, Jungle Scout, Keepa, or similar)

Understanding of BSR, revenue estimation, keyword demand analysis, and review analysis

Ability to model basic unit economics (landed cost, margin, breakeven)

Strong written communication — you'll produce reports, not just spreadsheets

Self-directed and comfortable working asynchronously



Strong Preference:



Experience in beauty, skincare, cosmetics, or wellness product categories

Understanding of white label vs. private label vs. custom formulation business models

Familiarity with sourcing from Asia (China, Korea, Japan) — manufacturing costs, MOQs, lead times

Experience evaluating brands for distribution or retail partnerships

Knowledge of FDA cosmetic regulations or international cosmetic compliance (bonus, not required)



Tools You Should Know (some or all):



Helium 10 (Black Box, Cerebro, Magnet)

Jungle Scout or similar

Keepa / CamelCamelCamel

Google Sheets / Excel for data modeling

Amazon Brand Analytics (if you've had seller access)

------------------------

How to Apply

Please include:



A brief intro — who you are and why this role fits your experience

Tool experience — which product research tools you've used and for how long

A sample analysis — Pick any skincare or beauty product currently in Amazon's top 100 for its subcategory. In 3-5 bullet points, tell us:



What's the estimated monthly revenue?

Who are the top 3 competitors?

Is there a white label or private label opportunity here? Why or why not?

What would you recommend we do with this product (distribute, white label, skip)?





Availability — hours per week (time slots and approximate hours) and timez
Type: Part-time (potential to scale as needed)

Hours: 10-15 hrs/week to start, scaling to 20+



Location: Remote (any timezone, async-friendly)

Communication: Slack + weekly async check-in

Start: Immediate

title: E-Commerce Product & Content Specialist
description:
About the Company



We are a e-commerce startup focused on building a curated online marketplace that connects customers with high-quality products from independent and small businesses. Our mission is to make it easy to discover unique products that are not typically found through traditional retail channels.



Role Overview



We are looking for a detail-oriented and highly organized E-Commerce Product & Content Specialist to support product creation and catalog management on our platform. This role focuses on building high-quality product listings while also supporting light content creation that helps bring products and brands to life.



You will play a key role in onboarding new sellers by creating compelling product pages and supporting content that drives discovery, engagement, and conversion.



Key Responsibilities



Create and publish product listings within the CS-Cart platform

Write clear, engaging, and conversion-focused product descriptions

Structure product titles, bullet points, and descriptions for readability and SEO

Upload and organize product images to meet platform standards

Apply appropriate categories, tags, and filters for optimal product discovery

Ensure accuracy of product details including pricing, variants, and inventory

Maintain consistency in tone, formatting, and brand presentation across listings

Optimize existing listings to improve performance and clarity

Assist in creating product-focused social media content and captions

Collaborate with the team to refine product content and merchandising strategy



Requirements



Experience creating product listings for e-commerce platforms

Strong writing skills with the ability to adapt tone for different product types

High attention to detail and strong organizational skills

Ability to work independently and manage multiple products at once

Comfortable working in backend systems and learning new tools quickly



Preferred Qualifications



Experience with CS-Cart

Experience with platforms such as Shopify, WooCommerce, BigCommerce, or similar

Basic understanding of e-commerce SEO and product merchandising

Experience working with small brands, handmade products, or marketplace platforms



Bonus Skills (Nice to Have)



Ability to create social media content for products and brands

Experience writing captions, short-form product highlights, or promotional posts

Familiarity with platforms like Instagram, TikTok, or Pinterest

Basic visual content skills such as simple product graphics or short-form video editing



What Success Looks Like



Product listings are accurate, consistent, and visually clean

Descriptions clearly communicate value and help drive conversions

Products are easy to find through well-structured categories and filters

Social content supports product discovery without slowing down listing output

New sellers are onboarded quickly with minimal friction

title: Influencer Outreach VA — Instagram & TikTok
description:
Hi! We're Jobzy.ai, an AI-powered job finder and auto-application app. We're running an influencer campaign and need a reliable VA to help us reach out to micro-influencers on Instagram and TikTok.



This is a simple, repeatable role. If you're good at it, there's room to grow.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Source micro-influencers (10K–50K followers) on Instagram and TikTok in specific niches (career content, corporate humor, recent grads, layoff stories, tech careers, productivity).

- Vet each creator against a simple checklist (followers, engagement rate, niche fit, geo).

- Send short, casual DMs using a template we provide.

- Reply to responses within 12 hours using guidance we'll give you.

- Log everything in a shared Google Sheet (who you contacted, when, their response).

- Take screenshots of qualifying replies as proof.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

- Active Instagram and TikTok user (you understand how the platforms work)

- Excellent written English (casual tone, not formal)

- Reliable and consistent — we value steady daily output over bursts

- Comfortable with Google Sheets

- Attention to detail (following the vetting checklist matters)



NICE TO HAVE:

- Previous experience with influencer outreach, lead gen, or cold DMs

- Background in marketing or social media



WHAT WE PROVIDE:

- Full playbook (PDF) with DM templates, vetting criteria, and examples

- Shared tracker with everything pre-built

- Clear step-by-step process

- Direct access to me for questions



PAY:

- Hourly rate: $4/hour USD

- Performance bonus: $6 per qualified lead (a creator who explicitly agrees to a paid collab)

- Starts as a 2-week paid trial. If it's working, we continue long-term.



HOURS:

- 4 hours/day, 4 days/week to start

- Flexible on timezone - you choose your hours, as long as output is consistent



TO APPLY, PLEASE INCLUDE:

1. Start your application with the word "JOBZY" so I know you read this

2. A short paragraph about your relevant experience

3. Your Instagram handle (just so I can see you use the platform)

4. Your availability (hours/day, start date)

5. Confirm you're okay with the $4/hour rate and $6 per qualified lead bonus.

6. Share a 2–3 sentence example of a casual DM you'd send to a micro-influencer for a paid collab.



Look forward to hearing from you!

title: Marketing/Sales Manager for Youtube/insta/TikTok
description:
About StoryChat.app

StoryChat is an AI character chat and interactive storytelling platform with a fast-growing global subscriber base. We're hiring a Marketing Manager to own our paid acquisition, short-form video ads, and creator outreach across Meta, TikTok, and YouTube. You'll work directly with the founding team and see the impact of your campaigns in real time.

<What You'll Do:>



-Plan, launch, and optimize paid ad campaigns on
, Instagram, and YouTube

-Write ad copy designed to maximize CTR and conversion

-Produce short-form video ads for TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and Reels (CapCut or similar)

-Use AI image and video tools (e.g. Midjourney, Grok, Runway, Claude, Sora, ElevenLabs) to create ad creatives quickly

-Run outreach to YouTube creators — find them, message them, and manage partnership conversations

-Track campaign performance in Google Sheets / Excel and share weekly reports

-Join 3 quick daily stand-ups to stay aligned on priorities and blockers



Must-Haves:



-English proficiency test score taken within the last 5 years (include the score in your application — OnlineJobs.ph test or equivalent is fine)

-At least 1 year of hands-on experience running paid ads on
 / Instagram and/or YouTube

-Experience using AI tools for image or video creation

-Comfortable with Excel / Google Sheets and Google Drive

-Willingness to do direct outreach and cold-message creators

-Comfortable with short daily check-ins and async written updates



Nice-to-Haves:



-Strong copywriting skills with a track record of improving ad CTR

-TikTok or YouTube Shorts video marketing experience

-CapCut or other video editing proficiency

-Portfolio showing ad results (CTR, CPC, ROAS, or growth numbers)



Schedule:



Full-time, Monday to Friday

9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Manila time (8 working hours + 1 hour lunch)

3 quick daily stand-ups (~5–10 min each: start of day, mid-day, end of day)

100% remote / work from home



Compensation & Evaluation:



?6,000 per week (? ?26,000 / month), paid weekly

3-month evaluation period, then confirmed long-term full-time upon successful review



What "Successful Review" Looks Like (Month 3 Targets)

You'll be evaluated against clear, measurable KPIs — not vibes. Hitting most of these = full-time confirmation:



Paid ad CTR: Average ? 1.5% on
/Instagram feed ads and ? 0.8% on YouTube in-stream ads

Cost per new paid subscriber (CPA): Under $12 by end of month 3 (baseline improvement of 20%+ from first campaigns)

Creative output: At least 3 new short-form video ads shipped per week (~12/month)

Creator outreach: Minimum 40 creators contacted per month, with ? 3 active partnerships or collabs landed by month 3

Reporting cadence: On-time weekly performance report every Friday with no gaps

Communication: Present and responsive in all 3 daily stand-ups, proactive about flagging blockers



How to Apply

Please send all three of the following — applications missing any item will be skipped:



Your updated resume

Your English proficiency test score (test name, score, and date taken)

Portfolio or samples of ads you've worked on — screenshots, links, or performance numbers (CTR, CPC, ROAS if available)



Bonus (optional but recommended):



1)A 1–2 sentence note on the best-performing ad you've ever run and why you think it worked

2)Connect with me on LinkedIn and send a message here: 
/in/albertahn

title: landing page and automation
description:

2. Books consultations via Calendly

3. Sends a pre-consultation guide automatically

4. Sends a sequence of follow-up
s after the consultation

 CRM



The goal is to create a smooth, professional client journey while reducing manual admin.



---



## 1. Landing Page Setup



I need a clean, high-converting landing page that includes:



- Brief introduction to our garden design service

- Clear value proposition

- Images of past work (I will provide)

- Testimonials (I will provide)

The CTA button should link directly to my Calendly booking page.



---

- Connect Calendly to the landing page

- When a user books a consultation:

, phone, etc.)

 via Zapier



---



## 3.

Set up automation so that:



- Every new booking creates a new item in

- Name

-

- Updates in 
 can trigger or stop automations (if possible)

 (Touchpoint 1)



- Automatically sent immediately after booking

-
 includes a PDF guide (I will provide)

---



## 5. Post-Consultation
 Sequence (Touchpoints 2–4)



After the consultation takes place, I need an automated sequence:



### Trigger:

- Either based on consultation date/time passing OR

- Manual trigger from 
 (preferred if more reliable)



###
s:

- Touchpoint 2: Sent same day or next day after consultation

- Touchpoint 3: Sent 2–3 days later

- Touchpoint 4: Sent 5–7 days later



(I will provide all
 copy)



---



## 6. Smart Stop Conditions (Very Important)



The automation must STOP sending
s if:



- The client replies to any

- The client is marked as “Won” or “Proceeding” in 

- The client manually gets moved to another stage



This is critical to avoid sending unnecessary follow-ups.



---



## 7. Tools to Use



Current stack:

- 
 (CRM)

- Zapier (automation)

- Calendly (booking)

-
 system (open to recommendation – Gmail, ActiveCampaign, or similar)



I am open to the best setup, but it must be:

- Reliable

- Easy for my team to manage

- Not overly complex



---



## 8. Deliverables



- Fully working automation system

- All integrations tested

- Clear instructions or Loom video explaining how it works

- Ability for me to easily edit
s and triggers



---



## Goal



To create a seamless, automated client journey from enquiry ? consultation ? follow-up, while maintaining a high-end, personal feel.



---



Please outline:

title: Technical Project Manager
description:
Technical Project Manager (Design & Implementation – MSP)

Location: Philippines

Schedule: US Business Hours (Pacific Time required)

Reports To: Principal Analyst

Role Overview

We are hiring a Technical Project Manager (TPM) to lead IT infrastructure projects from design through implementation. This role combines project ownership, technical expertise, and design coordination (low voltage + construction). You will ensure technology is properly designed, coordinated with construction teams, and successfully deployed.

What You Will Own

1. Project Delivery

• Own projects end-to-end: design ? planning ? execution ? handoff

• Manage scope, timelines, and resources

• Track risks, dependencies, and budgets

• Ensure delivery on time, within scope, and within budget

2. Design & Construction Coordination

• Work with architects, general contractors, and low voltage vendors

• Review architectural plans and low voltage drawings

• Validate network layouts, rack placement, and cabling pathways

• Plan device placement (WiFi, cameras, POS, AV)

• Identify and resolve design issues early

3. Technical Oversight

• Validate networking, cloud, and security solutions

• Ensure designs are practical and executable

• Identify risks before implementation

4. Execution Support

• Assist with deployments, cutovers, and migrations

• Support troubleshooting and escalations

5. Client & Stakeholder Management

• Act as primary project contact

• Lead meetings and status updates

• Manage expectations and scope changes

6. Coordination & Handoff

• Align engineers, vendors, and contractors

• Maintain project and design documentation

• Ensure smooth transition to support teams

Technical Environment / Tools

MSP Tools

• Autotask (PSA)

• Auvik (network monitoring)

• N-able RMM (N-central), Addigy

• Meraki Systems Manager

• SentinelOne, Avanan, RocketCyber

• Cove Backup, AutoElevate

• IT Glue, PrinterLogic / PrinterCloud

Platforms & Technologies

• Microsoft 365 / Azure AD

• Windows Server (Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, Group Policy)

• Networking (VLANs, VPNs, firewalls, wireless)

• Endpoint management (Windows, macOS)

• Backup and disaster recovery

Requirements

Must Have

• 4+ years in IT project delivery (MSP or similar)

• Strong Windows Server and Microsoft 365 knowledge

• Networking fundamentals (VLANs, VPNs, firewalls)

• Experience with low voltage or construction coordination

• Ability to read floor plans and diagrams

• Strong English communication skills

• Experience managing multiple projects

Nice to Have

• Experience with Visio, AutoCAD, or similar tools

• Multi-site or construction project experience

• Familiarity with AV, surveillance, or access control

• Experience working US business hours

What We’re Looking For

• Ownership mindset

• Strong design and systems thinking

• Ability to identify issues early

• Comfort working across teams and clients

title: Part-Time Amazon Kindle Writer / eBook Creator (AI-Assisted | Work From Home)
description:
We’re hiring a fast, detail-oriented eBook Creator to produce and publish short Kindle books using AI tools and simple workflows.

This is a production-focused role ideal for someone who is efficient, follows systems well, and enjoys creating digital content at scale.

You will be fully trained with a step-by-step SOP, templates, and tools — your job is to execute consistently and hit daily targets.

What You’ll Do

• Create short Kindle eBooks using AI tools (ChatGPT + templates)

• Format and design simple book layouts using Canva

• Generate book covers (templates provided)

• Upload and publish books on Amazon KDP



Each book follows a simple system:

• Topic selection

• AI content generation

• Editing and proofreading

• Formatting

• Cover creation

• Upload to Amazon KDP

You’ll receive:

• Copy-paste prompts

• Predefined book topics (100+ provided)

• Keyword strategy guide

• Daily checklist + tracker

Requirements

• Strong written English (very important)

• High attention to detail and ability to follow instructions exactly

Nice to Have

• Experience with Amazon KDP or eBook publishing

• Basic design skills (Canva)

• Familiarity with AI tools

Tools You’ll Use

• ChatGPT (content creation)

• Canva (formatting + covers)

• Amazon KDP (publishing)

• Grammarly (editing)

• Google Sheets (tracking)

(Most tools are free or provided)

Reporting & Performance

• Daily reporting required (template provided)

• Output and quality are both tracked

• Clear guidelines provided for avoiding KDP rejections

Compensation

• Part-time role (flexible hours)

• Performance-based structure (discussed during interview)

• Opportunity for long-term work and increased responsibility

Who This Role is For

This role suits someone who:

• Likes structured, repeatable work

• Is productive and output-driven

• Wants a stable remote role with clear expectations

• Is comfortable using AI tools to work efficiently

If you can follow systems, work fast, and stay consistent — you’ll do very well in this role.

Apply now and include the word “KDP” in your application to be considered.

title: HR Admin / Recruiter | Part-Time | Work From Home
description:
Vhire is looking for a reliable and detail-oriented **HR Admin / Recruiter** to support our growing recruitment team.



This role is ideal for someone who is organised, proactive, and comfortable managing candidate pipelines, interviews, and recruitment admin tasks. You’ll work closely with the Team Manager / Lead BDM to keep the hiring process moving smoothly while they focus on sales and business development.



### Role Overview



You will be responsible for managing the candidate pipeline, coordinating interviews, and supporting day-to-day recruitment operations. This is a part-time remote role suited to someone with prior recruitment coordination or HR admin experience who enjoys structured work and communicating with candidates.



### Key Responsibilities



- Manage candidate applications and keep the pipeline organised.

- Screen candidates by phone or message as needed.

- Schedule interviews and coordinate calendars.

- Communicate with candidates throughout the hiring process.

- Update ATS or recruitment tracking systems accurately.

- Assist with sourcing candidates from job boards and LinkedIn when required.

- Support general HR and recruitment admin tasks.



### Requirements



- 2+ years of experience in recruitment coordination, HR admin, or a similar role.

- Experience using an ATS platform.

- Prior phone screening experience.

- Strong written and verbal English communication skills.

- Excellent organisation and attention to detail.

- Comfortable working independently in a remote setup.

- Reliable internet connection and professional work habits.



### Nice to Have



- Experience with LinkedIn Recruiter or job board sourcing.

- Familiarity with Australian recruitment processes or clients.

- Strong follow-up skills and a proactive approach.

- Ability to manage multiple roles and candidate pipelines at once.



### Who This Role Suits



This role is a good fit for someone who:

- Enjoys recruitment admin and coordination work.

- Is highly organised and process-driven.

- Communicates clearly and professionally.

- Can stay on top of details and follow through reliably.



### What We Offer



- Part-time remote role.

- Opportunity to work closely with a growing recruitment team.

- Clear responsibilities and structured processes.

- Long-term opportunity for the right person.



### How to Apply



Please include a short introduction about your recruitment or HR admin experience, the ATS platforms you have used, and your experience with candidate screening and interview coordination.

description:
We run a growing European fashion e-commerce brand and are looking for someone to engage (comment) under our
/Meta ads using European-looking profiles.



What you'll do:

title: Shopify Speed Optimization Expert
description:
We are looking for a high-level Shopify Developer with a focus on performance optimization to speed up our store. Currently, our Google PageSpeed Insights score is hovering around 40 on Mobile, and we need to get this into the 90+ range without sacrificing design or functionality.



Our store uses GemPages, and we suspect it is contributing to significant render-blocking issues and excessive DOM size. We need someone who understands how to optimize page-builder content and clean up the underlying Liquid code.



Key Objectives:

Core Web Vitals: Improve LCP (Largest Contentful Paint), FID, and CLS scores.



Code Cleanup: Identify and remove "ghost" code/scripts from uninstalled apps.



App Audit: Review current apps and suggest lighter alternatives or hard-coded solutions.



GemPages Optimization: Optimize the way GemPages assets load (Lazy loading, prioritizing above-the-fold content).



Image & Video: Ensure all assets are WebP/AVIF formatted and properly sized for mobile.



Critical CSS: Implement critical CSS and defer non-essential JavaScript.



Requirements:

Proven track record of taking Shopify stores from "Red" (0-49) to "Green" (90-100) on Google PageSpeed Insights.







understanding of Shopify’s Online Store 2.0 architecture.



Experience specifically optimizing stores that use GemPages

Ability to provide a "Before and After" report using PageSpeed Insights and GTmetrix.



70 usd in total, just focusing on mobile speed

title: Real Estate Photography Editor (Specialist)
description:
We are a luxury real estate media company seeking a full-time Real Estate Photo Editor with deep expertise in real estate and architectural photography. This role is for a highly skilled professional who takes pride in manual, high-end editing and producing consistent, magazine-quality results at scale.



About the Role

As our full-time editor, you will be responsible for editing a steady volume of high-end residential and architectural images. Every image must reflect true-to-life color, clean verticals, natural lighting, and refined contrast.

This is not a preset-driven or automated role—we prioritize precision, consistency, and craftsmanship.



Required Expertise

4+ years of professional photo editing experience

Strong background in:

* Real estate photography editing

* Architectural and editorial-style photography

* Flambient editing (flash + ambient blending)

Hand-blended HDR (manual only)

Deep understanding of:

* Natural color balance and lighting consistency

* Perspective correction and vertical alignment

* Window pulls and exposure blending

* Clean, high-end editorial finishing



Technical Requirements

Advanced proficiency in:

* Adobe Lightroom Classic

* Adobe Photoshop

Strictly no use of AI-based or automated editing tools, including:

* Fotello

AutoHDR platforms

* Ability to maintain a consistent editing style across large volumes while applying judgment per image



What We’re Looking For

A dedicated full-time editor—not a freelancer juggling multiple clients

Someone who understands light, composition, and realism—not just presets

Strong attention to detail (no halos, color casts, or over-processing)

Reliable communication and fast, consistent turnaround times

* Ability to align with a luxury brand aesthetic



Nice to Have

* Experience editing luxury listings ($1M+ properties)

* Familiarity with U.S. real estate photography standards

title: Senior Video Editor (Luxury Real Estate)
description:
Senior Video Editor (Luxury Real Estate)



Full-Time Position



We are a luxury real estate media company seeking a full-time Senior Video Editor who specializes in crafting high-end, cinematic property films. This role is for a highly skilled professional who understands storytelling, pacing, and premium color—and can consistently deliver polished, luxury-level video content.



About the Role



As our Senior Video Editor, you will be responsible for editing a steady volume of luxury real estate videos, including cinematic property tours, agent-led videos, and brand storytelling content.



Every project should reflect a refined, high-end aesthetic—clean edits, intentional pacing, natural yet elevated color grading, and seamless motion. This is not a template-driven role. We value precision, consistency, and creative craftsmanship.



Required Expertise

- 8+ years of professional video editing experience (senior level)

- Strong background in:

- Luxury real estate video editing

- Cinematic property tours

- Agent/on-camera videos

- Story-driven brand content



Advanced expertise in:

- High-end color grading (natural, clean, luxury tone)

- DaVinci Resolve (required)

- Speed ramping and motion timing

- Music-driven editing and pacing

- Clean, professional captioning for social and branding



Deep understanding of:

- Visual storytelling and narrative flow

- Shot selection and sequencing

- Matching footage across multiple cameras and lighting conditions

- Maintaining consistency across projects and clients



Technical Requirements / Advanced proficiency in:

- DaVinci Resolve (primary editing platform)

- Strong working knowledge of:

- Color management and node-based grading workflows

- Export settings for social media, MLS, and high-end marketing use



Strictly no reliance on:

AI-generated edits

Auto-cutting or template-based platforms



What We’re Looking For



A dedicated full-time editor—not a freelancer splitting attention. 

Someone who understands luxury pacing—when to slow down, when to build energy 

Strong attention to detail (no sloppy cuts, mismatched color, or over-editing) 

Ability to create emotion-driven edits, not just compile clips 

Reliable communication and consistent turnaround times

Alignment with a premium, luxury brand aesthetic



Nice to Have

Experience editing $1M+ luxury listings

Familiarity with real estate marketing trends and agent branding

Experience working with drone footage and gimbal-based walkthroughs



What Success Looks Like



Videos feel intentional, cinematic, and elevated

Agents look natural, confident, and well-paced on camera

Every project reinforces a luxury brand standard

Consistent quality across high volume without sacrificing detail

description:
Remote Estimating & Quoting Assistant – Water Storage Tank Projects



Raven Tanks is seeking a high calibre remote assistant to support our estimating and quoting for new panel tank projects. This role suits someone sharp, reliable, and highly organised, who can communicate clearly and take ownership of their work. You will work closely with our sales and operations team to deliver accurate, well presented quotes in a fast paced environment.



What you’ll do:

Prepare accurate cost estimates using internal templates and systems

Build and issue professional quote documents

Liaise with suppliers to confirm current pricing and availability

Support the sales team with follow ups and general admin

Maintain clean and organised records within our CRM systems



We’re looking for:



Exceptional English communication, both written and spoken

Strong attention to detail with a high level of accuracy

Confident working with systems, spreadsheets, and CRM tools

Ability to think through problems and ask the right questions

Reliable internet and consistent availability aligned with AEST business hours

Previous experience in estimating, quoting, construction support, or admin is highly regarded



This role is best suited to someone who takes pride in their work, can work independently, and is comfortable being accountable for outcomes. We value clear communication, fast turnaround, and a high standard of presentation across everything we send to clients.



Important:



Do not send a resume.



To apply, send a one minute WhatsApp video to Matt on 
including all of the below.



Start your message with the word RAVEN.



60–90 second video

In this video:

Briefly introduce yourself and your experience

Explain how you would approach the scenario below and why

Scenario task



Client
:



Hi Matt,

We need a replacement liner for an existing tank. It’s around 3m high and 3.5m diameter. The tank is leaking and has some rust internally. Can you provide a quote? We need this done fairly soon.

Applications that do not follow all instructions will not be considered.

title: Design Engineer Bolted Steel Water Tanks
description:
Raven Tanks Australia is seeking a very experienced Design Engineer to join our team and support the design, analysis and development of our bolted steel tank systems and related components. We only want the best of the best for this role. If you take pride in your work, communicate clearly and can operate at a high standard without constant supervision, we want to hear from you.



This is a full time role, Monday to Friday, 8.00 am to 5.00 pm AEST.



Key responsibilities

• Carry out structural calculations for tank walls, roofs, ring beams, bases and supporting structures

• Ensure compliance with relevant Australian Standards including AS2304, AS4100, AS NZS 4600, AS NZS 1170, AS1657 and AS3500

• Develop and review tank components including trusses, platforms, ladders, penetrations and hydraulic connections

• Prepare clear and accurate engineering documentation including load cases, load analysis summaries, design reports, GA drawings and structural calculation packages

• Analyse hydraulic components including flow rates, head pressure, suction lines, inlets, outlets and overflows

• Collaborate with sales, operations and project teams throughout the project lifecycle

• Review supplier drawings and assess compliance with design requirements

• Support engineering development, design optimisation and continuous improvement initiatives



Skills and experience

• Degree in Structural, Civil or Mechanical Engineering

• Strong understanding of structural analysis and steel design

• Ability to interpret and apply Australian Standards relevant to tank, hydraulic components and access system design

• Experience preparing clear and understandable engineering reports

• Proficiency with design and analysis software such as SpaceGass, SAP2000, Strand7, SolidWorks, Inventor or similar

• Familiarity with hydraulic design concepts including flow and pressure behaviour

• Ability to produce accurate drawings and technical documentation



Personal attributes

• Flexible and adaptable, able to work across a range of technical tasks

• Strong attention to detail with a commitment to high quality output

• Team oriented with a positive and collaborative attitude

• Hardworking and dependable with strong time management skills

• Practical problem solver with a clear communication style

• Able to explain engineering concepts in a way that clients and tea
mbers can easily understand

• Willing to learn, grow and contribute to the overall engineering capability

• Willing to work full time, Monday to Friday, 8.00 am to 5.00 pm AEST



Highly desirable

• Experience with bolted panel tanks, water storage systems or modular steel structures

• Exposure to RPEQ workflows or willingness to work under a certifying engineer

• Knowledge of corrosion protection and steel fabrication

• Experience with construction or installation processes



What we offer

• Opportunity to help shape engineering capability within a growing multinational company

• Varied design challenges across fire, potable, industrial and wastewater tank projects

• Supportive and collaborative team environment

• Career development opportunities including pathways toward chartership

• The chance to work with a team that sets high standards and backs you to grow



How to apply

Do not apply through this platform.



Send a 1 to 2 minute video to Matt on WhatsApp at 
explaining why you are the right person for this role, highlighting your most relevant design experience and software capability.

title: Video Editor & Graphic Designer - E-Commerce
description:
Video Editor & Graphic Designer - E-Commerce — Remote (Full-Time)



MySweetSmile is an eight-figure DTC oral care brand trusted by over one million customers across the UK, US, and EU. We're hiring a Video Editor & Graphic Designer to join our creative team and produce high-volume, high-quality ad creatives, product visuals, and video content across all channels.



This is a hands-on production role. You'll receive briefs from the Creative Team, and your job is to execute fast, use AI intelligently, and deliver polished, conversion-ready assets every single day.



You will be working directly within our proprietary AI Creative System alongside industry tools. If you're not already deep in the AI creative space, this role isn't for you.



---



What You'll Be Doing



Paid Social Ad Production

Edit and produce static and video ad creatives for Meta, TikTok, Google, and Amazon Ads. Execute UGC-style edits, product demos, overlays, animations, and performance-driven storytelling from supplied briefs. You will be expected to produce multiple finished ads per day.



AI-Driven Creative Production

Use our internal AI Creative System and external tools (Claude, Sora, Veo3, Nano Banana Pro, Kling, Midjourney, Runway) to generate, enhance, and iterate on creative assets at speed. You need to be an exceptional prompter who understands how to guide AI outputs to match a specific brief.



Graphic Design

Design static images, product renders, and visual assets for paid ads,
 marketing, Shopify image galleries, Amazon A+ Content, Amazon Brand Story, and Storefront. Clean, conversion-focused design with strong attention to visual hierarchy.



Video Editing (Short + Long Form)

Edit short-form paid social ads and longer-form content such as YouTube how-to guides, product walkthroughs, and educational videos.



Organisation & Workflow

Work within Notion (task management and briefs), Google Drive (asset storage and file management), and Slack (internal comms). You'll be expected to keep your work organised, name files correctly, update tickets, and manage your own pipeline without being chased.



---



Requirements



• Strong command of written English — you'll need to understand nuanced feedback, follow detailed briefs, and write clean on-screen text and captions.

• Proven experience producing high-performing ad creatives for eCommerce or DTC brands.

• Deep, practical experience with AI creative tools — not just awareness, but daily usage. You should be comfortable with Claude, Sora, Veo3, Nano Banana Pro, Kling, Midjourney, Runway, Photoshop AI, and similar.

• Strong proficiency in Photoshop, Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, and/or Final Cut.

• Experience producing Amazon A+ Content, image galleries, and eCommerce product visuals.

• Understanding of what makes a creative convert — you think about performance, not just aesthetics.

• Highly organised with experience using project management tools (Notion preferred).

• Ability to manage multiple deliverables with speed, accuracy, and minimal oversight.



---



Who This Is Not For



• People looking for a relaxed role. This is high output, every day.

• Creatives who prioritise aesthetics over performance.

• Anyone not already using AI tools daily in their creative workflow.

• People who need to be guided step-by-step instead of learning fast and taking ownership.

• Slow executors or anyone who can't handle direct feedback and fast turnarounds.



---



What You'll Gain



• Direct collaboration with the Managing Director and core creative team.

• Access to a proprietary, industry-leading AI Creative System built specifically for our brand.

• Clear briefs, clear expectations, and the opportunity to grow as our creative team scales.



---



How to Apply



Subject line: "MSS AI Creative Editor — Application"



Include all of the following or your application will not be reviewed:



1. A short written introduction covering your experience with AI-driven creative production, eCommerce ad creative, and why you're a fit for this role.



2. A portfolio showing:

   • Meta/TikTok ad creatives (static + video)

   • AI-enhanced or AI-generated work

   • Amazon A+ Content / image galleries / product visuals

   • UGC edits or paid social performance videos



3. Evidence of AI proficiency — show us real examples of work created using AI tools.



4. A brief summary of your editing, design, and AI toolset.



Applications missing any of the above will not be considered.

This role is responsible for identifying, prospecting, and converting TikTok creators into active partners through strategic messaging, relationship building, and consistent follow-up.

/DM), and the ability to convert prospects into engaged, revenue-generating partners.

Creator Prospecting & Outreach

, TikTok DMs, and other platforms.

Collaboration

title: AI Automation Developer – PDF OCR & Text Extraction Pipeline
description:
We are looking for an experienced AI Automation Developer to build a fully automated workflow that converts PDF documents into highly accurate, clean Microsoft Word (.docx) files.



This is NOT a basic VA task. This is a pipeline development role.



Currently, we process documents manually using OCR software (ABBYY) and AI tools. The goal is to replace this manual workflow with a scalable, automated system while maintaining extremely high accuracy.



CURRENT PROCESS (FOR CONTEXT)



Our current manual workflow includes:



Preprocessing PDFs in ABBYY (deskew, noise removal, resolution correction)

Running OCR in “accurate” mode with layout detection

Manually verifying zones (text, tables, formatting)

Reviewing low-confidence OCR text

Exporting to searchable PDF

Splitting documents into smaller batches (~10 pages)

Uploading to AI (Grok) for text extraction

Using strict prompts to preserve:

Line spacing

Line breaks

Page formatting

Exact wording

Copying results into Word (.docx)



This process is very accurate but also time-consuming.



OBJECTIVE:

We want to build a system that can:

Ingest PDF documents automatically

Perform high-quality OCR (including preprocessing if needed)

Extract text using AI (ChatGPT, Claude, Grok, etc.)

Preserve exact formatting (layout, spacing, structure)

Generate clean Word (.docx) files

Label pages clearly (e.g., PAGE 1, PAGE 2, etc.)

Handle large documents intelligently (batching if needed)

Flag low-confidence or problematic text for review



CRITICAL REQUIREMENT (MOST IMPORTANT):

?? ZERO TEXT ALTERATION

Words must NOT be changed

Numbers must NOT be changed

No missing content

Output must match original documents as closely as possible



These are legal/court documents, so accuracy is everything.



FINAL USE CASE;

The final Word documents will be used to:

Copy and paste specific sections into AI tools

Maintain exact structure for legal review and editing



Because of this, formatting and wording must remain intact.



PREFERRED TECH STACK (OPEN TO YOUR RECOMMENDATION);

We are open to:

Python-based pipeline (preferred if most reliable)

Microsoft stack (OneDrive / SharePoint / Power Automate / Azure OpenAI)

Google-based workflows

Claude / OpenAI / Grok APIs

OCR tools (ABBYY, Tesseract, Adobe, etc.)



YOUR ROLE:

Design and build the full pipeline

Recommend best architecture

Ensure high OCR + AI accuracy

Handle formatting preservation

Implement error detection and validation

Optimize for scalability and efficiency



REQUIREMENTS:

Experience building AI or OCR pipelines

Strong understanding of PDF text extraction challenges

Experience with APIs (OpenAI, Claude, etc.)

Experience with Python or automation platforms

Attention to detail (VERY IMPORTANT)

Ability to think through edge cases (bad scans, formatting issues)



QUESTIONS (PLEASE ANSWER IN YOUR APPLICATION):

What approach would you use to build this pipeline?

What OCR tool would you recommend and why?

How would you ensure text is NOT altered?

How would you preserve formatting in Word output?

Have you built something similar before?

How long do you anticipate it will take to build this program?

What would be the total cost to build this?

title: Meta Ads & GHL Specialist
description:
We are a nationally recognised Working at Heights training provider operating across Australia, offering both online and face-to-face certification courses in Sydney. We have built a full 3-campaign Meta Ads structure designed to drive bookings, capture leads, and build brand awareness.



We are now looking for an experienced VA who can own the execution end-to-end: from setting up and managing our Meta Ads campaigns through to building the GoHighLevel funnels and automations that turn enquiries and leads into paying students.



This is not a generalist role. We need someone who has done this before — ideally in the training, trades, safety, or professional services space — and can hit the ground running with minimal hand-holding.



WHAT YOU WILL OWN

1. Meta Ads — Campaign Setup & Management

• Build all 3 campaigns in Meta Ads Manager from our provided brief — campaign structure, ad sets, audiences, and placements:



Campaign 1 — Website Conversions (4 ad sets, 11 ads)

Ad Sets 1A–1D each have full ad copy tables covering primary text, headline, description, CTA button, and creative production notes — for every video, image, and carousel ad.

Campaign 2 — Lead Generation (4 ad sets, 8 ads)

All four ad sets including the corporate/HR targeting, soft-CTA copy, and lead form field specs per ad set.

Campaign 3 — Awareness (1 ad set, 2 ads)

Both short-form video scripts with hook-in-3-seconds briefs.



• Upload all ad copy and creative assets; configure conversion events and pixel tracking

• Set up all custom audiences: website visitors, video viewers (50%+), page engagers, past purchasers, and lookalikes

• Configure Meta Instant Lead Forms for Campaign 2 with correct fields per ad set

• Monitor campaign performance daily — flag underperformers and recommend optimisations

• Run A/B tests on creatives and copy; consolidate budget to winning variants after 7–10 days

• Produce a weekly performance report (spend, CPL, CPC, ROAS, bookings) with insights and next actions

• Manage creative refresh cycle every 4–6 weeks to prevent audience fatigue



2. GoHighLevel — Funnel & Automation Build



• Create and configure the Thank You pages and post-submission flows for each lead magnet and enquiry form

• Connect Meta Lead Forms (Campaign 2) to GHL via native integration or Zapier — ensuring instant lead delivery to CRM

• Set up contact pipelines and stages in GHL CRM: New Lead ? Contacted ? Qualified ? Booked ? Completed

• Build automated
 nurture sequences for each lead segment (online, face-to-face, corporate, refresher)

• Build SMS follow-up automations triggered on form submission — first message within 5 minutes of lead capture

• Set up task automations for manual follow-up reminders when leads go cold

• Configure GHL calendar integration for face-to-face Sydney bookings (availability, confirmations, reminders)

• Tag and segment all incoming leads correctly by source, course type, and engagement level

• Set up deal/opportunity tracking so the business owner can see pipeline revenue at a glance



3. Lead Nurture Sequences — Content & Logic

• Write (or refine from provided copy) 5–7
 nurture sequences per lead segment — education, social proof, objection handling, CTA

• Write SMS follow-up scripts for each automation trigger point

• Build re-engagement sequences for cold leads (30+ days inactive)

• Ensure all GHL workflows have correct conditional logic: triggers, wait steps, if/else branches, and goal events

• Test all automation flows end-to-end before going live — confirm delivery, links, and CRM tagging



4. Reporting & Ongoing Optimisation

• Maintain a live dashboard tracking Meta Ads KPIs alongside GHL pipeline metrics (leads in, conversion rates, revenue)

• Identify drop-off points in funnels and recommend and implement fixes

• Weekly async check-in update with owner — written summary + Loom video walkthrough of key changes

• Proactively flag compliance issues, ad account flags, or automation failures



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, please provide the following:



1. A brief introduction: who you are, where you're based, and your available hours (AEST overlap required)

2. Evidence of 2–3 Meta Ads campaigns you have personally managed — include platform screenshots showing results (CPL, ROAS, spend). Blur client names if needed.

3. Evidence of 2–3 GoHighLevel builds — show funnels, workflow logic, and/or CRM pipelines you have set up. Screenshots or a Loom walkthrough.

4. Your hourly or weekly rate

5. Availability to start and estimated hours per week

6. Answer this question in 3–5 sentences: A Meta lead form captures a lead for a Working at Heights course. Walk us through exactly what happens in GoHighLevel from the 
nt that lead is received.



Applications without campaign evidence and the GHL question answered will not be reviewed. We move fast — shortlisted candidates will be contacted within 48 hours.

title: Video Editor for Ecommerce Dropshipping (Meta Ads & AI Specialist)
description:
Video Editor for Ecommerce Dropshipping (Meta Ads Specialist)

Are YOU an experienced video editor specializing in Meta Ads for physical products and dropshipping? Can you look at a competitor’s winning ad and immediately understand how to replicate it technically, or transform a script into a winning creative using the most advanced AI tools? If you answered an enthusiastic “YES” to both questions above, KEEP READING.



We run multiple international companies in the ecommerce and education space and we’re looking for a Video Editor (Meta Ads Specialist) to join our creative team.

We need someone to take responsibility for:

- Sales-Focused Ad Production: Crafting clean, high-conversion ads (1 to 5 minutes) including Mini-VSLs, AI-UGC, and "Product in Hand" content.

- Asset Management & Sourcing: You will be provided with a folder of our selected B-rolls. However, if additional clips are needed, you must source them autonomously and innovatively. The use of traditional stock footage (Shutterstock, Envato, etc.) is strictly FORBIDDEN.

- From Script to Finished Product: We provide the scripts; your job is to interpret them visually, choosing the right clips and editing them to create a dynamic, persuasive, and technically flawless product.

- AI Tool Research & Implementation: This is your passion. You must stay constantly updated on new AI releases (editing, UGC avatars, video generation). In our weekly calls, we expect you to pitch new software that can revolutionize our workflow.

- AI Asset Generation: Hands-on use of the AI Stack (Higgsfield, Sora 2, Veo 3, Arcads, MakeUGC) to create or enhance content.

- Visual Optimization: Implementing textual hooks, kinetic typography, and scroll-stopping subtitles.



Position Requirements:

- At least 2 years of specific experience: A solid background in Meta Ads for ecommerce brands. You must have worked as an editor for brands generating at least $10k/month in revenue. While respecting privacy, you will be asked to provide examples of these collaborations in the following stages.

- Deep Passion for Innovation: This isn't just a job; you must love technology. We want an AI "killer" who stays ahead of the market.

- Excellent Problem-Solving Skills: If instructions aren't crystal clear or assets are missing, you don't stop. You find a solution and complete the task with excellence.

- Availability & Commitment: Starting with a part-time collaboration (20h/week) with a clear intention of moving to Full-Time shortly. We work 5 days a week, but availability on Saturdays and Sundays is required for emergencies. Please note: we are looking for a dedicated partner, not an "Upwork or Fiverr style" freelancer juggling 5-6 different companies. If you cannot guarantee us top priority and absolute mental focus, do not apply.

- Obsessive Precision & Anti-Mediocrity: Subtitles, cuts, and details must be perfect. Mediocrity is not allowed in our team.

- Fluent in English: The team communicates in English. Deep proficiency is mandatory to manage multilingual content (IT, FR, ES, DE, NL).



What We Offer:

- Performance Bonuses: Potential for bonuses up to $1000+ per month based on the results of the videos produced.

- Career Growth: A real opportunity to become Head of Video Editing.

- Active Involvement: You will actively participate in the growth of an international company, testing the most powerful AI tools on the market.

title: Shopify & WordPress Developer - CRO & Web Updates
description:
HELLO!



We are a small digital marketing agency based in Australia working with local small businesses across SEO, Google Ads and website optimisation. We are looking for a reliable, experienced developer to help with website updates for one of our clients.



This is a one-off project to start, however we have a growing number of clients and are looking to build a long-term relationship with the right person. If you do good work, there will be consistent ongoing projects coming your way.



---



ABOUT THE FIRST PROJECT



The initial work is a series of Conversion Rate Optimisation (CRO) updates on a Shopify store for a local ecom business. We have a detailed CRO brief ready to share that outlines every change with exact copy, placement instructions and implementation notes — so you won't be guessing what's needed.

 

Most of this work is Shopify theme editing (Liquid / HTML / CSS). No complex backend development required.



---



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



- Solid hands-on experience with Shopify theme development (Liquid, HTML, CSS)

- Experience with WordPress is also important as we have WP projects coming

- Familiarity with Shopify Metafields and the theme editor

- Experience with CRO or UI improvements on e-commerce stores is a big plus

- Good written English — you'll be communicating with us regularly

- Reliable, responsive and able to meet deadlines

- Able to start with a small paid test task before committing to the full project



---



HOW TO APPLY



Please send us:

1. A short introduction about yourself and your experience with Shopify and WordPress

2. Links to 2-3 Shopify stores or websites you have worked on

3. Your hourly rate

4. Confirmation that you are happy to start with a small paid test task



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Executive Assistant
description:
READ THIS FIRST



[SHORT INTRO OF OUR COMPANY]



We are a Singapore based company.



Our main core business involves coaching and training a new generation of financial advisors to reach out to more people, transform more lives and build the business of their dreams.



We have coached more than 3000 Financial Advisors and have more than 8 years under our belt in doing so.



Our clients are mainly in Singapore, Malaysia and Hong Kong and we are on track to reaching out to more of them as we speak.



Right now, We are looking for an Executive Assistant to be part of our company, and to be working directly with the Chief Executive Officer (CEO).



As the Executive Assistant of our company, you will be responsible for coordinating, planning events, communicating to the team and clients, and organising all the backend logistics and operations of the company.



More importantly, your main objective is to buy back time for the CEO.



Your position will play an important and crucial role in the team’s success.





[HOW LIFE IS GONNA LOOK LIKE FOR YOU]



You will be involved in the day to day communications and supporting the CEO directly, assisting in random tasks or any tasks that the CEO requires.





There is no limit to duties an executive assistant can handle, which is why if you are taking on this role, you must have a confident, problem-solving-can-do attitude.



We will not sugarcoat anything but here’s how it is like as well.



You WILL be in a high pressure environment that will force you to step up and grow as an individual.



There will be no bullshit beautiful lies, but rather ugly truth - although necessary - but ugly all the same that will poise you for growth.



While it might be intense, the rewards are great.



Bonuses, employee benefits and perks that will ensure you get well remunerated for your efforts.



The “work hard, play hard and work even harder mantra” is here.



Because we are going to be poised for crazy growth and expansion, you will have to put on your thinking cap, initiative and out of your comfort zone to get things done.





You'll get to attend world-class business, marketing and personal development programs for FREE and rub elbows with renowned Asian entrepreneurs and Financial Advisors.



You’ll be working with an international team, and you’ll even get to hang out with them at least once a year at our annual retreat in an exotic location.
