title: YouTube Video Creation & Editor – Marketing & Software-Related
description:
Hi there,



My name is Sen, and I run several faceless, long-form YouTube channels that review online marketing services and create tutorials for them.



I am currently looking to expand my content team and hire a long-term video editor and creator for these YouTube videos.



You will be given the video idea, voice recording/script, and requirements, and your job will be to edit the video for it and create additional content for the video (usually in the form of a screen recording, as the videos are tutorials on online platforms like Shopify, Temu or Wix – so an additional background is social media marketing is beneficial).



The videos are usually 2-4 minutes long, and fairly simple. Here are some examples of such videos:

1. 

2. 

3. 

4. 

5. 

6. 



I hope you get the idea about these videos... After getting the script and target keyword for the video, your job will be to create such a video with great graphics, effects, NCS music, etc. so it matches with the voiceover. The videos must be of great quality.



You will have to edit and create 2-3 such videos per day. Since they are fairly short – usually 2-4 minutes (not short-form content like Reels, though), the videos can be produced quite fast from my experience.



Here are the requirements:

- Great editing skills ideally using CapCut (I will provide you the pro version), Adobe Premiere Pro, Camtasia, Final Cut, or other similar software.

- Creative thinking and attention to detail.

- Orientation in the social media marketing sphere and experience with YouTube SEO and/or YouTube would be a potential plus as well.



Partnership details:

- I am looking for a long-term partnership in this project, as I am looking to grow these YouTube channels in the long term.

- The employment will firstly be part-time, but I will be happy to change it to full-time terms if you do your job well. We can work on the hours/salary so it works for the both of us.

- I will provide bonuses for performance, so we can grow together.



If you meet these requirements and are serious about this position long-term, please apply with your portfolio, and experiences related to the job, and if I find you a great match, I will ask you for an interview and to produce a video to show your work.



In the subject line of your application include the word "Star" to confirm that you read the whole job description. Thank you.

title: Part-Time Content Creator + Admin Support
description:
About Nokvex

Nokvex is a content studio serving remote agencies and freelancers across Australia and North America. We offer flexible payment in USD or PHP, treat our team as long-term partners, and keep communication clear and respectful.



The Role

We're looking for a Part-Time Content Creator with light admin support responsibilities. This is a long-term role with a clear path to full-time.



20 hours/week | $300/month USD ($70/week) | Weekly payment | Starting immediately



Schedule

- 20 hours/week distributed across Monday to Friday primarily

- Flexible - you choose your daily hours within PHT business time

- Occasional weekend support (max 2x/month) for urgent content or time-sensitive posts

- Results-based, not hour-based monitoring



Main Responsibilities

1. Video Editing (40%)

- 2 long-form YouTube videos per month (8-15 minutes each)

- 8 short-form videos per month (30-60 seconds, Reels/Shorts/TikTok)

- AI education content, cartoon/Nickelodeon-inspired style

- Dynamic captions, B-roll, basic motion graphics

2. Graphic Design (20%)

- YouTube thumbnails

- Social media post graphics (Canva)

- Simple branded assets

3. AI Asset Generation (15%)

- Image generation (Nano Banana, Midjourney, or similar)

- Character art, backgrounds, supporting visuals

- Following detailed briefs

4. Social Media Management (15%)

- Scheduling posts across Instagram,
, TikTok

- Basic caption drafting

- Engagement monitoring

5. Light Admin Support (10%)

- File organization (Google Drive)

- Basic research tasks (competitor analysis, data gathering)

- Spreadsheet updates

- Simple documentation



Growth Path

As our content volume grows, this role will evolve:

- Month 4-6: Hours may increase to 30-40 hrs/week, salary $450-$600

- Month 7-12: Option for full-time at $650-$800/month

- Scope will narrow to specialization (video editing + graphic design focus)

- SMM and admin tasks will transfer to other tea
mbers

Salary reviewed every 3 months based on performance.



Who You Are

- 1-2+ years experience in video editing (Premiere Pro, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve)

- Portfolio showing YouTube long-form AND short-form work

- Basic graphic design skills (Canva minimum)

- Familiar with AI image or video tools (Midjourney, DALL-E, or similar) OR willing to learn fast

- Comfortable with social media scheduling tools

- Good English written communication

- Reliable internet (backup required)

- Available during regular PHT business hours



Bonus Points:

- Experience with cartoon/animation-style editing

- After Effects skills

- Thumbnail design portfolio (YouTube-specific)

- AI education or tech content experience

- Experience using AI tools to generate production-ready assets - images, voiceovers, or video clips (e.g. Kling, Hailuo, Higgsfield, ElevenLabs, Nano Banana)



What We Offer

- $300 USD/month ($70/week), paid weekly via Wise

- 20 hours/week with flexible schedule

- Occasional weekend availability for time-sensitive tasks (max 2x/month)

- 13th month bonus after 6 months of continuous service

- 5 days paid time off per year, available after 3 months

- Clear 12-month growth path (part-time to full-time)

- Long-term collaboration, not a gig

- Respectful, async-first work culture



How to Apply

Please send:

1. Your portfolio link (video editing + graphic design samples)

2. Short answer: What's your favorite editing project and why?

3. A 30-second Loom video introducing yourself

4. Your availability (days and PHT hours)

Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.



We review applications within 3 days and reply to everyone.



Learn more at

title: Digital Marketing Specialist — Remote, Full-Time
description:
Who We Are:



1. We're a chemical free cleaning company. We provide cleaner, healthier, and safer chemical free cleaning for families, Moms, seniors.

2. We're aiming for strong revenue growth in 2026 and beyond. That's where you come in.



Who We Need:



   (1) We need an experienced digital marketing professional. Not a trainee. Not someone starting from zero.

   (2) We need someone who has run marketing projects before. Someone who sets quantified goals, hits deadlines, and measures results.

   (3) Here's what matters most: your mindset.

   (4) We live by the optimize — measure — learn cycle. Every project has a number. Every number gets tracked. Every result shapes what we do next.



If that sounds like how you already work, keep reading.



Are You This Person?



1. Accountable. You own your numbers. You don't blame tools, the market, or the algorithm.

2. Deadline-driven. You hit dates. When something slips, you flag it early.

3. Data-first. You check dashboards before you share opinions.

4. Measurement-minded. You think in baselines, targets, and deltas.

5. Curious. You ask "what's working?" and "why?" every single week.

6. Honest. You say when something isn't working. No sugarcoating, no spin.



What You'll Do: 



   (1) You'll run marketing projects that bring qualified leads into our sales pipeline. Real projects. Real numbers. Real deadlines.

   (2) SEO and AEO (AI Engine Optimization) to drive qualified search traffic

   (3) Running
 campaigns, by building and improving sales funnels to lift conversion rates

   (4) Conduct referral campaigns to maximize leads from current clients.

   (5) Maximize our online reviews volumes through best practices and meet the review volume goals

   (6) Multi-channel outreach 
, LinkedIn DMs, phone)

   (7) Running social media campaigns with positive ROIs.

   (8) Conduct Reddit and Quora marketing campaigns that drive SEO and generate leads.

   (9) Understand how to track conversions based on marketing channels.

   (10) Daily, weekly, and monthly reporting on every campaign

   (11) Supporting sales operations



Every project has a goal. Every goal has a number. Every number gets reviewed.



What We Expect From You:



1. You carry out marketing projects based on clear goals, timelines, and measured results.

2. You run the optimize — measure — learn cycle on every campaign you touch.

3. After 1 month of training, you hit weekly lead goals, and push to beat them.

4. You report your numbers without being asked.

5. You commit 40 hours per week.

6. We are open for long term contracts.



Your Background. You should have:



   (1) Real, hands-on experience in digital marketing (coursework alone won't cut it)

   (2) A track record of setting goals, measuring results, and hitting targets

   (3) Strong writing skills — short, clear, and persuasive

   (4) Comfort with tools like GA4, a CRM,
 platforms, and SEO software

   (5) A 4-year Bachelor's degree

   (6) Honesty about what you know and what you still need to learn

   (7) Growth Path and Pay



This role has a clear growth ladder. As your measured results grow, your pay grows.



   Trainee (Foundation Level) — $6/hour minimum

   Level 1 (Entry Professional) — $7/hour minimum

   Level 2 (Intermediate Specialist) — $8/hour minimum

   Level 3 (Advanced Specialist) — $9/hour minimum

   Level 4 (Master Marketer) — $11/hour minimum

   Level 5 (Authority Expert) — $13/hour minimum

   Level 6 (Lead Manager) — $15/hour minimum



We start most new hires at the lower levels. We move people up based on measured results, not tenure. We're open to both full-time and long-term contract arrangements.



If you want a role where pay follows performance, you'll like how this works. If you want a fixed senior salary on day one, this isn't the right fit.



Benefits:



(1) AI tools built into everything we do

(2) Honest, ethical managers

(3) Strong training and development program

(4) Clear path to higher pay and more responsibility

(5) Real support from the team — including our Recruiting and Training Manager and the company President

(6) 6 paid US National Holidays

(7) 5 paid personal days accrued in Year 1

(8) 10 paid personal days accrued in Year 2 and beyond



Our Culture and Values:



   1. Direct, honest, empathetic communication

   2. Always learning

   3. Good remote work tools

   4. Team connection (no one left isolated)

   5. Integrity, every time

   6. Data-driven, not ego-driven



How We Hire - This role matters to us. So we take hiring seriously. Our process:



   1. A short survey

   2. A work sample

   3. A video interview

   4. 1st interview on Zoom

   5. 2nd interview on Zoom

   6. Document review



Yes, it's thorough. We're not hiring a contractor. We're hiring a long-term partner who will help shape our startup.



This is a small, crazy team. Or a crazy, small team. Works both ways.



If you read this and thought "this is me" — we want to hear from you.



Your turn.

We are a U.S.-based real estate investment company actively acquiring off-market properties. We are looking for a Data Research Specialist to support our acquisitions team by cleaning, organizing, and preparing property data.

title: Part-Time GoHighLevel Sales Systems & Lead Management Specialist
description:
We are looking for a **part-time GoHighLevel (GHL) specialist with sales systems experience** to help build, optimize, and manage lead intake and appointment-setting workflows for service-based businesses.



This role is ideal for someone who understands both the technical side of GoHighLevel and the sales psychology behind lead conversion.



Responsibilities:



* Set up and optimize GoHighLevel pipelines

* Build and clean up workflows / automations

* Connect forms, surveys, and calendars

* Create reminder, follow-up, and nurturing sequences

* Move and manage leads through pipeline stages

* Improve lead conversion workflows

* Assist with appointment setting and lead qualification when needed

* Maintain CRM cleanliness, notes, and tags



 Ideal Candidate



* Strong experience with **GoHighLevel**

* Comfortable building **automations, triggers, and workflows**

* Experience with **lead nurturing and sales funnels**

* Understands **appointment setting / lead conversion**

* Can work independently and suggest workflow improvements

* Strong English communication



 Initial Engagement



This will begin as a **paid trial project (5–10 hours)** with potential for ongoing weekly work based on performance.



Please include:



* your GoHighLevel experience

* examples of workflows / funnels you’ve built

* availability and timezone

* desired hourly rate

title: Senior Photo Editor (Real Estate & Architectural Photography)
description:
We are a luxury real estate media company seeking a full-time Senior Photo Editor with deep expertise in real estate and architectural photography. This role is for a highly skilled professional who takes pride in manual, high-end editing and producing consistent, magazine-quality results at scale.



About the Role

As our full-time editor, you will be responsible for editing a steady volume of high-end residential and architectural images. Every image must reflect true-to-life color, clean verticals, natural lighting, and refined contrast.

This is not a preset-driven or automated role—we prioritize precision, consistency, and craftsmanship.



Required Expertise

8+ years of professional photo editing experience (senior level)

Strong background in:

* Real estate photography editing

* Architectural and editorial-style photography

* Advanced expertise in:

* Flambient editing (flash + ambient blending)

Hand-blended HDR (manual only)

Deep understanding of:

* Natural color balance and lighting consistency

* Perspective correction and vertical alignment

* Window pulls and exposure blending

* Clean, high-end editorial finishing



Technical Requirements

Advanced proficiency in:

* Adobe Lightroom Classic

* Adobe Photoshop

Strictly no use of AI-based or automated editing tools, including:

* Fotello

AutoHDR platforms

* Ability to maintain a consistent editing style across large volumes while applying judgment per image



What We’re Looking For

A dedicated full-time editor—not a freelancer juggling multiple clients

Someone who understands light, composition, and realism—not just presets

Strong attention to detail (no halos, color casts, or over-processing)

Reliable communication and fast, consistent turnaround times

* Ability to align with a luxury brand aesthetic



Nice to Have

* Experience editing luxury listings ($1M+ properties)

* Familiarity with U.S. real estate photography standards

title: Dropshipping Supplier Sourcing Specialist (Kitchen Products | High Margin | Paid Ads Focus | Fixed Pay)
description:
We are a kitchen essentials brand looking for a sourcing specialist to find high-quality, high-margin dropshipping suppliers for specific products.



This is a task-based role focused strictly on results.

You will be given product directions and must return verified suppliers that meet strict profitability and performance requirements.



This is NOT a general VA role.



?



Compensation

	•	Fixed pay: $30 per product sourced

	•	Each product must include 3–5 qualified suppliers

	•	No payment for incomplete or low-quality submissions

	•	Paid test task: $15 for 1 product

	•	Ongoing work available based on performance



?



Profitability Requirement (Important)



All products must be suitable for paid advertising.



Each product must meet:

	•	Product + shipping cost: $25 MAX

	•	Target selling price: $50–$100+

	•	Minimum gross margin: 70%+

	•	Must support profitable ads with target CPA of $15–$25



You must include:

	•	Estimated selling price

	•	Total cost (product + shipping)

	•	Estimated profit per sale



Products that do not meet these requirements will be rejected.



?



Scope of Work



For each product, you must:

	•	Find 3–5 reliable suppliers using:

	•	CJdropshipping

	•	Zendrop

	•	Alibaba

	•	Ensure shipping to United States and Canada within 7–12 days

	•	Confirm branding options (logo, packaging, inserts)

	•	Communicate with suppliers if needed

	•	Focus on modern, premium kitchen tools that solve real problems



?



Required Deliverables (Per Product)



You must submit:

	•	Supplier link and name

	•	Product cost

	•	Shipping cost and delivery time to US and Canada

	•	Suggested selling price

	•	Estimated profit margin

	•	Branding capabilities

	•	Minimum order quantity (if applicable)

	•	Screenshot proof of supplier communication

	•	Final recommendation (best supplier and why)



?



Product Criteria



Products must:

	•	Solve a clear kitchen problem

	•	Look premium and modern (not cheap plastic)

	•	Have strong perceived value

	•	Be suitable for social media content

	•	Be difficult to find cheaply on Amazon



Avoid generic or low-quality products.



?



Requirements

	•	Experience sourcing suppliers for dropshipping or eCommerce

	•	Strong understanding of margins and product profitability

	•	Ability to identify reliable suppliers

	•	Organized and detail-oriented



?



Important

	•	Low-margin or low-quality products will be rejected

	•	Generic research will not be accepted

	•	Work must meet profitability requirements for payment



?



To Apply



Answer the following:

	1.	Show one example of a high-margin product you sourced

	2.	How do you calculate product profitability?

	3.	What is an acceptable shipping time to the US?

	4.	Which platforms have you used (CJdropshipping, Zendrop, Alibaba)?



?



Test Task



Shortlisted candidates will complete:



1 product sourcing task for $15



Only candidates who meet quality and profitability standards will continue.

title: Licensed Architect – Residential Design & Permitting Specialist
description:
The role

Work directly with a small team of Professional Engineers on residential projects across Ontario (home additions, wall removals, new detached garages, accessory dwelling units, zoning reviews, and site plans). You'll own the design-to-permit workflow: our engineers handle the structural sizing, you handle the drawings, zoning, and permit submissions.

Small team, real ownership, long-term role. Not a BPO.



Why Us:

We're a structural engineering firm built on accuracy, clear communication, and ownership. Our goal is to produce high-quality drawings and permit submissions that building officials approve without question. That only works if everyone on the team cares about the details. You won't be "assisting" here; you'll be the one turning engineering decisions into a clean, code-compliant package that gets approved.

We'll teach you the Ontario Building Code and municipal zoning rules. You bring the design training and the craft.



- 2 weeks paid Service Incentive Leave and paid official Regular Holidays

- 13th Month bonus pay

- Social Security System (SSS) and PhilHealth contribution reimbursements



The work

A contractor hires us to design a load-bearing wall removal. Our engineer sizes the beam on site and sends you the markup. From there it's yours to draft the floor plans, prepare the permit application, handle zoning and site plan if needed, coordinate with the building department, and deliver the client a ready-to-build package.



Requirements

PRC-licensed Architect (include license number in application)

3+ years of residential design experience

Fluent written English (you'll
 Canadian clients and building officials directly)

Proficient in AutoCAD and/or Revit (or another 3D software)



North American code experience is a plus, not required.

To apply, send:



Schedule:

- Monday to Friday

- Availability for at least 3 hours of overlap between 6:30 - 9:30 PM Ontario time (6:30 - 9:30 AM Philippine time)

title: Ebook / PDF Guide Designer — Health & Wellness Brand
description:
About the Project

I’m a licensed acupuncturist and physical therapist with a large social media following (950K+ on Instagram). I’m launching a paid digital guide, a 50-60 page PDF guide.

I already have everything you need: the full written content (Word doc, 20 chapters), point location photos, an existing 16-page freebie lead magnet PDF that serves as the design reference/template, and video links to embed.

Your job is to take all of that and turn it into a polished, professional, designed PDF that matches the look and feel of my existing freebie guide or better. Preferably, always better. :)



What You’ll Be Working With

• A complete Word document with all 20 chapters written and organized

• Point location photos (I’ll provide these: similar style to the freebie)

• An existing 16-page PDF freebie, but make it aesthetically awesome

• YouTube/Instagram video links to embed/hyperlink within the PDF

• Brand colors, fonts, and logo already established



What You’ll Do

• Design and lay out a 50-60 page PDF ebook in Canva or Adobe InDesign

• Upgrade the design style of my existing freebie PDF (I’ll send this to you)

• Place all photos with point markers in the correct locations

• Insert clickable hyperlinks for YouTube/Instagram video demos and social media links

• Create a printable daily tracker table (template already exists in the freebie)

• Design a cover page and table of contents

• Export final file as a high-quality PDF ready for digital sale

• Provide the editable Canva/InDesign source file so I can make minor updates later



Requirements

• Strong portfolio of ebook, PDF guide, or digital product design (please share examples)

• Experience in Canva Pro and/or Adobe InDesign

• Clean, modern design sense — not cluttered, not overly decorated

• Attention to detail with text formatting, alignment, and photo placement

• Reliable communication and ability to meet deadlines

• Experience with health, wellness, or educational content is a plus but not required



Timeline

I need this completed within 5 business days from when I hand you all materials. All content is written and photos will be provided — this is a design and layout job, not a writing job unless you got good suggestions.



Budget

This is a one-time project with potential for ongoing work (I have additional digital products planned). Please include your rate for this project in your application.



How to Apply

Please send:

•2-3 examples of ebooks or PDF guides you’ve designed (links or attachments)

•Your rate for this project

•Your estimated turnaround time

•Which tools you use (Canva, InDesign, etc.)



Looking forward to working with you!

title: Corporate Sales Manager – Real Estate Solutions
description:
Job Position is BASED IN SINGAPORE




.sg



Full job description : 



Start Something Purposeful. 



At Urban Space Group , we believe in creating concepts that allow people, business and purpose to come together and thrive. We’re a privately owned real estate group dedicated to real estate concepts for industrial and commercial spaces. We are both owners of industrial properties, commercial shophouses and spaces, as well as operators of business models and concepts such as urbanspace self storage, Urbanpod workspace etc. 



We actively invest to expand our asset portfolio and grow our industrial and shophouse asset management capabilities and offerings.  



We’re looking for a Business Development and Sales Manager to bring our asset investment and management services to our clients, partners and stakeholders. 



Why Join Acuvest :



Your Mission :



To be part of the team to grow our asset portfolio and drive performance through innovations and teamwork. 



This is a full-stack business development and sales role with plenty of room to use your skillsets in sales, strategy, innovation and execution. You’ll lead a motivated team and collaborate closely with other departments. You will report to the Business Development / Sales Director and play a critical role in the company’s performance. 



Why Join us :



- Mentored by management of a company with decades of experience in investment management, property management, development, and self-storage solutions across Singapore and the region. We combine strategic insight with innovation, offering real opportunities to grow and make an impact across a diversified real estate portfolio.



- Build an Elite Network: Connect directly with a high-value network of Corporate and SME business leaders / decision-makers, building a powerful network for your long-term career success. 



- Thrive in a High-Growth Self-Storage Sector. Our self-storage business, Co-working business space, E-commerce fulfilment hubs, serve both individual and corporate clients with flexible space solutions in a fast-rising market. You’ll be at the forefront of lead generation, networking, and deal closing—driving measurable results in an expanding industry.



- Collaborative Culture. Real Career Progression. Work with experienced professionals across property and investment teams, gain exposure to full deal cycles, build strong client relationships, and accelerate your career in sales and business development at Acuvest.



Full job description : What you will be doing



Property Leasing : 



- Develop and implement leasing strategies and initiatives to maximize occupancy, rental income, and tenant satisfaction 



- Identify leasing opportunities and prospective tenants that align with the positioning and target market of each property, and develop relationships with tenants and prospective tenants. 



- Negotiate lease agreements, including terms and conditions, rental rates, lease incentives, and lease renewals, and ensure compliance with company policies and industry standards. 



- Collaborate with property management teams to conduct market research and analysis, assess competitive landscape, and identify trends and opportunities in the property market. 



- Develop and maintain leasing budgets, forecasts, and reports, and track leasing activity, occupancy rates, and financial performance against targets and benchmarks. 



- Manage tenant relations and communication, including addressing tenant inquiries, resolving disputes, and ensuring tenant compliance with lease terms and property rules and regulations. 



- Represent the company at industry events, trade shows, and networking opportunities to promote our properties and attract potential tenants and partners. 



Self storage and Co working space sales : 



- Work closely self storage sales team and management on drive the sales and occupancy of our self storage business. 

Enjoy interacting with customers, drive Sales, customer service and relationship management. 



- Actively manage customer enquiries through telephone,
 and messaging applications 



- Providing sales service & consultation to all potential customers 



- Working with Team to formulate marketing promotions and collateral 



- Building relationship with Co-working space, Self Storage and E-commence fulfilment centre customers. 





Requirements : Who we are looking for.



- Strong business acumen and a strategic mindset. Enterprenuerial mindset 



- An outgoing, optimistic personality with exceptional interpersonal skills. Strong networking and interpersonal skills. 



- The ability to communicate confidently and effectively at all levels. Excellent communication skills, with the ability to build relationships and influence stakeholders at all levels. 



- Minimum of 5 years of experience working experience. 



- Strong understanding of leasing principles, market dynamics, and negotiation strategies in the real estate industry. 



- Proven track record of successfully negotiating lease agreements, driving occupancy, and achieving leasing targets and goals. 



- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to analyze market data, evaluate leasing opportunities, and make data-driven decisions. 



- Results-oriented mindset with a focus on driving leasing outcomes and delivering exceptional customer service to tenants and partners. 



- Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment. 



- An eagerness to learn and grow through hard work and dedication

title: Coding & Robotics Education Licensee - Master Trainer
description:
Coding & Robotics Education Licensee - Master Trainer







Remote-Based  |  Occasional Travel Required  |  Part-Time / Contract





About Our Company :



We are the leading Coding and Robotics Education Academy in Singapore. Our passion and mission is in teaching the children of today, the skills of tomorrow, and have fun learning it !



About the Role : 



We are seeking a passionate and experienced Coding & Robotics Education Trainer to support our growing network of licensees. The successful candidate will be responsible for training our licensee partners who have adopted our full coding and robotics curriculum, ensuring they are well-equipped to deliver high-quality STEM education programs.



This role is primarily remote-based, with occasional travel required for training sessions, workshops, or partner support.



You will empower our licensees with the knowledge, skills, and confidence to deliver our coding and robotics curriculum effectively to children aged 5 to 14 years old. You will also play a key role in keeping our curriculum fresh, relevant, and engaging by updating existing materials and developing new content as our programmes evolve.



Key Responsibilities :



•	Train and onboard new licensees on our full coding and robotics curriculum, ensuring they are equipped to deliver high-quality lessons.

•	Conduct training workshops and sessions for licensee educators, both virtually and in-person as required.

•	Provide ongoing coaching, mentoring, and support to licensees post-training.

•	Evaluate licensee competency and readiness to deliver the curriculum independently.

•	Review, update, and improve existing curriculum materials to ensure they remain current and effective.

•	Develop new curriculum modules and lesson plans aligned with industry trends and educational best practices.

•	Collaborate with the curriculum and product teams to align training delivery with programme goals.

•	Gather feedback from licensees and learners to continuously improve training programmes.

•	Maintain comprehensive training documentation, guides, and resources.

•	Travel occasionally to licensee locations for in-person training, support, and quality assurance.



Who We Are Looking For :



We are seeking someone who combines a love for education technology with real-world teaching experience. The ideal candidate:

•	Has proven experience training adults in a professional or educational setting.

•	Has hands-on experience teaching or working with children between the ages of 5 and 14 years old.

•	Holds a background in coding, robotics, STEM education, or a closely related field.

•	Is comfortable using and teaching tools such as Scratch, Python, block-based coding platforms, or robotics kits (e.g., LEGO Mindstorms, mBot, or similar).

•	Demonstrates strong curriculum development and instructional design skills.

•	Is an excellent communicator — able to simplify complex technical concepts for varied audiences.

•	Is self-driven, organised, and able to work independently in a remote environment.

•	Is flexible and willing to travel when required.



Qualifications & Experience :



•	Diploma or Degree in Education, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related discipline.

•	Minimum 2 years of teaching or training experience — experience with both children and adults is strongly preferred.

•	Current or former school teachers specialising in Computing, ICT, STEM, or related subjects are warmly encouraged to apply.

•	Experience in curriculum writing, lesson planning, or instructional design is a strong advantage.

•	Experience in a franchising or licensee-based education business is a bonus, but not required.

•	Proficiency in digital tools for remote training delivery (e.g., Zoom, Google Meet, LMS platforms).



What We Offer :



•	Flexible, remote-based working arrangement.

•	A meaningful role shaping the next generation of coders and innovators.

•	A collaborative and supportive team environment.

•	Opportunities for professional development and growth within the organisation.

•	Travel allowances for required in-person training engagements.

•	Competitive remuneration commensurate with experience.

title: Human Resources Generalist - Must Have US Experience
description:
Summary:



**MUST HAVE WORKDAY EXPERIENCE ALONG WITH SUPPORTING US BASED COMPANIES IN EITHER CALIFORNA OR WASHINGTON STATE**



Please apply through this form: forms.cloud.microsoft/r/GashwtwpbQ



Under the direction of the Human Resources Director, the Human Resources Generalist will support

multiple healthcare entities across various HR functions. Responsibilities include aiding the HR team in

developing and administering programs, procedures, projects, and processes throughout the

organization’s divisions, spanning the entire life cycle from recruitment and onboarding to development,

retention, and offboarding. This position will have the option to be mostly remote (work from home);

however, this position will require in-person attendance for new employee orientation, meetings,

trainings, or other collaborative activities as needed.



Essential functions & responsibilities

• Support the development and administration of programs, procedures, and guidelines to align the workforce with the strategic goals of the company, improve efficiency and effectiveness.

• Administer and assist with the rollout of new initiatives and projects across the spectrum of human resources and improvement of existing ones.

• Assist in various projects, initiatives, and processes, encompassing but not limited to annual audits, new product launches, job descriptions, performance reviews, and initiatives to enhance employee engagement.

• Ensure accurate and timely execution of administrative human resources tasks, including but not limited to maintaining employee files, managing correspondence, generating documents, overseeing systems, and uphold meticulous records

of employee information.

• Input new hire information into workday facilitate payroll and HR functions.

• Familiarize oneself with the union contract and personnel policies and procedures.

• Manage benefits administration duties, encompassing initial enrollment, change reporting, invoice approval, and communication of benefits information to employees.

• Execute position, personal, and wage changes for employees ensuring accuracy into Workday and other systems.

• Provide guidance and assistance to employees and management on various HR-related matters, including leaves compensation, and issue resolution, under the guidance of the Human Resources Director.

• Execute and support HR processes promptly, including leave administration, EEO-1 reporting, separations, L&I/Workers compensation, and unemployment claims.

• Handle sensitive employee matters with empathy, tact, and diplomacy. Assist in job postings, recruitment efforts, and the hiring/onboarding process for new employees.

• Provide administrative support to the HR department as needed.

• Stay informed about current trends, best practices, regulatory updates, and emerging

technologies in human resources talent management, and employment law.

• Promote the Mission, Vision and Values of company in all areas of responsibility, and demonstrate commitment to Culture of Excellence and strategic goals

• Other duties as assigned.



Please apply through this form: forms.cloud.microsoft/r/GashwtwpbQ

title: youtube video editor
description:
I’m looking for a creative and reliable video editor to help edit my YouTube vlogs on a weekly basis. My content focuses on lifestyle, day-in-my-life, travel, and occasional business videos, all with a strong girl vlog aesthetic.



Responsibilities:

    •    Edit 1–2 vlog-style videos per week

    •    Turn raw footage into a cohesive, engaging story

    •    Add music, transitions, and subtle effects that enhance the vibe

    •    Include captions/subtitles when needed

    •    Clean up audio by removing filler words (like “um,” “and,” “but”) especially in business-style clips

    •    Maintain a consistent and recognizable editing style

    •    Deliver content on a weekly schedule



Style I’m Looking For:

    •    Soft, feminine “girl vlog” aesthetic

    •    Clean, aesthetic, and visually pleasing

    •    Smooth transitions and natural pacing

    •    Use of trending vlog-style edits (montages, quick cuts, minimal zooms)

    •    Good music selection that matches mood (chill, pretty, lifestyle vibes)

    •    Polished, clear cuts for business-related talking segments



Requirements:

    •    Experience editing YouTube or lifestyle/vlog content

    •    Proficient in Final Cut Pro, Adobe Premiere Pro, or similar

    •    Strong sense of aesthetic and storytelling

    •    Attention to detail, especially with dialogue editing

    •    Good communication and open to feedback

    •    Consistent turnaround time



Bonus (Not Required):

title: Talent Acquisition Specialist - Non-Profit Home Health Care Agency
description:
MUST HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH US BASED COMPANIES IN WASHINGTON STATE AND/OR CALIFORNIA. MUST HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH MEDICARE/MEDICARE, WELLSKY AND WORKDAY. 



Please apply through this form: 



Summary / objective 

The Talent Acquisition Specialist is responsible for driving the recruitment efforts for a home health care agency and recruitment initiatives, ensuring that we attract, engage, and hire top

talent to meet our organization needs. You will manage the end-to-end recruitment process, from 

sourcing and screening candidates to facilitating interviews and extending job offers. Your role will 

involve collaborating closely with hiring managers to understand their staffing requirements, 

developing effective recruitment strategies, and fostering a positive candidate experience. 



Essential functions & responsibilities

• Collaborate with hiring managers to understand specific hiring needs, job requirements, and

qualifications.

• Responsible for creating and managing job postings for open positions.

• Regularly update hiring managers on the recruitment progress, maintaining transparent

communication throughout the process.

• Monitor and assess the performance of job postings and promptly adjust recruitment strategies

as necessary to attract qualified candidates effectively.

• Review resumes, conduct initial screenings, and evaluate candidate’s qualifications to determine

suitability for open positions.

• Coordinate interviews, including phone screens, and virtual hiring events.

• Ensure a positive candidate experience throughout the recruitment process. This includes clear

communication, timely feedback, and a smooth onboarding process.

• Extend jobs offers and facilitate the onboarding process through the BambooHR system,

overseeing tasks such as contacting references, E-Verify, scheduling fingerprint appointments

and coordinating TB testing if necessary.

• Ensure all new hire paperwork is completed accurately and properly filed.

• Schedule and facilitate new hire orientations, collaborating with the training team to ensure a

seamless onboarding experience.

• Collect feedback from new hires and hiring managers to assess the effectiveness of the

onboarding process.

• Make recommendations for improvements to enhance the onboarding experience.

• Provide weekly summaries of recruiting activities and progress to Human Resources Director.

• Stay informed of industry trends and best practices in recruitment ensuring compliance with all

relevant laws and regulations governing recruiting and hiring processes

• Provide administrative support to the HR department as needed.

• Contributes to recruiting projects and initiatives.

• Promote the Mission, Vision and Values of the company in all areas of responsibility, and

demonstrate commitment to Culture of Excellence and strategic goals.

• Other duties as assigned.



Required Knowledge, Skills & Abilities

• Understanding of relevant employment laws and regulations, including equal employment

opportunity (EEO) laws, fair hiring practices, and data privacy laws.

• Strong interpersonal and communication skills to effectively communicate with candidates and

hiring managers.

• Ability to prioritize tasks, manage multiple job openings simultaneously, and meet deadlines.

• Proficiency in using Workday systems to manage employee data.

• Ability to handle sensitive and confidential information with discretion and maintain

confidentiality at all times.

• Meticulous attention to detail to ensure accuracy in HR documentation, data entry, and

compliance with policies and procedures.

• Ability to remain flexible, positive, collaborative, and enthusiastic to changes, shifting priorities

and new assignments.

• Possess a professional demeanor, demonstrates initiative, and can work independently.



Required Education & Experience

• High school graduate or equivalent.

• 3-5 years of relevant experience in recruitment and onboarding.



Please apply through this form:

title: Part-Time Content Creator + Admin Support
description:
About Nokvex



Nokvex is a Philippines-based content studio serving remote agencies and freelancers across Australia and North America. We offer flexible payment in USD or PHP, treat our team as long-term partners, and keep communication clear and respectful.



---



The Role



We're looking for a Part-Time Content Creator with light admin support responsibilities. This is a long-term role with a clear path to full-time.



20 hours/week | $300/month USD ($70/week) | Weekly payment | Starting immediately



---



Schedule



- 20 hours/week distributed across Monday to Friday primarily

- Flexible - you choose your daily hours within PHT business time

- Occasional weekend support (max 2x/month) for urgent content or time-sensitive posts

- Results-based, not hour-based monitoring



---



Main Responsibilities



1. Video Editing (40%)

- 2 long-form YouTube videos per month (8-15 minutes each)

- 8 short-form videos per month (30-60 seconds, Reels/Shorts/TikTok)

- AI education content, cartoon/Nickelodeon-inspired style

- Dynamic captions, B-roll, basic motion graphics



2. Graphic Design (20%)

- YouTube thumbnails

- Social media post graphics (Canva)

- Simple branded assets



3. AI Asset Generation (15%)

- Image generation (Nano Banana, Midjourney, or similar)

- Character art, backgrounds, supporting visuals

- Following detailed briefs



4. Social Media Management (15%)

- Scheduling posts across Instagram,
, TikTok

- Basic caption drafting

- Engagement monitoring



5. Light Admin Support (10%)

- File organization (Google Drive)

- Basic research tasks (competitor analysis, data gathering)

- Spreadsheet updates

- Simple documentation



---



Growth Path



As our content volume grows, this role will evolve:



- Month 4-6: Hours may increase to 30-40 hrs/week, salary $450-$600

- Month 7-12: Option for full-time at $650-$800/month

- Scope will narrow to specialization (video editing + graphic design focus)

- SMM and admin tasks will transfer to other tea
mbers



Salary reviewed every 3 months based on performance.



---



Who You Are



- 1-2+ years experience in video editing (Premiere Pro, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve)

- Portfolio showing YouTube long-form AND short-form work

- Basic graphic design skills (Canva minimum)

- Familiar with AI image tools (Midjourney, DALL-E, or similar) OR willing to learn fast

- Comfortable with social media scheduling tools

- Good English written communication

- Reliable internet (backup required)

- Available during regular PHT business hours



Bonus Points:

- Experience with cartoon/animation-style editing

- After Effects skills

- Thumbnail design portfolio (YouTube-specific)

- AI education or tech content experience



---



What We Offer



- $300 USD/month ($70/week), paid weekly via Wise

- 20 hours/week with flexible schedule

- Occasional weekend availability for time-sensitive tasks (max 2x/month)

- 13th month bonus after 6 months of continuous service

- 5 days paid time off per year, available after 3 months

- Clear 12-month growth path (part-time ? full-time)

- Long-term collaboration, not a gig

- Respectful, async-first work culture



---



How to Apply



Please send:



1. Your portfolio link (video editing + graphic design samples)

2. Short answer: What's your favorite editing project and why?

3. A 30-second Loom video introducing yourself

4. Your availability (days and PHT hours)



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.



We review applications within 3 days and reply to everyone.



Learn more at

 & Instagram)

title: Shopify Product Researcher
description:
We are looking for a data-driven Product Researcher to identify high-potential, "winning" products to scale on our Shopify store. You won't just be looking for cool items; you will be analyzing market trends, competitor ads, and supply chain viability to ensure our next launch is a success.



Key Responsibilities

Trend Identification: Use tools like Minea, AdSpy, and TikTok Creative Center to find viral products before they saturate the market.



Competitor Analysis: Audit other Shopify stores to analyze their pricing, landing pages, and customer reviews.



Data Validation: Use Google Trends and Amazon Sales Estimators to confirm consistent demand.



Profitability Modeling: Calculate potential profit margins by factoring in COGS (Cost of Goods Sold), shipping fees, and estimated CPA (Cost Per Acquisition).



Supplier Sourcing: Liaison with agents or use platforms like AliExpress/CJ Dropshipping to find high-quality versions of researched products.



Required Skills

Shopify Savvy: Deep understanding of how Shopify apps (upsells, reviews, bundles) affect a product's conversion rate.



Analytical Tools: Proficiency with Helium10, Jungle Scout, or Peeksta.



Marketing Lens: Ability to identify "hook-worthy" products that perform well in short-form video ads (TikTok/Reels).



Critical Thinking: You don't just follow the crowd; you look for gaps in the market.



// PREVIOUS EXPERIENCE REQUIRED / PLEASE APPLY WITH PAST WORK ///

title: Affiliate Manager (Independent Contractor)
description:
Position Overview



Shop Super Discounts is an online e-commerce store selling men's and women's clothing with free USPS shipping and discounts from 10% to 90% off. We are looking for an Affiliate Manager to recruit and manage affiliate marketers who will promote our products to customers within the United States only.



This is a work-from-home position. You choose your own days and hours.



---



What You Will Be Doing



· Recruiting affiliate marketers to join the Shop Super Discounts affiliate program

· Recommending affiliates for approval to join the program

· Coordinating with your team of affiliates by providing tips, suggestions, and encouragement

· Communicating with active affiliates by
 for all important matters (pay, rates, approvals, etc.)

· Ensuring affiliates understand program rules and commission structure

· Reporting any issues, concerns, or technical problems directly to Shop Super Discounts



---



What You Will NOT Be Doing



You are not an employee. You are an independent contractor. You will not be:



· Required to work specific days or hours

· Required to track or report your time

· Told how to recruit affiliates

· Required to set quotas or minimum posts for affiliates

· Responsible for paying affiliates (Shop Super Discounts handles all payments)

· Allowed to change commission rates or terminate affiliates



---



Compensation Structure



· Weekly base budget: $120 (based on 40 hours of weekly availability at $3/hour)

· Performance bonus: 10% commission on sales generated by affiliates you recruit, paid after you meet the recommended on-target sales of $600 per week

· Payment method: PayPal

· Payout schedule: Weekly budget paid every Friday. Bonus payouts may be daily, weekly, or monthly

· Minimum guarantee: You will receive at least $120 per week. If affiliate commissions are less than $120, Shop Super Discounts adds the difference



---



Requirements



· Must have an active PayPal account

· Must have reliable
 for formal communications

· Must be comfortable using UpPromote (affiliate tracking app)

· Must speak and write professional English

· Must have a device (laptop, desktop, tablet, or phone) with internet access

· Must be located in the Philippines







How to Apply



Apply here:

title: Outdoor Youtube Video Editor needed!
description:
I’m looking for a video editor for a YouTube channel focused on outdoor content (Flying Airplanes, Overnight Camping, Fishing, Cooking, Hiking, and Nature in Alaska). Each episode is built from 3-7 hours of multi-camera footage and needs to become an 18-25-minute film that feels immersive, unhurried, and  will be almost entirely word-free.



If you love outdoor storytelling through a video and can transform hours of mostly raw wilderness footage into a calm, polished viewing experience, I’d love to hear from you. Looking for a good working relationship that is willing to be hired full time.  To start I have multiple raw files need to be converted to that 18-25 minute film. 

After this we will have content every couple weeks needed to edit so good communication and reliability are essential. Examples of Youtube videos I’m looking for. 




  


 





What matters most to me is the first 5 Second HOOK in the video (Showcasing what happens in this episode).  Long for video(18-25-minute) with Clean cuts, well-timed ambient music blended with crisp natural sound.  No flashy transitions, speed-ramps, or effects—just a simple cinematic style that lets the scenery, being in the wild, do the storytelling. Youtube short teasers > 60 seconds to gain audiences build the channel pacing. Minimal to no Talking throughout all videos. 



Typical workflow

• Receive raw files (mostly 4K, multi cameras and drone).  

. From raw 3-7 hours of video and Build a coherent narrative that foregrounds the best action for the end result video.  Flying, camping 
nts, fishing, camp-fire, cooking, and sweeping landscape B-roll.  

• Occasional keyframe scaling edits, light color correction, stabilization, looking for consistent, natural look.  

• Layer ambient music and authentic location sound for a relaxing feel when traveling to destination or on scenery shots.  No Music in most on location shots.   

• Export a edit format to me for any additional fine tuning. Typical video desired length 18-25-minute 4K edit format near YouTube-ready master video plus, Hook Video and multiple short teasers to gain audiences build the channel with a  (?60 s) for YouTube Shorts.





To apply, please:  

Start your message with “OUTDOOR CINEMATIC YOUTUBE EDITOR”.  or I won’t consider your application.. 

Link to at least two portfolio pieces in a similar slow, atmospheric style showing transitions and multi camera angles. 

3.    State your rate per hour or long-form episode and per Short.

4.    Average turn around time on producing that desired 18-25 minute video with shorts and a hook video.

title: Administrative -customer service - sales - VA
description:
Administrative / Customer Service / Sales Virtual Assistant (Full-Time)



We are looking for a highly organized Administrative / Customer Service / Sales Virtual Assistant to help manage daily operations, customer communication, and scheduling for our security camera installation company.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys talking with customers, staying organized, solving problems, and helping a business grow.



You will play an important role in keeping our operations running smoothly while ensuring customers receive excellent service and fast responses.



This is a long-term opportunity with potential for growth as the company expands.



Work Schedule



Monday – Friday

8:00 AM – 5:00 PM (Pacific Time)



You must be available during these hours.



Key Responsibilities

Customer Service



Handle incoming calls, texts, and
s from customers professionally and efficiently.



Answer questions about security camera systems, installation services, and scheduling consultations.



Maintain a friendly, helpful, and professional tone with every customer interaction.



Scheduling & Dispatching



Schedule site surveys, consultations, and installation appointments.



Manage the technician service calendar and optimize daily schedules.



Coordinate with technicians to ensure smooth daily operations.



Maintain and update our online booking system.



Administrative Support



Process invoices and payments.



Maintain organized digital records and files.



Assist with basic bookkeeping tasks.



Support general office operations and administrative tasks.



Customer Follow-Up & Reviews



Follow up with customers after installations are completed.



Ensure customer satisfaction.



Encourage customers to leave online reviews.



Help maintain a strong reputation for our business.



Sales Support



Respond to customer inquiries about security camera systems and installation services.



Assist with converting inquiries into scheduled consultations and installations.



Support sales efforts through customer communication and follow-ups.



Must Have Skills



Excellent English communication skills (minimal accent preferred)



Strong organization and multitasking abilities



Customer service experience



Ability to work independently and solve problems



Proficiency with Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Drive)



Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment



Preferred Qualifications



Experience working with security systems, IT services, or home service businesses



Basic bookkeeping experience



Experience coordinating team schedules





Sales experience or strong customer interaction skills



Friendly personality and strong people skills



Willingness to learn new skills and grow with the company



Compensation



Base Pay: $400 per month



This is a full-time position.



Trial Period



This role begins with a 1-month trial period to ensure we are a good fit for each other.



At the end of the trial period, performance will be reviewed and the position may transition into a long-term role.



Required Application Materials



To apply, please submit the following:



1. Resume

2. Cover Letter



Explain why you would be a great fit for this role and our team.



3. Video Submission (2–3 Minutes)



Your video should include:



• A brief introduction about yourself

• A role-play phone call with a potential customer asking about security camera installation services and pricing

• Your explanation of how you stay organized while managing multiple tasks



Short Skills Test (Required)



Please answer the following questions in your application.



Question 1 – Customer Service Scenario



A customer sends the following message:



"Hi, I'm interested in installing security cameras at my business. How much does it cost?"



Write the exact response you would send to this customer.



Your response should be professional, friendly, and focused on scheduling a consultation or estimate.



Question 2 – Organization Test



You receive the following at the same time:



• 3 phone calls

• 4 text messages

• 5
s from customers



Explain step-by-step how you would manage these tasks without missing anything.



Question 3 – Attention to Detail



To confirm that you carefully read this job description, include the phrase:



"Blue Ocean Scheduling"



at the top of your cover letter.



Also include the word "Reliable" in the last sentence of your cover letter.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



Important



Applications without the required video submission will not be reviewed.



We are looking for someone who is professional, reliable, organized, and ready to grow with our team.

title: Art Director (Fashion & Jewelry, AI-Driven Creative)
description:
We’re looking for an Art Director with deep experience in fashion and jewelry aesthetics, combined with strong AI fluency, to lead the development of elevated visual narratives in a fast-moving, global environment. Based in Australia and working local hours, this role sits within a dynamic, high-growth team focused on building emotionally resonant, human-centered brand worlds at scale. Working with cross functional teams globally.



This is a concept-first role where AI is central to how ideas are explored, shaped, and executed—from early-stage narrative development through to fully realized visual systems.



Key Responsibilities:



Lead the creative direction of fashion and jewelry storytelling through AI-driven concept development

Build rich visual narratives for campaigns, collections, and brand worlds without reliance on traditional production workflows

Use AI tools to generate, iterate, and refine concepts, environments, styling directions, and visual language systems

Translate brand strategy into cohesive narrative frameworks across digital and emerging formats

Develop mood worlds, characters, and visual ecosystems that express luxury, emotion, and identity

Collaborate with cross-functional teams globally to ensure creative consistency and alignment

Push the boundaries of AI-assisted creative execution, from ideation through to final visual output

Contribute to a culture of experimentation, speed, and high creative standards



Skills & Expertise:



Strong background in fashion, jewelry, luxury, or editorial creative direction

Exceptional conceptual and narrative thinking, with the ability to build visual worlds from abstract ideas

Advanced proficiency with AI creative tools (image generation, video, multimodal concepting, prompt systems)

Strong understanding of visual language: composition, materiality, symbolism, and emotional tone

Ability to develop cohesive brand narratives across multiple touchpoints and formats

Comfort working in fast-paced, high-growth, globally distributed teams



What Sets This Role Apart:



Australia-based role aligned to local working hours

Highly dynamic, fast-scaling global environment with strong creative autonomy

AI-first creative process—less production-heavy, more world-building and narrative design

Focus on high human experience: emotionally rich, culturally aware, and story-led brand expression

Opportunity to help define how luxury fashion and jewelry storytelling evolves in the AI era

We have built a virtual team over the past decade working across Australian local hours—if you cannot consistently commit to these working hours, please do not apply.

title: Video Editor (Premiere Pro)
description:
My name is Ty. I have a background in video production and Motion graphics. Most recently I’ve had some different editing needs that have come up, and I am looking for a reliable editor that can assist me with various corporate style and small business type videos. I have been doing production/design for about 10 years and look to build a long term relationship with an editor due to my line of work being so consistent.



This role will start around $620 a month (Paid Bi-Weekly) and will increase to more full time wage over next several months as the role stabilizes and alignment is solid on both sides. 



Will need around 2 to 4 videos/small projects completed/drafted per week. (Sometimes a little more complex, mostly very simple edits with all the footage provided as well as project files and selects broken time on the timelines). The work will be stable and consistent with opportunity to get creative if you’d like. 



Project Types: 

-corporate videos

-brand highlights

-Short ads

-highlights with small interview and broll

-Graphics, posters, banners, thumbnails, etc



Very doable and easy stuff for, not super graphics heavy. 



You’ll be an extension of me, so we’ll be working on things collaboratively sometimes 



I just need a RELIABLE editor who works with PREMIERE PRO



I really look forward to filling this role and growing with the best individual for it.

Type of person best for this role.

- Organized

- Follows directions

- Meets deadlines

- Communicates effectively

- Has Editing/Design capability

- Has lots of common sense

- Pays attention to detail

title: Systems & Execution Operator (Build + Implement)
description:
This is not a task-following role.



This is a build-and-execute role for someone who takes ideas, creates structure, and turns them into working systems—without needing step-by-step instructions.



You will be given outcomes, not checklists.



If you need constant direction, this role is not for you.





What You’ll Be Doing



You will take raw ideas like:



“We need a better way to track heirs”



“Our deal pipeline is getting stuck before closing”



“We need faster notary coordination”



…and turn them into:



Clear workflows



Repeatable systems



Implemented processes



Measurable results



You will:



Identify inefficiencies and bottlenecks



Design better ways of operating



Implement systems (tracking, follow-up, coordination)



Improve speed, accuracy, and throughput



Take full ownership from idea ? execution





What Success Looks Like



Problems get solved without being escalated



Processes become faster and more reliable



Work no longer depends on constant supervision



Ideas turn into fully implemented systems quickly





Who This Role Is For



You are someone who:



Takes initiative without waiting to be told what to do



Turns unclear ideas into clear execution plans



Finishes what you start



Thinks in systems, not tasks



Moves quickly, but not carelessly



You don’t ask:



“What should I do next?”



You say:



“Here’s what I did, here’s what’s next.”





Who This Role Is NOT For



You need step-by-step instructions



You prefer repetitive, clearly defined tasks



You wait for approval before acting



You enjoy planning more than implementing





Requirements



Strong problem-solving ability



Ability to work independently with minimal supervision



Experience improving processes, workflows, or operations



Organized, structured thinking



High accountability and follow-through





Compensation



Competitive hourly + performance-based bonuses



Opportunity for long-term role with increasing responsibility





How to Apply:



Send an
 to 



Subject: Operations Architect



In the body, answer this:



Describe a time you were given a vague idea or problem and turned it into a working system without detailed instructions. What did you actually do?



Include a copy of your resume AND a link to your results for this DISC personality test: 
/disc-personality-test



Applications without this will not be considered.

title: Senior SEO Specialist With Content Writing Experience
description:
**SEO Specialist & Content Writer – Part-Time | Sydney-Based Electrical & Security Company**



Hours: Part-Time

Schedule: Some overlap with Australian business hours preferred

Position Type: Long-term PT



**About Us**



Kmelectric is a growing electrical and security installation company based in Sydney, Australia. We have been serving the Sydney market for over 20 years and are expanding our digital presence to match our on-the-ground reputation.



We are looking for a talented, reliable, and experienced SEO Specialist and Content Writer to join our team on a part-time basis. You will be working across two websites — our existing Kmelectric website and a brand-new website currently under construction — helping us rank higher on Google, generate more leads, and grow both businesses through organic search.



This is a long-term part-time position for someone who is serious about their craft and wants to grow with a stable, established company.



**What You Will Be Doing**



• Manage SEO across two websites — our established Kmelectric site and a new site currently in development

• Write and develop content for the new website from the ground up as it is being built

• Implement on-page SEO improvements across all service pages on both sites

• Create and optimise location-specific suburb pages for local SEO

• Monitor keyword rankings and SEO performance across both sites using industry tools

• Manage and optimise our Google Business Profiles

• Build internal links and improve site structure across both websites

• Write and publish blog posts and website content regularly

• Assist with technical SEO recommendations

• Work directly with the business owner to improve lead generation through organic search



**What We Are Looking For**



Required:

• Solid understanding of SEO — especially Local SEO for service businesses

• Strong content writing skills in English — you will be writing content for a brand new website

• Experience with Google Search Console and Google Analytics

• Proven ability to optimise content and pages for search engine rankings

• Experience ranking service businesses in Google Maps / Local Pack

• Ability to manage SEO across multiple websites simultaneously

• Reliable internet connection

• Ability to meet weekly deadlines and work well within a team environment

• Ability to communicate regularly and reliably with the team



Preferred:

• Experience launching and optimising new websites from scratch

• Experience using AI tools to assist with content writing

• Experience with service-based businesses



**Why Join Kmelectric**



• Long-term, stable part-time position — not a short contract

• Work directly with the business owner — no corporate layers

• Opportunity to manage and grow SEO across two websites

• Be part of the launch of a brand new website from day one

• Consistent work with clear goals and measurable results

• A company that values your expertise and invests in long-term relationships



**How to Apply**



Please send your application and include all of the following — applications missing any of these details will not be considered:



1. A summary of your SEO experience

2. Examples of websites you have worked on (URLs preferred)

3. Results you have achieved — rankings improved, traffic growth, leads generated

4. Your monthly salary expectation (in USD or PHP)

5. Your favourite SEO tool and why you use it



We look forward to hearing from serious applicants only. If you have the skills and want a long-term home with a growing Australian company, we want to hear from you.

title: Automotive Service Estimating Coordinator
description:
Key Responsibilities



1. Fleet & Retail Ops Coordination

*Own the estimate-to-approval-to-route workflow:

*Create and submit estimates

*Follow up for approval

*Ensure parts are sourced

*Finalize tech routes for the following day

*Track all jobs in progress and flag issues proactively

*Ensure routes are realistic and efficient; confirm techs are prepped and ready

*Communicate clearly with customers and fleet managers about job timing, status, and follow-ups

*Submit and close out fleet approvals in Element, LeasePlan, and AutoIntegrate

*Ensure invoices match approvals; follow up on outstanding invoices and missing payments



2. Scheduling & Productivity Tracking

*Maintain the daily technician schedule, making updates as needed

*Monitor tech productivity; flag idle time, reschedules, or delays

*Track time logs and coordinate with bookkeeper for payroll



3. Customer Communication

*Respond to incoming texts, WhatsApp messages, and system inquiries in a timely, professional manner

*Follow up with clients as needed to resolve open issues or gather job-related info

*Escalate concerns appropriately and promptly



4. Admin & Reporting

*Submit a detailed Daily Recap covering completed work, pending tasks, blockers, and KPIs

*Keep Trello and other tools up-to-date with accurate job and task statuses

*Track inventory needs and coordinate ordering of parts, oil, and supplies

*Monitor A/R and follow up on past-due fleet invoices



5. Marketing & Content Support

*Publish our monthly newsletter in MailChimp with content from marketing team

*Coordinate publishing of content to Instagram /
 / Google My Business

*Other light admin support as needed for the marketing team



What Success Looks Like

*All work orders, estimates, approvals, and tech routes are handled with zero dropped balls

*You identify blockers or problems before they become fires

*Communication is clear, timely, and professional — with both customers and internal team

*The business runs like a machine — nothing gets missed or delayed

*You take full ownership of your responsibilities and require very little follow-up



Who You Are

*A natural systems thinker who thrives on clarity, organization, and ownership

*Extremely proactive — you don’t wait to be told what to do

*Excellent at written and verbal English communication

*Comfortable in the automotive world and eager to learn the details

*Sharp and reliable — you retain info, spot gaps, and follow through



Experience & Skills Required

*3+ years of experience in a remote automotive: coordinator, dispatcher, operations role

*Demonstrated responsibility for keeping things moving without handholding

*Excellent written and spoken English

*Experience with dispatch, route planning, or technician scheduling

*Familiar with tools like Slack, Google Docs, Trello (or similar), CRM/invoicing platforms

*Experience working with U.S.-based field service, auto, or fleet companies

*Bonus: Familiarity with AutoIntegrate, Housecall Pro, Element, or LeasePlan platforms



Required Software Experience

*Slack

*WhatsApp

*Trello (or similar)

*Google Workspace

*CRM / invoicing tools (Housecall Pro, AutoIntegrate)

* Monday . com (plus)



TECH REQUIREMENTS:

*Computer - at least i5 or equivalent with 8gb RAM

*Internet Speed - At least 50 MBPS Download speed

*Dual monitor setup is required to ensure efficiency in managing multiple applications simultaneously.

*Location: Remote (Philippines)

*Schedule: Part-time or Full-time, US hours



*Part-time Schedule

**Tuesday 1-5 pm

**Wednesday 1-5 pm

**Friday 8:30 - 7:30 pm

**Saturday 10-4 pm

**Sunday 2-5 pm



*Full-time Schedule

**Monday to Friday 9:30AM -6:30PM

Pay: Php288.46 - Php432.69 hourly rate



Application Instructions:

Fill out this form: 
/appqNAvkEQ10YFlc3/pagrX4PvZe0xsKHWT/form

After submitting the form, click the apply button and send us a short message on why you would be a good fit for the role.

title: SALES DEVELOPMENT REPRESENTATIVE (SDR / BDR) — REMOTE Claim Factory | Denver, CO (Remote) | Full-Time
description:
COMPENSATION



Base Salary: $500/month (USD)

Commission: $100 per signed client contract — uncapped





ABOUT US

Claim Factory is a fast-growing auto damage appraisal firm based in Denver, Colorado, serving insurance carriers across the United States. We're lean, systematized, and scaling — and we need a sharp, driven SDR to help us land direct client relationships.



THE ROLE

This is not a customer service job. This is outbound sales. You will be prospecting, building lead lists, writing cold outreach, following up relentlessly, and booking qualified meetings with decision-makers at insurance companies and fleet operators.

The base keeps you stable. The commission is where you make real money — and there's no cap on it.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Research and build targeted lead lists using 
 or similar AI-powered prospecting tools

Write and send personalized cold
 and LinkedIn outreach campaigns

Follow up consistently and manage a pipeline of prospects in our CRM

Qualify leads and book discovery calls for ownership

Track outreach activity and report weekly on results

Refine your messaging based on what's working — you own your approach





REQUIREMENTS



Proven outbound sales or BDR experience selling to US-based companies

Hands-on experience with 
 or a comparable AI lead generation tool

Excellent written and spoken English — C1 level or above, no exceptions

Multi-monitor setup (2+ screens minimum) — hard requirement

Reliable, fast internet (25 Mbps+ minimum)

Prior experience working on a commission or performance-based pay structure

Self-directed — you don't need to be micromanaged to hit your numbers

Available to overlap with US Mountain or Eastern business hours





NICE TO HAVE



Experience in insurance, auto, or B2B professional services

Familiarity with CRM tools (HubSpot, Airtable, or similar)

A track record of commission earnings or quota attainment you can speak to specifically





?? IMPORTANT — READ BEFORE APPLYING

We get a lot of applications. Most people don't read the full post — and that's our first filter.

To be considered, your application message must begin with the exact phrase:

CLAIM FACTORY — READY TO BUILD

Then answer these three questions in under 300 words:



Which prospecting tool have you used most, and how have you used it?

Describe a specific cold outreach campaign you ran — what did you do and what were the results?

Why does commission-based pay motivate you rather than scare you?



Applications that don't follow this format will not be reviewed. This isn't about being difficult — it's the exact attention to detail this job requires.

title: Senior Operations & Recruitment Lead (Founding Member)
description:
Role: Executive Assistant & Operations Manager (Founding Employee)

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Work Schedule: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Manila Time (Fixed Day Shift)

Salary: Premium Base Salary + Growth Bonuses



About the Role:

We are looking for a highly mature, seasoned, and reliable Senior Operations Lead to be the first employee of Lumera Solutions LLC, a paper packaging and design firm based in New Jersey. As the first member of our team, you will not just be an assistant; you will be the backbone of our operational startup. We are looking for a professional who is at a stable stage in their life and seeking a long-term "work-home" where they can eventually grow into a leadership/managerial role.



Key Responsibilities:

Strategic Recruitment: Lead the efforts to source, screen, and build our U.S.-based sales team in New Jersey.



Operational Setup: Handle diverse tasks to get the Op.Co. running, from lead generation in the packaging industry to managing business documentation.



Sales Support: Organize potential client lists and manage outreach workflows to jumpstart our sales.



Founding Support: Provide comprehensive administrative support to the Founder, acting as a reliable right-hand in all business matters.



Requirements:

Experience: 5–10 years of professional experience as a Virtual Assistant or Operations Lead.



U.S. Business Tenure: Extensive experience working directly with U.S. companies and a deep understanding of American professional standards.



Maturity & Stability: We are looking for a mature professional who values stability and is looking for a long-term commitment.



Communication: Exceptional, polished English (Verbal & Written).



Leadership Potential: A proactive "problem-solver" mindset with the ambition to manage a team in the future.



Technical Mastery: High proficiency in Google Workspace, LinkedIn Recruiter, and CRM management.



Who You Are:

You are a seasoned professional who has successfully balanced career and life responsibilities.



You are detail-oriented, emotionally intelligent, and possess a "can-do" attitude for a wide variety of tasks.



You are looking for a stable, daytime role that allows you to provide for your family while growing with a promising U.S. startup.



Why Join Us?

Day Shift: Respect for your family time with a fixed Manila daytime schedule.



Stability: Direct collaboration with the Founder with a long-term career path.



Impact: As the first employee, your contribution will directly shape the future of the company.
