title: Phone Sales Rep - $100 Per Sale + Recurring Commission - Work From Home
description:
READ THE ENTIRE POST AND APPLY AT THE LINKS BELOW TO BE CONSIDERED 



Advanced Marketing is a US-based digital marketing agency looking for experienced phone sales reps to sell our $500 custom website offer to small business owners in the United States. You will work from home, use our dialer and CRM, and follow our proven sales script to close deals.



This is a commission-only role with fast payouts and long-term recurring income. Every website you sell pays you $100 USD immediately. If the client later signs up for our monthly marketing services, you earn an additional 20% recurring commission every month they remain a client.



Top performers earn $1,500 to $2,000+ USD per month within 90 days.



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO



- Make 150 to 200 outbound phone calls per day to US small businesses

- Follow our proven script to pitch our $500 website offer

- Close sales and fill out a simple onboarding form for the client

- Confirm the client received their welcome
 from our team

- Hit daily call volume and weekly sales goals

- Attend team training calls and sales coaching sessions



You will NOT build websites, handle customer support, or manage billing. Your only job is to dial, pitch, and close.



---



COMPENSATION



- $100 USD per website sold (paid weekly via direct bank transfer)

- 20% recurring commission on any marketing retainer the client signs later

- Marketing retainers average $1,000 to $5,000 USD per month

- Recurring commissions paid every month the client stays active, for as long as you are employed with us

- No cap on earnings



EXAMPLE: If you close 3 websites per day, that is $300 USD per day or approximately $6,000 USD per month in base commission alone. Plus recurring bonuses on top.



---



WHAT WE PROVIDE



- Proven sales script and pitch

- Pre-qualified US small business leads

- GoHighLevel CRM and dialer access

- Complete training via Zoom

- Ongoing coaching and team support

- Weekly payouts via your preferred method



---



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent spoken English with neutral or American accent

- Minimum 1 year of phone sales, cold calling, BPO, or appointment setting experience

- Reliable high-speed internet (at least 25 Mbps)

- Quiet home workspace with no background noise

- Computer or laptop capable of running a web-based dialer and CRM

- Quality USB headset with noise-cancelling microphone

- Available to work US business hours (typically 9 PM to 5 AM Philippine time)

- Able to attend a training Zoom call (6 AM Eastern US time / 6 PM Philippine time)

- Willing to complete a 1-hour sales roleplay assessment after training

- Stable electricity and backup power solution preferred



---



PREFERRED EXPERIENCE



- Previous experience selling

title: Cold Email Operations Manager - 500+ Inboxes, 10+ Offers (Senior Level)
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



Advanced Marketing is hiring a senior Cold
 Operations Manager to run our outbound
 infrastructure at scale. You will manage 500+ sending inboxes across Google Workspace, standard Gmail, and IMAP providers, running 10+ active offers across multiple brands simultaneously.



This is NOT an entry-level VA role. We need someone who has already run cold
 at scale, understands deliverability, knows how to warm accounts properly, and can diagnose why a campaign is landing in spam without being told.



You will be the owner of our entire cold
 operation. We provide the internal sending platform, the leads from our LeadRipper system, and the offers. You own sending, deliverability, reply management, appointment setting, and the small team that supports this function.



---



WHAT YOU WILL OWN



INBOX INFRASTRUCTURE

- Manage 500+ sending inboxes across Google Workspace, Gmail, Outlook, and custom IMAP domains

- Set up new domains, DNS records (SPF, DKIM, DMARC), and MX configurations

- Warm new accounts through our internal system and third-party warmup tools

- Monitor deliverability, inbox placement, and sender reputation daily

- Rotate and retire inboxes as needed to protect domain health



CAMPAIGN MANAGEMENT

- Launch and manage 10+ active outbound campaigns simultaneously across multiple offers and brands

- Build sending schedules, sequence logic, and follow-up cadences

- Import lead lists from LeadRipper and segment by offer, vertical, and geography

- A/B test subject lines, copy, sending times, and sequence structure

- Track open rates, reply rates, click rates, bounce rates, and appointment conversion



REPLY HANDLING AND APPOINTMENT SETTING

- Monitor and respond to replies across all 500+ inboxes daily

- Qualify responses and book appointments on our sales calendar

- Route hot leads to the correct sales rep based on offer and geography

- Handle unsubscribes, bounces, and complaints properly to protect deliverability

- Write reply templates and objection handling scripts



TEAM LEADERSHIP

- Lead a small team of junior
 VAs (hired separately) who handle reply triage and data entry

- Build SOPs and training materials for the team

- Review team performance weekly and report results to leadership



---



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE



This role is not for beginners. You must have:



- Minimum 2 years managing cold
 campaigns at scale (100+ inboxes minimum)

- Hands-on experience with at least 3 of: Instantly, Smartlead, Lemlist, Woodpecker, Quickmail, Mailshake, Apollo, Saleshandy

- Deep understanding of SPF, DKIM, DMARC, domain warming, and deliverability best practices

- Experience with Google Workspace admin console for bulk inbox management

- Ability to diagnose deliverability issues (spam folder placement, IP reputation, domain blacklists)

- Proven track record of running campaigns that book real appointments

- Experience with lead enrichment tools (Apollo, Hunter, Clay, or similar)

- Comfort with spreadsheet-based data management at scale



PREFERRED EXPERIENCE



- Background with GoHighLevel or similar CRM

- Experience managing multiple offers/brands simultaneously

- Familiarity with LinkedIn outreach as a complement to

- Basic understanding of Zapier, 
, or automation workflows

- Technical comfort with DNS management at domain registrars

- Prior team leadership experience



---



WHAT WE PROVIDE



- Our internal cold
 sending platform (proprietary, handles all sending)

- LeadRipper system feeding you qualified leads daily

- 500+ already-purchased inboxes and domains

- Established offers with proven conversion data

- Budget for warmup tools, enrichment services, and team

- Direct access to founder (Ben) for strategy and approvals

- Performance bonuses on top of base salary tied to booked appointments



---



COMPENSATION



- Base: $800-$1000 USD per month depending on experience

- Performance bonus: $5 USD per qualified appointment booked (adds up fast at 10+ offers)

- Annual review with raises based on performance

- Paid weekly via direct bank transfer



Realistic year-one earnings: $2,000 including bonuses



---



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent written English (this role involves writing reply templates and campaign copy)

- Good spoken English for team leadership calls with the founder (3-4 calls per week)

- Reliable high-speed internet (50 Mbps minimum, this role is data-heavy)

- Quiet home workspace

- Powerful computer capable of running multiple browser tabs, spreadsheets, and dashboards simultaneously

- Quality USB headset

- Available for overlap with US Eastern time (at least 4 hours of your workday)

- Backup internet and power solution

- Long-term commitment (this is not a short-term gig)



---



WHO SHOULD NOT APPLY



- Anyone who has never managed more than 50 inboxes at once

- Anyone who learned cold
 from YouTube but has not actually done it

- Anyone expecting to be trained from scratch on
 deliverability

- Anyone who has only done "inbox management" in a customer service context

- Anyone who confuses cold
 with
 marketing (newsletters)

- Anyone without real examples of campaigns they have run and results they have generated



---



HOW TO APPLY

title: Reddit Assistant
description:
We’re hiring people to manage daily activity on Reddit, including posting content and interacting within communities. This is ongoing work and requires someone who actually understands how Reddit functions, not just how to scroll it.



You’ll need atleast 2+ devices (Android only). If you own multiple devices, that’s a plus and allows you to earn more. Expect roughly one hour of work per device each day.



Each day you’ll post content across several subreddits.



A critical part of this role is reading the room. The videos we provide can range from humorous to emotional to awkward or uncomfortable. You need to instantly recognize the tone and write posts that feel natural for that type of content. If you post everything the same way, you’ll fail.



You’ll also be responsible for finding appropriate subreddits for each video. That means reviewing community rules, understanding what performs well there, and making sure your post doesn’t look forced or out of place. If you can’t do that consistently, this position isn’t for you.



We’re looking for people who think independently, adapt fast, and don’t need their hand held. Prior Reddit experience is helpful but not mandatory if you learn quickly.



This is a long-term opportunity for dependable workers. Compensation is solid and can increase based on results and how many devices you use.



Earnings:

Most contributors earn $100–$500 per month, depending on consistency and the number of devices used.



Time Commitment:

Daily time commitment ranges from about 1 to 5 hours, depending on how many devices you’re using



To apply, include:

• how many devices you can work with

• your experience using Reddit

• when you’re available each day

mbers stay with us long-term, and we are looking for someone who wants to grow with the company.

Requirements

Strong Microsoft Excel skills

Experience using CRM systems (Zoho preferred but not required)

Excellent English communication skills

Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace



Experience working with U.S. companies is a plus.



WHO is BlueYonder Corp?



We have an established and unique credit card processing program. Since 2016 we operate in all 50 states.

We offer businesses a credit card processing program that costs them a flat rate of $65 dollars a month for unlimited processing. Business owners love our program because they save tens of thousands a year in fees. Which they would otherwise have to pay.

If you are unfamiliar with merchant processing, business owners are charged high fees on each card transaction. And the fees are going up. BlueYonder’s proprietary system and technology eliminates those fees.





How to Apply

1- Your Resume

2- A 2–3 minute video introduction telling us:



About yourself



Your experience



Why you are a good fit for this role



Send applications to:





NOTE – if you are scheduled on an interview, please be sure to learn more about our company



BlueYonder- 



We look forward to hearing from you soon!

title: Executive Virtual Assistant
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)

Type: Full-time

Reporting to: CEO & Founder



About Us

CyberXcel Training Academy is a premium cybersecurity career training program based in Australia. We help IT professionals transition into high-paying cybersecurity roles through hands-on, industry-grade training. We're a fast-moving, remote-first team and we operate at a high standard.



About the Role

We're looking for a sharp, highly organised Executive VA to be the operational backbone of the business. You'll work directly with the CEO and touch almost every part of the business — from student communications and marketing execution to finance tracking, team coordination, and calendar management. This is not a task-monkey role. We need someone who takes ownership, thinks ahead, and gets things done without being chased.



What You'll Be Doing

Marketing & Social Media



Schedule and publish content across Instagram and other social platforms

Manage and execute
 campaigns via Go High Level

Support social media marketing activities as directed

Coordinate with video editors and content creators — manage assets, timelines, and delivery



CRM & Sales Support



Manage workflows, pipelines, and invoicing inside Go High Level

Send contracts and onboarding documents to new students

Call prospects and confirm upcoming sales call appointments

Coordinate scheduling between the CEO, students, and clients



Student Communications



Liaise with current students on behalf of the CEO for non-delivery matters

Handle student queries, follow-ups, and general communications as directed



Finance & Reporting



Track payments, invoices, commissions, and bills using Google Sheets

Monitor and report on monthly cash in, ad spend, and business expenses

Support invoicing and financial admin tied to student onboarding

Flag discrepancies and keep financial trackers up to date



Team Coordination



Coordinate between the CEO, technical mentor, and recruiter on operational (non-delivery) matters

Assign and follow up on tasks in ClickUp to keep the team on track



Operations & Admin



Manage the CEO's calendar and coordinate appointments

Handle inbox and
 management — flag, filter, and respond where appropriate

Communicate with the internal team via Slack

Conduct personal and business research as required

Handle personal admin tasks as directed by the CEO



Course Platform & Content



Make content updates and basic edits on the Circle course platform

Basic video editing for social media or course content as needed





What We're Looking For



Proven experience as an Executive VA or Senior VA (2+ years minimum)

Strong working knowledge of Go High Level (GHL) — non-negotiable

Proficient in Google Sheets — comfortable building and maintaining trackers and reports

Familiar with Circle, ClickUp, Slack, and Instagram scheduling tools

Excellent written and spoken English

Confident making calls and speaking professionally with prospects, students, and clients

Highly organised, proactive, and able to manage competing priorities without being chased

Discreet and trustworthy — you'll handle sensitive financial, student, and client data

Available to overlap with Australian Eastern Time (AEST) business hours





Bonus Points



Experience working with an online education or coaching business

Basic video editing skills (CapCut, Adobe, or similar)

Background in digital marketing or CRM management



Working Hours



Monday to Friday

9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Manila time (PHT)

This aligns with Australian Eastern business hours and provides overlap with the CEO based in Dubai



How to Apply

Send your CV and a short Loom video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself and walking us through one example of how you've helped a previous employer stay organised or solve an operational problem. Applications without the Loom video will not be considered.

title: Script (Steps) Writer + Screen recorder
description:
Our videos for this role will primarily focus on tutorials, reviews, and step-by-step walkthroughs of SaaS software and digital products.



Your responsibility is to first create a clear, structured set of steps for each video. These steps will then be used to guide your screen recording, where you’ll walk through the software in real time, following the exact flow of the steps.



Here’s an example of how the final step-by-step structure should look:?



You’ll need to break down the entire process into individual steps that will be shown in the video. This includes everything, navigation, buttons clicked, inputs entered, prompts used, and any important on-screen actions. Provide any assets that are generated or relevant to the walkthrough (example: if you generate a video as part of the walkthrough, download the video and provide that with any other assets. Make sure they're labelled to the corresponding step). 



Once completed, send the steps using the same format as the example above. We will then convert your steps into a polished final script for you to use during recording.?Example script:?



After receiving the final script, record your screen while going through the tool or course, following the script exactly — as if you’re performing a live walkthrough.



Requirements:

- Excellent attention to detail, you must follow steps exactly with no missed actions

- Understanding of engaging video flow (you know how to structure steps so they make sense and keep the viewer engaged)

- Experience with screen recording tutorials or SaaS walkthroughs is a plus

- Fluent in English with clear communication skills

- Create a separate Chrome profile named “AFFContent” for all recordings. This ensures no personal bookmarks, tabs, or browsing history appear in the video.

- Ensure your screen recording is high quality, smooth, clear, and free from lag.

- Move at a natural pace: don’t rush through steps, but also avoid unnecessary delays.

- Most recordings should fall within the 10–20 minute range, depending on the length of the script.

- Follow the script from beginning to end in the correct order. This is essential, as the editor will sync your footage with a voiceover.

- Reliable, consistent, and responsive



We will provide access to any paid tools or gated content required for the task. Please use resources efficiently and avoid unnecessary usage of credits & generations, or features.

title: Remote Customer Care Specialist
description:

What We Offer

Performance-based earning opportunities

We look forward to reviewing your application.

title: Full-Time Video Editor
description:
Hey — I’m Karos. I’m 17, and I’m running a 7-figure e-commerce brand. This is not a corporate, LinkedIn-style job post. No fluff. No buzzwords. No BS. I’m looking for a full-time Video Editor who understands direct response and actually cares about performance. This is not a “just cut clips together” role. This is about making ads that perform.



I’m building fast and I’m obsessed with results. This is only the beginning. If you join now, you’re not just editing videos — you’re growing with me, long-term. This is NOT a short-term gig. It’s a chance to build something real together.



What you’ll be doing:

Editing direct-response video ads (Meta-focused)

Creating high-converting ads, not just aesthetic edits

Producing 3 hooks per video

Turning our raw ideas + strategy into scroll-stopping creatives

Using AI tools like ElevenLabs and AI Personas where it makes sense

Iterating based on performance data

Working directly with me — fast feedback, fast decisions

Helping push the brand from “doing well” to dominating



VERY Highly valued skill:

- AI: Experience with tools like HeyGen, Google Veo, Kling, Nano Banana

Candidates with this skill set will have a strong advantage.



Who I’m looking for:

You’ve edited direct-response ads for e-commerce brands

You understand performance, not just visuals

You have a STRONG EYE for details

You’re fast, disciplined, and competitive

You care about results and high standards

You want to work exclusively on one brand and help grow it

If you want something slow, safe, and corporate — this isn’t for you.



Compensation:

Full-time, remote role

Base salary depends on experience and skill

Performance-based bonuses tied directly to ad results

For strong performers, monthly bonuses can realistically reach around $1,000, depending on output and performance. There’s no fixed cap — results drive upside. If you make winning ads, you make more money. When the brand wins, you win.



The Big opportunity:

This starts as a Video Editor role, but there’s room to grow. If you consistently deliver, understand what’s working, and show good judgment over time, you can move into a better role with more responsibility and higher pay. I’m building brands for the long run and looking for people who want stability, ownership, and multi-year collaboration, not constant job hopping.



Application process (important):

To filter unserious applicants, start your message with:

“I create high-converting creatives.”

Then include:

Your experience with video editing & direct response ads

Whether you have AI experience

Links to relevant e-commerce ad work (portfolio)

Your availability and start date

Why you want to work with us



If this resonates and you’d thrive in this environment, D
 and I’ll get back to you.

Speak soon, Karos

title: 3D Modeler / Architectural Designer for Construction & Remodeling (SketchUp / Rendering)
description:
We are a growing construction and remodeling company looking for a skilled 3D modeler/designer who can produce high-quality, realistic visualizations based on real property images and project requirements. You will be paid on average $25 USD per render that you complete with us (can be more or less depending on complexity) and you can expect up to 10 render projects per week.



Responsibilities



Create accurate and high-quality 3D models and renders of residential construction projects

Work from: Reference images of homes, Sketches or marked-up images, Written instructions

Design and render elements such as: Decks, Outdoor kitchens, Firepits, Patios and hardscapes, Bathrooms, Kitchens, ADUs

Ensure designs are structurally accurate and visually realistic

Apply realistic materials, lighting, and textures

Make revisions based on feedback (sometimes very precise adjustments)

Maintain consistency with the original structure of the home (no unintended changes)



Requirements



Proven experience in 3D modeling and architectural visualization

Proficiency in one or more of the following: SketchUp, Blender, 3ds Max, Revit, Lumion / V-Ray / Enscape (or similar rendering tools)

Strong understanding of: Scale and proportions, Construction layouts, Materials (wood, stone, concrete, etc.)

Ability to follow detailed and exact instructions

Good communication and responsiveness

Portfolio showcasing relevant work (REQUIRED)



Nice to Have (Not Required)



Experience with U.S. residential construction styles

Knowledge of deck construction or outdoor living design

Experience using AI-assisted rendering tools

Basic understanding of construction feasibility



Compensation



Paid on average $25 USD per render project (can be more/less depending on complexity)

Opportunity for long-term consistent work, up to 10 renders per week

title: Marketing & Operations Assistant
description:
Overview

We are looking for a sharp, detail-oriented assistant to support Mark across marketing operations, SEO execution, project coordination, and day-to-day admin. This is a hands-on role that spans multiple functions - you will not be doing just one thing. The right person is organized, proactive, communicates clearly, and can manage ongoing work across several active projects without dropping the ball.



This role starts part-time but has a clear path to grow for the right candidate. We work fast, we expect follow-through, and we want someone who takes ownership of their tasks.



Key Responsibilities



Project & Task Tracking

? Track all active projects, opportunities, and tasks across daily, weekly, and monthly cycles

? Follow up with team members on deadlines and open items

? Keep ClickUp up to date and flag anything that is slipping

? Proactively remind Mark of pending tasks, upcoming deadlines, and action items



Admin & Coordination

? Manage inbox triage, draft responses, and flag
s that need Mark's attention

? Handle calendar scheduling, meeting coordination, and follow-ups

? Edit and format documents, reports, and client-facing materials

? Support team communication on projects and delivery timelines via Slack



SEO & Content Operations

? Generate metadata (titles, descriptions, slugs) according to our internal setup and guidelines

? Research topics and identify supporting content gaps using Ahrefs/Semrush and AI tools

? Create content outlines for blog posts and service/product pages following our defined process

? Optimize images according to our process (naming, compression, alt text)

? Edit headings and formatting inside Google Docs to produce clean, publish-ready drafts

? Review practice area and service pages to identify internal linking opportunities, then implement links directly in blog content



Research & QA

? Research topics, competitors, and client-relevant information as needed

? QA deliverables for accuracy, formatting, and consistency before they go out

? Proofread content, pages, ads, and documents

? Compile reports and data summaries (training provided)



Required Skills & Experience

? Proficient with AI tools and LLMs - this is a core requirement, not a nice-to-have (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, etc.)

? Background in marketing, SEO, or digital agency work

? Working knowledge of SEO principles and content best practices

? Experience with Ahrefs or Semrush for keyword research and content gap analysis

? Proficient in Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail, Calendar)

? Familiar with Google Search Console and Google Analytics

? Experience with Slack for team communication

? Experience with ClickUp or similar project management tools



What We Are Looking For

? Highly detail-oriented - catches mistakes before they become problems

? Punctual and reliable - meets deadlines and responds promptly

? Proactive - does not wait to be told twice; follows up and closes loops

? Strong written and verbal communicator in English

? Comfortable working across multiple projects and priorities in the same day

? Calm under pressure - this is a fast-moving environment

? Willing to learn internal processes and adapt quickly



Nice to Have

? Experience supporting a marketing agency or multi-brand operation

? Familiarity with GEO / AI SEO concepts

? Experience with paid ads (Meta, Google) at an operational level

? Basic understanding of HTML or CMS troubleshooting

title: Legal VA / Paralegal Assistant (Family Law – Evidence Organization)
description:
Hi there,

I’m looking for an experienced Legal VA or Paralegal to help organize communication and documents for a family law (custody-related) matter in Canada.



This role is a mix of:

* Helping us figure out how to export messages (texts,
s, etc.)

* Organizing everything into clear, structured evidence

There is a large volume of communication, so I’m looking for someone who is highly organized, detail-oriented, and experienced with legal document prep.

This is not a legal advice role — I’m looking for someone who can bring clarity and calm to a lot of information.



What You’ll Be Doing

* Guide us step-by-step on how to export text messages and
s (iPhone, Gmail, etc.)

* Review and organize communication into clear categories:

    * Parenting

    * Expenses

    * Agreements / disagreements

* Create clean timelines of events

* Identify and flag important messages (e.g. refusals, patterns)

* Organize everything into structured folders (Google Drive)

* Prepare labeled PDF evidence bundles

* Summarize long message threads into short, clear notes



Who I’m Looking For

* Experience as a Legal Assistant / Paralegal / Legal VA

* Ideally experience with family law cases

* Experience working with message exports or legal evidence

* Strong written English (clear and concise)

* Able to work independently and make organization decisions

* Comfortable guiding someone who is not technical



Nice to Have

* Experience with Canadian / US / UK / AU legal systems

* Experience preparing court exhibits or case files



Details

* Remote (Philippines preferred)

* Part-time, contract-based

* Flexible hours, but must meet deadlines

???? Rate: Please include your hourly rate.

(For reference, experienced candidates typically range from $6–$12 USD/hour depending on experience.)?

Important

This role involves sensitive personal information.?You must be comfortable signing a confidentiality agreement.



How to Apply

Please include:

1. Your experience with legal work (especially family law, if any)

2. Whether you have helped export or organize messages/emails for legal cases

3. Your hourly rate

4. A short answer to this question:

If a client has hundreds of screenshots of text messages, how would you organize them for legal review?



Final Step

At the top of your application, please write:

“ORGANIZED & CLEAR”

This helps me quickly identify applicants who pay attention to detail.

title: Outbound Business Development & Deal Sourcing Associate (Healthcare / M&A)
description:
Job Title

Outbound Business Development & Deal Sourcing Associate



Company

SP



Location

Remote, Philippines



Job Type

Full-Time



Compensation

Base salary plus performance bonuses



About the Role

SP is a U.S.-based advisory firm focused on behavioral healthcare, addiction treatment, mental health, healthcare growth services, and M&A-related engagements.



We are looking for a sharp, professional, and highly driven remote team member based in the Philippines to help us generate new business opportunities.



This is not a general virtual assistant role.



This role is for someone who is strong in outbound sales, lead generation, research, and business development. You will help identify business owners who may be interested in selling their companies, operators who may need consulting services, and buyers for active engagements.



You do not need to be a senior M&A professional, but you must be intelligent, organized, resourceful, and comfortable learning business and financial concepts.



What You’ll Be Doing



Research U.S.-based behavioral healthcare companies, founders, owners, executives, and decision-makers

Build targeted prospect lists for outbound campaigns

Identify behavioral health business owners who may be potential sell-side clients

Identify potential clients seeking support with startup development, licensing, accreditation, expansion, and new programs

Source buyers for active healthcare M&A opportunities

Conduct outbound outreach through
, LinkedIn, and other approved channels

Write customized and professional outreach messages

Track leads, follow-ups, notes, and pipeline activity in spreadsheets and CRM systems

Help qualify prospects based on fit, size, ownership profile, and likely interest

Work closely with leadership to improve outreach strategy and business development efforts



What We’re Looking For



Strong written and spoken English

Experience in outbound sales, lead generation, appointment setting, SDR, BDR, or business development

Strong online research skills

High attention to detail

Organized and reliable follow-up

Comfortable using spreadsheets, databases, and CRM tools

Able to communicate professionally with U.S.-based executives and business owners

Self-motivated and able to work independently



Strong Plus Factors



Experience working with U.S. clients

Experience in healthcare, consulting, finance, recruiting, business brokerage, private equity, or M&A-related work

Familiarity with LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo, HubSpot, Instantly, Smartlead, Clay, Close, Pipedrive, or similar tools

Ability to understand basic financial and business concepts

Experience sourcing founders, owners, executives, or investors



This Role Is a Good Fit If You



are strong at research and finding hard-to-reach decision-makers

know how to write outbound messages that sound professional and get replies

can think critically about which leads are worth pursuing

are not just completing tasks, but helping generate real opportunities

want a long-term role with growth potential



This Role Is Not a Good Fit If You



are only looking for admin or general VA work

have no outbound sales or prospecting experience

struggle with written English

need constant supervision to stay organized and productive



Performance Expectations

You will be measured based on the quality of your research, outreach consistency, pipeline organization, responsiveness, and ability to help generate qualified opportunities.



Work Schedule



Full-time

9am-5pm EST US.



How to Apply *IMPORTANT*

To apply, please send the following, if you do not send the following, we understand you did not read this post fully, and we are only hiring those who pay attention to detail:



Your resume *

A short summary of your outbound sales or business development experience

Examples of the types of leads or decision-makers you have sourced before

The tools you have used for prospecting, outreach, and CRM

A short cold
 sample to a U.S. healthcare business owner

Your requested monthly compensation

Include the word Origination at the top of your application



Important

We are looking for quality, professionalism, strong judgment, and long-term fit. Generic applications will not be considered.

Color correct and balance footage for a bright, natural look

Add smooth transitions, music, and light motion graphics

Sync footage to music for pacing and flow

Deliver projects within tight turnaround times (24–48 hours)

What We’re Looking For

Experience editing real estate videos (REQUIRED)

title: Real Estate Operations & Marketing Coordinator
description:
The Real Estate Operations & Marketing Coordinator is responsible for running the day-to-day backend of our business. You’ll handle listing coordination, manage our CRM database, execute social media and marketing tasks, communicate weekly updates to sellers, and support leadership with content creation and strategy.

This is not a simple data-entry job — you’ll be working directly with leadership and our Director of Operations to implement systems, manage platforms, and create content that helps drive real business results.

Key Responsibilities

Listing Coordination & Marketing

• Pull property details and photos from MLS and CRM to create marketing packages

• Write plug-and-play captions and design graphics for new listings, price changes, and sold properties

• Prepare and organize listing agreements, AVIDs, lease files, and referral docs

• Track listing expirations and extensions and keep MLS remarks up to date

• Build property flipbooks and digital marketing decks

Lead & Database Management (FUB, Zillow Flex, Homelight)

• Manage and organize leads in Follow Up Boss

• Update lead statuses and track progress through the pipeline

• Audit Flex and Homelight leads weekly to ensure proper follow-up

• Compile weekly reports on lead volume and key metrics

Agent Onboarding & Offboarding

• Create accounts and set up new agents in Google Workspace, FUB, Zillow, Ylopo, and Homelight

• Send welcome
s, schedule onboarding meetings, and add agents to calendars

• Invite agents to trainings, HUB, and Flex

• Remove departing agents from all systems and complete exit checklists

Scheduling & Calendar Management

• Schedule team trainings, vendor appointments, and meetings

• Manage all calendar invites, reminders, and recurring meetings

• Upload training recaps and meeting notes into shared drives

Tracking & Reporting

• Maintain and update sales tracking sheets, pendings, closings, and listings

• Track and report weekly metrics from Zillow and Homelight

• Input Cognito form data and ensure reporting accuracy

Systems & Tools Management

• Maintain and organize the team Google Drive and internal HUB

• Manage FUB users, templates, and automations

• Oversee Ylopo users and update team website content

• Maintain Canva template library and resources

Newsletter & Internal Content

• Design and build monthly newsletters using Canva and Benchmark

• Gather new agent bios, listings, events, and training info

• Write short blurbs for events, spotlights, and highlights

Social Media Execution

• Create branded graphics and schedule posts for listings, escrows, and agent milestones

• Write captions using templates and property information

• Track post performance and manage a content calendar

Seller Communication & Listing Feedback

• Collect showing feedback and agent comments weekly

• Draft and send weekly seller update
s summarizing feedback, showings, and market activity

• Provide pricing or marketing recommendations based on trends

• Flag interested buyers or urgent updates for leadership review

Content Creation & Marketing Support

• Brainstorm and plan weekly content topics and ideas with leadership

• Draft scripts for short-form videos, recruiting videos, and webinars

• Research trending content hooks and strategies

• Maintain a “content bank” organized by topic and format

• Help outline scripts and presentations for webinars and events

Qualifications

• At least 2+ years of experience as a Virtual Assistant (real estate experience preferred)

• Strong written and spoken English communication skills

• Proficient in tools like Google Workspace, Canva, and CRM platforms (FUB experience is a plus)

• Social media content creation experience (graphics + copywriting)

• Highly organized with strong time management and attention to detail

• Able to work independently, take initiative, and manage multiple projects

• Willing to work during US business hours (Pacific Time overlap required)

What We Offer

• Full-time, long-term opportunity with room to grow

• Competitive pay and performance bonuses

• Work closely with leadership and learn the backend of a top-performing real estate business

• Ongoing training, mentorship, and professional growth

• A collaborative, growth-oriented work environment

title: VIDEO EDITOR (REAL ESTATE + AI-ENHANCED CONTENT)
description:
VIDEO EDITOR (REAL ESTATE + AI-ENHANCED CONTENT)



We’re hiring a high-level video editor who knows how to combine real-world footage with AI tools — without making content look artificial.



This is not a basic editing role.

We produce content that needs to feel credible, premium, and grounded, while using AI to elevate — not overpower — the story.



THE ROLE



You’ll be editing short-form video content for a fast-growing, digital-first real estate brand.



Your job is simple:

Turn raw property footage into clean, high-impact videos that build trust and drive attention.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



• Edit vertical short-form content (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

• Work with real footage — phone, drone, walk-throughs

• Enhance visuals using tools like Nano Banana Pro (or similar)

• Apply motion, hooks, and transitions using Kling AI (or similar)

• Maintain a clean, modern, “real-first” editing style

• Deliver fast, consistent, high-quality outputs



WHAT WE NEED



• Proven experience in real estate or authority-style content

• Strong understanding of short-form hooks (first 3 seconds are critical)

• Ability to enhance footage without over-processing

• Clean typography, sharp pacing, confident storytelling

• Hands-on experience with AI video tools



OUR STYLE (READ THIS CAREFULLY)



We are not looking for flashy, over-animated, or “AI-heavy” edits.



Most of the video must stay grounded in real footage.



AI should only be used to:

• Create strong opening hooks

• Add smooth, cinematic transitions

• Enhance location or map visuals

• Elevate key branding moments



If your portfolio looks like generic AI ads, this is not the right fit.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



• Content feels premium and authentic

• Videos build authority and trust

• Consistent visual identity across campaigns

• Fast turnaround with minimal revisions



HOW TO APPLY



Send your portfolio + WhatsApp number below.

Shortlisted applicants will be contacted directly.

title: eCommerce Graphic Designer (Application Form in Job Description)
description:
## Graphic Designer — Social Media & Ad Creatives



We're looking for a graphic designer with a sharp eye for design, strong DTC e-commerce experience, and the versatility to move between paid social, organic content, and occasional brand work. Most importantly, we want someone who's excited about helping women across Ireland take better care of themselves — through products that genuinely work.



## Who We Are



We're one of Ireland's leading women's health supplement brands. Our hero product is a clinically-backed collagen supplement that helps women in their 40s and beyond support their joints, hair, skin, and overall confidence as they navigate aging, perimenopause, and menopause. We're science-backed but our voice is warm, witty, and real — never clinical, never aspirational. (Brand name shared once we move forward.)



## How This Role Fits



We already have a graphic designer on the team, but she's focused on
 and running at capacity. We're looking to add one more designer to focus on social media creatives — both paid ads and organic — alongside occasional brand work. You'll work with our copy team, video editors, and growth lead to make sure every piece of creative we put out looks as good as the product behind it.



## What You'll Do



- **Paid social ad creatives** — Static image ads for Meta. You'll work directly with our Head of Growth on concepts, formats, and iteration based on what's performing.

- **Organic social content** — Feed posts, stories, and campaign visuals across Instagram,
, and TikTok. You'll work primarily with the Irish marketing team on this.

- **Brand collateral** — Occasional flyers, brochures, packaging touch-ups, event materials, and other one-off design needs.

- **Design system upkeep** — Keep our visual language consistent across everything we put out. Help us grow and refine the brand kit as we scale into new markets (UK and EU expansion is in motion).



A rough baseline is **15–20 polished design pieces per week** — but this number flexes a lot depending on the tools you're set up with (AI, templates, automation) and the priorities of the week. Our goal is to figure out together what your real capacity looks like and equip you to maximize it.



## Where This Could Go



We're in a growth phase. As the design function expands, there's a clear path for the right person to take more ownership over the brand visual direction and eventually lead a small design team. If that excites you, we want to hear about it.



## What You Need to Bring



- **3–5 years of e-commerce / DTC graphic design experience** — ideally with brands that run paid Meta ads at meaningful scale.

- **Strong eye for design.** This is the non-negotiable. Your portfolio should show real polish — clean type, considered composition, brand-appropriate visual decisions. Beautiful work matters more than tool fluency.

- **Photoshop and Illustrator proficiency.** Canva is fine to use, but Canva-only designers won't be a fit — we need someone who can handle more complex execution when needed.

- **A portfolio with DTC ad creatives and social feed work.** If you've worked with women's health, wellness, beauty, or women-focused brands, that's a significant plus.

- **Strong communication in English** (written and verbal).

- **Reliable internet, your own equipment, and a quiet workspace** for occasional video calls.



Nice to have (not required):

- Product photography editing / retouching

- Experience designing for European markets



## How We Work



- **Remote, async-friendly.** We don't track hours or require time-in/time-out. We do expect you to be responsive during Philippine working hours (9 AM – 6 PM PHT) for questions, feedback, and quick async collaboration.

- **Occasional after-hours meetings.** Because of the Irish time zone, some calls happen between 6–8 PM PHT. These are scheduled in advance, never last-minute.

- **You'll work primarily with our Irish marketing team** on organic and brand work, and with our Philippines-based Head of Growth on paid ads.

- **Brand systems exist** — we have a brand kit, ad templates, and a clear visual language. But we want someone who'll help us evolve and strengthen those systems, not just execute against them.



## Compensation & Setup



- **$600–$700 USD per month**, depending on experience.

- **Full-time contract role**, paid monthly via Wise directly to you.

- **Remote, work from anywhere** (Philippines preferred for time zone).

- This is a contractor role. You're responsible for your own taxes and government benefits (SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG if applicable).



## Hiring Process



1. **Application** — Fill out the form linked below.

2. **Initial review** — We'll review your portfolio and answers within a few days.

3. **Interview or trial** — Depending on the strength of the application, you'll either go to a short interview first or straight to a quick trial project. The trial is unpaid and small in scope — designed for us to assess your work, and just as importantly, for you to assess the kind of work you'd be doing with us.

4. **Offer** — If both sides feel it's a fit, we move to onboarding.



## Why This Role Matters



Every ad we run, every social post, every visual that lands in front of an Irish woman thinking about her health is a chance to earn her trust. Great design is what makes that chance count. If you want to do work that's seen by a real audience, that drives real results, and that helps real women feel better in their own skin — we'd love to hear from you.



DO NOT
 TO APPLY, fill out the application form below to submit your application:
